name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: “Delete” the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
I don’t think you’ll need three guesses here.

| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/216?t=3&akid=2431%2E4032634%2EP92NWk)
---
I’ll give you three guesses as to why some billionaires and Republican politicians are trying to “delete” the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau (CFPB). But I bet you’d get it on your first try: Because the CFPB is working to unrig our economy so it doesn’t just work for billionaires. If you’ve got a checking account, a credit card, a mortgage, or a student loan, the CFPB is looking out for you to keep you from getting cheated. And this Little Agency That Could has a rock-solid record of success, including...
* Taking on the types of shady lenders that were tricking and trapping people with complicated mortgages and eventually crashed our economy in 2008 — costing millions of people their homes
* Stopping Wells Fargo from unlawfully repossessing people’s cars after the bank had piled on fees that consumers didn’t owe or charged them the wrong interest rate
* Tackling aggressive junk fees that make price comparisons impossible
* Beating back predators that tricked service members and veterans into paying interest rates that surged up to 200 percent on pawn loans
* Pushing back when some medical debt collector companies were double billing patients or even charging patients for services they never received
* All in all, putting around $20 billion back in the pockets of people who got cheated by financial institutions

Now, why would a politician like Donald Trump, who ran for president promising change — promising to make government work better for working people — want to let some billionaires get rid of the CFPB? He pledged to cap credit card interest rates at 10 percent — it will take a strong CFPB to make that happen. He promised to rein in the influence of Big Tech — the CFPB is tackling that right now. He promised to fight for working people — the mission the CFPB delivers on every day. Soon, he’ll be deciding on a director for the CFPB. We’ll see if he stands up to giant corporations to help the workers who voted for him or if he cowers to corporate billionaires. And if he breaks his promises, I’m determined to hold him accountable. **The years ahead will be filled with chances to fight for working people — including by defending the CFPB. I’m in that fight all the way.** [**I’m grateful to have you on this team, and of course I wouldn’t expect you to donate every time I ask, but every contribution is a powerful symbol of this movement’s commitment to our values — can you pitch in $28 or any amount to show we’re staying in the fight?**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/2877?amount=28&t=8&akid=2431%2E4032634%2EP92NWk) Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth

---

name: Mark Trammell
subject: Radicals cancel grandmother for protecting little girls
body:
Too many children have been victims of the left's evil and radical ideology. Enough is enough.| |
---
| | The radical left is rallying to cancel an 82-year-old grandmother
---
| |
---
| | [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=c205e8b1d4ce45298a79b481e07b9cb8&_e=ZDY5mQ-yWEtsxRGseQIFlcSLkpqdKe1JkMHYl0jdzEy2Bp6oQY2UhVOL2cwEpiz4gcurtJkIj2KFzXVLig-eC4GBJB6mpocsKpCrCTaw6XLbQXU2i3BFpi9DuFs3MgBwIvbYurMdfSVBrDKgJIk9hwqVQiuJmXxWJGIw8OnQxDxW1LEhtIjOlknk-G8STdGCfSLoFymosOSymdhVBraBaio9FD0CO0EZI5-uG8J7m7vcWw0dLdzXjtHz0JUtatY-ANp0VYOsEHVI-nge_v0yUOMUFqTI2X2t_n22No4SBKoWMaH8pU2HAgwdNPLfY_47TuuvZp-_-aMfE3btlBJMghajhs6WBJ9fiKaAIQrMu6PH5wPbyHklHkEzcoCiTS0Yp1rQR7PqwaEGM5Pg-iqzIQ%3D%3D)
---
| | Fellow Conservative,The radical left is rallying to cancel an 82-year-old grandmother for protecting two little girls from a man--who was pretending to be a woman--in the women's locker room. **[**Will you help defend this courageous grandmother today?**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=c205e8b1d4ce45298a79b481e07b9cb8&_e=ZDY5mQ-yWEtsxRGseQIFlcSLkpqdKe1JkMHYl0jdzEy2Bp6oQY2UhVOL2cwEpiz4gcurtJkIj2KFzXVLig-eC4GBJB6mpocsKpCrCTaw6XLbQXU2i3BFpi9DuFs3MgBwIvbYurMdfSVBrDKgJIk9hwqVQiuJmXxWJGIw8OnQxDxW1LEhtIjOlknk-G8STdGCfSLoFymosOSymdhVBraBaio9FD0CO0EZI5-uG8J7m7vcWw0dLdzXjtHz0JUtatY-XXz4Ynqyf9DrNW6sINkrY1yfHE_1xNmYdyfZ740jG3c7LZhYys_w_ckB0OLjsH6nWxSpVMKkcdcBltyg6H668mse6iH2sMyeH5S8zx7kfZL2jlVHFvjmrpFWRQsraJ9xPpVn_xWhlR1bXR07f7fG4A%3D%3D)** Julie Jaman is an 82-year-old grandmother who's lived in Port Townsend, Washington, for almost forty years. Julie regularly used her local swimming pool that is owned by the City of Port Townsend and operated by the YMCA.After a typical swim at the YMCA pool, Julie went to the women's locker room to shower like she always does.But Julie was surprised to hear a male's voice while she was showering.To her shock, she saw a fully grown man wearing a woman's bathing suit and watching two little girls undress! | [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=c205e8b1d4ce45298a79b481e07b9cb8&_e=ZDY5mQ-yWEtsxRGseQIFlcSLkpqdKe1JkMHYl0jdzEy2Bp6oQY2UhVOL2cwEpiz4gcurtJkIj2KFzXVLig-eC4GBJB6mpocsKpCrCTaw6XLbQXU2i3BFpi9DuFs3MgBwIvbYurMdfSVBrDKgJIk9hwqVQiuJmXxWJGIw8OnQxDxW1LEhtIjOlknk-G8STdGCfSLoFymosOSymdhVBraBaio9FD0CO0EZI5-uG8J7m7vcWw0dLdzXjtHz0JUtatY-firNpvzKIeELLLJXx4nkFdbkkB3m6sc2TybC2kAPlK5FtgrTb1jrpSbaMDtGGyxsb6hNiuVrol5J1mBEg2_eA8TaiTl7HPJ1JIWRTkt2dSgGdgn-l-OxCrOALPzzVcd_4aTNhLNiUb2xzwm4uPs4_A%3D%3D)
---

**Now the radical left is trying to ruin Julie's future because she stood up for those two little girls -- and Julie is relying on your help.**
The two little girls appeared to be about 4 and 6 years old. Julie believed she was witnessing a predator take advantage of these innocent girls!
So Julie did what any grandmother in that situation would do -- she confronted the man and asked him to leave the bathroom!
But instead of thanking Julie for looking out for those innocent girls, the staff at the YMCA rushed in and began berating Julie for her "_discriminatory"_ response to the predator.
_It gets worse . . ._
Not only did the YMCA attack Julie for protecting two innocent children, it also permanently banned Julie from swimming at that pool!
_. . . then they launched a sophisticated smear campaign to paint Julie as a bigot and a transphobe in her community._
And without your help, Julie will live the rest of her life banned from the pool she used almost daily to stay active. **[**Will you help Julie today by making an urgent tax-deductible donation of $25 or more to help us fight Julie's legal battle against the YMCA and the City of Port Townsend in court?**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=c205e8b1d4ce45298a79b481e07b9cb8&_e=ZDY5mQ-yWEtsxRGseQIFlcSLkpqdKe1JkMHYl0jdzEy2Bp6oQY2UhVOL2cwEpiz4gcurtJkIj2KFzXVLig-eC4GBJB6mpocsKpCrCTaw6XLbQXU2i3BFpi9DuFs3MgBwIvbYurMdfSVBrDKgJIk9hwqVQiuJmXxWJGIw8OnQxDxW1LEhtIjOlknk-G8STdGCfSLoFymosOSymdhVBraBaio9FD0CO0EZI5-uG8J7m7vcWw0dLdzXjtHz0JUtatY-t8I7UaVl2JQtQui-eGg0U3D_YAdfgof_ha6_xIyVJZei1qouA7a8kU1LLbdB862u5IP5JSQbfmqGOvEf1IHanf2bcADFq7wWy5UzfI0EaDz3uyd0ZugmKM_hsJK4PVctWxPR1x4-2Ek_lC8ll3RNZg%3D%3D)**
If Americans like you don't stand with Julie today, truth and justice in our country will be gone forever.
That's why the Center for American Liberty is doing everything it can to fight for justice for Julie!
Together with patriots like you, the Center for American Liberty helps everyday citizens beat the radical Left in court!
And now we are taking on the radicals at the YMCA and the City of Port Townsend.

clean_body: Too many children have been victims of the left's evil and radical ideology. Enough is enough.| | | | The radical left is rallying to cancel an 82-year-old grandmother | | | | | | Fellow Conservative,The radical left is rallying to cancel an 82-year-old grandmother for protecting two little girls from a man--who was pretending to be a woman--in the women's locker room. Julie Jaman is an 82-year-old grandmother who's lived in Port Townsend, Washington, for almost forty years. Julie regularly used her local swimming pool that is owned by the City of Port Townsend and operated by the YMCA.After a typical swim at the YMCA pool, Julie went to the women's locker room to shower like she always does.But Julie was surprised to hear a male's voice while she was showering.To her shock, she saw a fully grown man wearing a woman's bathing suit and watching two little girls undress! | Now the radical left is trying to ruin Julie's future because she stood up for those two little girls -- and Julie is relying on your help. The two little girls appeared to be about 4 and 6 years old. Julie believed she was witnessing a predator take advantage of these innocent girls! So Julie did what any grandmother in that situation would do -- she confronted the man and asked him to leave the bathroom! But instead of thanking Julie for looking out for those innocent girls, the staff at the YMCA rushed in and began berating Julie for her "discriminatory" response to the predator. It gets worse . . . Not only did the YMCA attack Julie for protecting two innocent children, it also permanently banned Julie from swimming at that pool! . . . then they launched a sophisticated smear campaign to paint Julie as a bigot and a transphobe in her community. And without your help, Julie will live the rest of her life banned from the pool she used almost daily to stay active. If Americans like you don't stand with Julie today, truth and justice in our country will be gone forever. That's why the Center for American Liberty is doing everything it can to fight for justice for Julie! Together with patriots like you, the Center for American Liberty helps everyday citizens beat the radical Left in court! And now we are taking on the radicals at the YMCA and the City of Port Townsend. Your donation today will send a strong message that we will not be silenced. . . we will not allow the left to erase women and endanger children! Sadly, the well-funded ACLU and other dark left money groups will join the YMCA's side, undoubtedly. With their deep pockets, they can threaten to ruin Julie's life . . . and bully others into silence. But today, you can inspire others to continue sticking up for the most vulnerable and fighting back against the left's derangement. Too many children have been victims of the left's evil and radical ideology. Enough is enough. Thank you for your support. With your help, I know the Center for American Liberty can win this case. | | | Sincerely,Mark Trammell Executive Director & General Counsel | | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- The Center For American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization fighting against growing anti-free speech and anti-civil liberties trends. © The Center for American Liberty | PO Box 200942, Pittsburgh, PA 15251

With your support, we can have a young person at the table.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20241217-1&t=1&akid=1545%2E587540%2EoQ4l81)
Peter, did you see David’s email yesterday? **He is officially running for DNC Vice Chair** – and he’s asking for this team’s support to help power his campaign.
[**Make a $5 contribution to boost David’s campaign for DNC Vice Chair and help Leaders We Deserve elect the next generation of young progressives.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20241217-1?refcode=em20241217-1545&amount=5&refcode2=1545_587540_oQ4l81&akid=1545%2E587540%2EoQ4l81)
**Didn’t get to read David’s original email? Check out his full message below:**
_— Forwarded Message —_
_To: Peter, dpwillis67@gmail.com_
_From: David Hogg_
_Date: December 16, 2024_
Peter, I have a special announcement to make: **I’m running for DNC Vice Chair.**
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20241217-1?refcode=em20241217-1545&amount=5&refcode2=1545_587540_oQ4l81&akid=1545%2E587540%2EoQ4l81)
**[Can you show your early support for my DNC Vice Chair run and for electing the next generation of bold, young progressive elected officials with a $5 split contribution directly to my campaign and Leaders We Deserve right now?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20241217-1?refcode=em20241217-1545&amount=5&refcode2=1545_587540_oQ4l81&akid=1545%2E587540%2EoQ4l81)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20241217-1?amount=5&refcode=em20241217-1545&refcode2=1545_587540_oQ4l81&akid=1545%2E587540%2EoQ4l81)**
**Peter, I’m running for this position because I want to help represent young people** and make sure that we are standing up to the consulting class that increasingly the Democratic Party is representing instead of the working class.
We need to realize that we are increasingly the party of sycophants. We are just surrounding ourselves with people who tell us what we want to hear instead of what we need to hear. More and more, we are surrounding ourselves with paid political consultants who let what donors say to them guide their talking points.
I want to bring fresh new voices to the conversation about where the Democratic Party goes from here. With your support, we can have a young person at the table.
**[If you’re ready for the next generation of leadership – at the Democratic Party and in races across the country – split a donation between my campaign for DNC Vice Chair and Leaders We Deserve right now to power this movement.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20241217-1?refcode=em20241217-1545&amount=5&refcode2=1545_587540_oQ4l81&akid=1545%2E587540%2EoQ4l81)**
As always, thank you for your support!
David Hogg

**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20241217-1&t=2&refcode2=1545_587540_oQ4l81&akid=1545%2E587540%2EoQ4l81)**

| | | Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** is requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America.

The American Founders thought that the proper role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution.

But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench.
## Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?
[YES](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=02b576c5034b4b6cb60e5068656f10eb&_e=EhC7KG-UpHIqTSPvfRTMkAq5MDQVm7MfjZPAFv7R6jVSZZKi_XnWXufZGhqMzKU8V855kGWPRwsIE1uO99UdH11XCe7GwG2A6BWeY3iZ9W36uXOy6QZ07sj-6fyGNYMAzWhPTSh63hk39EzHEgB5ddBuso8HcqrxBRo7uw3Ye495KtFXUSaqmKk6ARbQXvte4tZ1AnpHF6TEB2TWE2unWdvWfwa0AnTGvILB9Nv5bCbtK-j2FNyndNnX4ZueKspuLupdwTd_n-05XqmBb1K0E4j-Gze8yQ3TlzIbqn-G9uq82_XhD13DepVbIir2P0TGmQHpBfIisgmZx-6GK_Lht2q_310WouaFabylsAALYpg6UQ-t3r2WBBIQM8BpDHUoU6clFL-lTKi1WMPPcIMpPw%3D%3D) [NO](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=02b576c5034b4b6cb60e5068656f10eb&_e=EhC7KG-UpHIqTSPvfRTMkAq5MDQVm7MfjZPAFv7R6jVSZZKi_XnWXufZGhqMzKU8V855kGWPRwsIE1uO99UdH11XCe7GwG2A6BWeY3iZ9W36uXOy6QZ07sj-6fyGNYMAzWhPTSh63hk39EzHEgB5ddBuso8HcqrxBRo7uw3Ye495KtFXUSaqmKk6ARbQXvte4tZ1AnpHF6TEB2TWE2unWdvWfwa0AnTGvILB9Nv5bCZH9xTB6lKNG1A59d16OhvOpJ9X8-IgJDSvZP3NtfS1M-IIDzdKxAyJBYdCMLS5NjLjm-PEdGKntuVYXNdbPo-wj15fYUFBvjAltohYsQB_jjuPRwvJkpXgoxhA46qzx3uwk3L7lsAE45EmQctXijJ08cpNIJrUgtuE5npnsAGSHQ%3D%3D) Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to "pack" the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a _Boston Globe_ op-ed: "To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats."

That is why I'm reaching out to you today...

_What is your opinion about the Supreme Court 's role in our constitutional republic? _

Please share your thoughts with me using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** right away.

Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench.

You can easily complete your **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** using this secure link: **[https://info.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=02b576c5034b4b6cb60e5068656f10eb&_e=EhC7KG-UpHIqTSPvfRTMkAq5MDQVm7MfjZPAFv7R6jVSZZKi_XnWXufZGhqMzKU8V855kGWPRwsIE1uO99UdH11XCe7GwG2A6BWeY3iZ9W36uXOy6QZ07sj-6fyGNYMAzWhPTSh63hk39EzHEgB5ddBuso8HcqrxBRo7uw3Ye495KtFXUSaqmKk6ARbQXvte4tZ1AnpHF6TEB2TWE2unWdvWfwa0AnTGvILB9Nv5bCZL8s5W8pNBUmnXcZ-Lbge4OTZpT0W077lkDD_p-KQS_RvbybCO92fSc12-hlltWE58585GiRdBeb95_RSDb-qHHQsvE8RT5EWqteGZ18rrU5XocvF500rl5n6nchLP3m3nOcKoEhAPwMKarCp2NZpgRat-mIJTn6bXI7hHYVDUtg%3D%3D)** Thank you for your time and attention--and for your support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844

| | [](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9vcGVuLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9wdWIvc2hhaGlkYnV0dGFyL3Avd2h5LWRlbW9jcmF0cy1jYW50LWxlYXJuLWxlc3NvbnM_.qDQiWn-kpL5nU9S8ZtBtzixUTEcqmFpVnszv6LEeSfk?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)

| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/shahidbuttar/p/why-democrats-cant-learn-lessons?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

Earlier this month, I published [an article](https://substack.com/redirect/4172d154-237f-4149-9354-ab019152d2c7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) raising an important question summarized in its headline: Are Democrats poised to learn their lessons, or instead continue ignoring them? It examined the Democratic Party's betrayal of labor, working families, and its once defining principles in the service of the careers of politicians.
That analysis concluded with a passing reference to "at least two structural challenges [that] impede Democrats from learning any of these lessons....
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/660bac1a-89a2-4fdb-8e1f-d0d6aeefde4d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
[F]irst...party elites don't care. Election results matter less to them because they respond primarily to other incentives.
The goal for that class of political actors is not to win elections, but rather to raise money and secure paid positions for themselves. And by that standard, Harris' campaign was spectacularly successful, even though it lost at the polls.
[S]econd...even insightful critics of the Democratic Party's self-marginalizing devotion to economic elites have themselves stood on the sidelines in the primary contests that offer the greatest opportunity for their theoretical concerns to find expression."
The same pattern sadly infects most grassroots organizations that claim to stand for visionary change. The most illustrative examples, in my experience, were the Sunrise Movement, Democratic Socialists of America, and the Harvey Milk LGBTQ Democratic Club....Eventually, I watched each network grow weaponized against their stated goals, working to undermine voices doing the hard work that their leaders lacked the independence to support.
This post explains those critiques in greater detail.
### **Democrats co-opted civil society**
When concerns have been expressed about the corporate co-optation of the Democratic Party, they have tended to be musings by voices who have never seen fit to actually challenge Democratic leaders. Pleading with them to change their stripes is a fool's errand.
_Thanks for reading Chronicles of a Dying Empire! You can help inform your friends by sharing this post._
[ Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=153249250&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUzMjQ5MjUwLCJpYXQiOjE3MzQ0ODQwODMsImV4cCI6MTczNzA3NjA4MywiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.PzygO8tcgfxZrWci5a1Fx1UsqgV5iOIKXmFq3qEa6Xw)
For instance, [columnists who rail](https://substack.com/redirect/448af1ad-6f79-4874-b9d4-6f7e2b5ba781?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) against the corruption of party leaders--only to ignore populist grassroots candidates who challenge them--are ultimately as self-indulgent as the officials they decry. There is a mechanism in our country to hold officials accountable, but for elections to function as accountability mechanisms, the press must inform the public about its [alternatives](https://substack.com/redirect/37e03a73-2a31-45bb-8b88-5a5c2993ce1c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
Having won a historic congressional primary only to watch the press ignore our campaign, the general election, our legions of supporters, and then [embrace](https://substack.com/redirect/6ec88c20-7cf0-4c12-ba2f-bea488a03927?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) racialized disinformation fabricated to insulate the Democratic Party's corruption, my experience with the ranks of co-opted "journalists" is one I unfortunately gained first hand. Rather than serve transparency and accountability, journalism in the U.S. today functions mostly as propaganda dedicated to Wall Street, the Pentagon, and the corporate political parties that enable them.
Writers are not the only examples of this problem. Organizations seemingly committed to visionary goals have proven themselves equally co-opted and deferential to the corrupt party leaders who [steered our country into a ditch](https://substack.com/redirect/8693dd2b-b4e4-41f2-a212-14f61105ca9d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
I'm not averse to naming names.
[Every labor union](https://substack.com/redirect/232d5c71-40a4-4a42-a000-30e6bfdfdb14?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that has endorsed corrupt party leaders in contested elections, including those representing low-wage workers like SEIU, has proven complicit in corporate rule. Even unions as seemingly committed to their rank & file as the International Brotherhood of Electrical Workers (IBEW) and the American Federal of State, County, and Municipal Employees (AFSCME) have endorsed oligarchs--even when they duck debates and hide behind racist smear campaigns.
The same pattern sadly infects most grassroots organizations that claim to stand for visionary change. The most illustrative examples, in my experience, were the Sunrise Movement, Democratic Socialists of America (DSA), and the Harvey Milk LGBTQ Democratic Club.
Despite organizing around demands for a Green New Deal, the Sunrise Network was so disengaged that it refused to meet with me, even when I challenged [the central impediment to its supposed goal in Congress](https://substack.com/redirect/9c73e3c0-c642-412b-ade7-cc7d74520ec7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in the 2020 general election on a platform including its publicly declared priorities.
While the Sunrise Movement could be described as either inept, distracted, or politically co-opted, both DSA and the Harvey Milk Club were even worse, revealing true colors at striking odds with their rhetoric. Despite embracing "progressive" and "socialist" goals, both organizations became active sources of racist disinformation [fabricated to secure positions](https://substack.com/redirect/13f54cf0-6345-467c-9497-2ec2ee349162?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) for their leaders in the Democratic Party. The seemingly bizarre fact that [my most intense experience with white supremacy as a Muslim immigrant](https://substack.com/redirect/7f7eac08-24c3-45f0-a9a1-325a98bb5df2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) came at the hands of Bay Area millennials who claim to be progressives and socialists is much of what destroyed my faith in this country and hope for the future.
Eventually, I watched each of those nominally grassroots networks--and any number of others, including over a dozen labor unions--grow weaponized against their stated goals, scheming to undermine voices doing the hard work that their leaders lacked the independence to support.
### **Party elites care more about fundraising than election results**
Too many observers start from the premise that the goal of the Democratic Party is to win elections. The reality is more disturbing, and reflects yet another way that capitalism has eroded democracy in America.
_Chronicles of a Dying Empire is a publication supported by readers, rather than advertisers. To receive new posts,**sign up for a free subscription!** To support my work, please consider becoming a paid subscriber._
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..fWcPa3ySOgrv80jmJVgQKobndotoFvUcJVjlB7RFs7w?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=153249250)
Of course, the recent election should offer Democrats many reasons to [reflect](https://substack.com/redirect/4172d154-237f-4149-9354-ab019152d2c7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) on how they ducked into preventable punches by aligning themselves with a discredited corporate establishment rather than working to meet the needs of working families struggling to survive.
For instance, Democrats have spent the last four years bragging about an economy that left record numbers of Americans in [medical](https://substack.com/redirect/71bf1339-5254-4016-8a75-0fc9e7ad194a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) debt or [student](https://substack.com/redirect/a2cb4fc4-802f-401b-9c13-4aada4015d1c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) debt, confronting housing [instability](https://substack.com/redirect/1df441a6-fb69-411f-8525-63414d8fc6cd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) or outright [homelessness](https://substack.com/redirect/fb6b1660-fdb6-4ac9-bb9c-1944ebea07b3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), and facing a future in which our needs seem not only dire, but also increasingly impossible to meet.
It turns out that telling voters to fear a fascist--while [supporting fascist policies](https://substack.com/redirect/dfc57270-b8ba-4e49-a4c8-c79e6818636f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and ignoring their material conditions--is a recipe for electoral disaster.
None of that is rocket science. But what if every journalist to reflect on the election, and voters who internalize their political perspectives based on those of professional writers, is barking up the wrong tree?
Does the Democratic Party respond to electoral incentives? Does it even have the same goals as candidates and voters?
In fact, the answers to both questions are "No."
Voters, volunteers, and candidates participate in election elections because they are compelled by the opportunity to participate in a political process, to propose better ideas, and to see those ideas into policy. They're motivated by [a shared vision](https://substack.com/redirect/679e6f29-a01d-4141-8375-4b4b9af30e85?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
But the consultants and campaign staff who serve as Democratic party insiders have entirely different incentives. They're not necessarily compelled by either a particular political vision or a generalized commitment to the political process, so much as a commitment to their careers.
The goals shared by candidates, volunteers, and voters--better policy--is not one that campaign professionals share. To campaign professionals, policy is ultimately analogous to a product, and voters to consumers. They essentially construct their positions based on what amounts to a market calculus.
The goal for that class of political actors is not to win elections, but rather to raise money and [secure paid positions](https://substack.com/redirect/a9d33008-bbd8-436c-90b5-09608ffe7365?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) for themselves. And by that standard, Harris' campaign was [spectacularly successful](https://substack.com/redirect/ae575dd9-d2f3-407b-bd86-8bea7daeae8b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), even though it lost at the polls.
Have Democratic party insiders learned anything at all from last month's election? It's a safe bet that they haven't.
They--the consultants, the campaign staff, and the labor leaders supporting corporate Democrats--all got paid, despite Harris losing to Trump.
If it ain't broke, why fix it?

| | **DOGE CAUCUS ✅** It's an exciting time in Washington, D.C. right now! The air is cold but the energy is high.

Why? **Republicans stand ready to deliver an agenda that secures our border, supports our economy and limits the role of the federal government.**

**It's part of the reason I joined the DOGE Caucus - Delivering Outstanding Government Efficiency Caucus (DOGE)** - to eliminate unnecessary and bureaucratic red tape, wasteful spending, and rein in the out-of-control agencies.

**Our federal government should work for the American people, not bloated agencies or bureaucrats. **

If you have ideas or ways to eliminate wasteful spending or cut back red tape, we want to hear from YOU! Send an email to: [DOGE@mail.house.gov](mailto:DOGE@mail.house.gov).

**More work to be done, but always grateful for your ongoing support!**

Juan

clean_body: | | | | | DOGE CAUCUS ✅ It's an exciting time in Washington, D.C. right now! The air is cold but the energy is high. Why? Republicans stand ready to deliver an agenda that secures our border, supports our economy and limits the role of the federal government. It's part of the reason I joined the DOGE Caucus - Delivering Outstanding Government Efficiency Caucus (DOGE) - to eliminate unnecessary and bureaucratic red tape, wasteful spending, and rein in the out-of-control agencies. Our federal government should work for the American people, not bloated agencies or bureaucrats. If you have ideas or ways to eliminate wasteful spending or cut back red tape, we want to hear from YOU! Send an email to: mailto:DOGE@mail.house.gov. subject: It's getting hard to hold back this evil
body:
I know it may sound crazy to you but in today's taxpayer-funded schools, teachers and counselors encourage young children to socially "transition" at school and then facilitate the "transition" by giving children new names and even giving them new clothes so they can dress as the opposite sex.| |

---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative,
---
| | I'm writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.Actually, in my case, it's a slippery _slide_. My name is Riley Gaines and I'm the University of Kentucky swimmer who had to compete against a fully intact 6'4" _male_ swimmer dressed in a women's bathing suit.And after he stole the victory I had worked for my entire life, I had to go back to the women's locker room and undress out of my wet bathing suit while he did the same next to me.
---
| [](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=228d49649b9a434886a0c6d0f1e59ceb&_e=2mPwmKtU8vZF819JF3dmYGuCvzRtxQ_mZhK9p58EzJ1iD9sMnXU3sCG27Z_6_YLGh-eZi8LOWTzZhLwb-imYAEmSB9CA8-C9W42XSO5HijmcGfA7bq3T7SK9Q9lCHufTGbuDQY9IxJIWFi_pRtAn3V3QoP9d8TAk9FQmIHAgxOkLw2031mWSpQ91LqdXdvH2y9_saHAquIMpqcFUyCkH7iHUC9YIvgM6XvzV0W79Ej97ntZIyskaAOOeg5CA33XJwlpXItPo_qKAmIMLkGHWhsKco1k3-fm70X26mDx46LvSEahjbpNDb3XgSvrf5CGoeO7_i0yrjBdVX8AsxvBDWemChio8U_kGQmSJ4g4YGlSIZRRzbIahTMByOKnfaQFtqo3DtytWeptKUi24aVN1Og%3D%3D)
---
| | I know the images I'm bringing up are horrible. But please don't stop reading -- because God-fearing, faith-filled people like you and me have a job to do today. We can't retreat into our homes and hope our government's evil culture just passes us by. **[That's why I'm asking you to stand with me today -- before it's too late.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=228d49649b9a434886a0c6d0f1e59ceb&_e=2mPwmKtU8vZF819JF3dmYGuCvzRtxQ_mZhK9p58EzJ1iD9sMnXU3sCG27Z_6_YLGh-eZi8LOWTzZhLwb-imYAEmSB9CA8-C9W42XSO5HijmcGfA7bq3T7SK9Q9lCHufTGbuDQY9IxJIWFi_pRtAn3V3QoP9d8TAk9FQmIHAgxOkLw2031mWSpQ91LqdXdvH2y9_saHAquIMpqcFUyCkH7iHUC9YIvgM6XvzV0W79Ej97ntZIyskaAOOeg5CA33XJrxD8pjPcL74gCPSrC0PoTOxyf7hAfWCJAmCEHV04-i4gziCFLI9iEocrkRkB9ZJsdRGMAYRemsEDtdLYFRqmBy5dvIVf6r23xu46w-wxteMashs-LvqbDde_-dU83Gqxy-ng3oJvlE2XktcvMcK2IQ%3D%3D)** My fellow conservative, you know this slippery slide.It's the same one you got pushed down when the Left told you abortion was going to be "safe, legal, and rare."_Now abortion is a "right" and "women’s healthcare." And if you don’t support it up until the moment of birth, you must "hate women."_ It's the same slippery slide you got pushed down when the Left told you limiting gay couples to civil unions was "mean." You were told, "They just want to use the word "marriage" like everyone else. It's just a word."_Now if you don't fully embrace a homosexual lifestyle by displaying rainbows and celebrating gay pride, you're a "hate-filled bigot."_ Enough with their lies. We have Truth on our side. And we need to start acting like it.**God created man. And God created woman. It isn't any more complicated than that.** Letting men believe they are women... letting girls believe they are boys... is a bold-faced rejection of God’s truth. And if we give this deranged movement one more inch, a year from now when you're forced by law to call boys "she"... when it becomes normal for kids to be taken away from parents who oppose this evil... I don't want you looking back with regret wishing you had done something when you still had a chance.**Your chance is right now -- and right by my side.** **[Please stand with me against the radical transgender movement by making an urgent tax-deductible donation today -- before it's too late.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=228d49649b9a434886a0c6d0f1e59ceb&_e=2mPwmKtU8vZF819JF3dmYGuCvzRtxQ_mZhK9p58EzJ1iD9sMnXU3sCG27Z_6_YLGh-eZi8LOWTzZhLwb-imYAEmSB9CA8-C9W42XSO5HijmcGfA7bq3T7SK9Q9lCHufTGbuDQY9IxJIWFi_pRtAn3V3QoP9d8TAk9FQmIHAgxOkLw2031mWSpQ91LqdXdvH2y9_saHAquIMpqcFUyCkH7iHUC9YIvgM6XvzV0W79Ej97ntZIyskaAOOeg5CA33XJ60qocic78N1PsiIVd8mePBo4nMc6TZk4-aPO90BRFO9X1qkL4hVhP-YG42RSherehjPRnvm5AV2tJJ3L7j9pKw3IJ-A9ussWZLa7VG8rrCq_allPaGEberW6aaiViiUHrjHwFfBFPPqqj9yw4yy_9g%3D%3D) ** Maybe you're thinking like so many, "Riley, adults are free to do whatever they want. And children should be kept away from this evil by their parents."I agree this problem would have less traction if parents just said, "No."
---
>> But parents in MD had their child taken away because they refused to let their son transition to a "girl." >> Parents in Vermont are seeing their foster care licenses revoked because they admit they would not help a child who may be assigned to their home get puberty blockers or have sex change surgery.>> Parents in California got themselves elected to the school board, passed guidelines to protect their children from the transgender movement, and now the state of California is suing them. >> And Illinois is considering a bill that would change the definition of "child abuse" to include parents who oppose puberty blocking drugs and sex change operations.
---
The radical transgender movement has parents backed into a corner. But when I'm speaking around the country, I meet so many seniors who say, "I wish someone had told me about this sooner." The good news is that right now, you still have a chance to help me stop the radical transgender movement before they push us down their slippery slide.And today I'm writing you on behalf of a group that is doing more work to block the transgender movement than anyone I know. **It's the legal non-profit the Center for American Liberty.** **[And your tax-deductible gift today is going straight to help them.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=228d49649b9a434886a0c6d0f1e59ceb&_e=2mPwmKtU8vZF819JF3dmYGuCvzRtxQ_mZhK9p58EzJ1iD9sMnXU3sCG27Z_6_YLGh-eZi8LOWTzZhLwb-imYAEmSB9CA8-C9W42XSO5HijmcGfA7bq3T7SK9Q9lCHufTGbuDQY9IxJIWFi_pRtAn3V3QoP9d8TAk9FQmIHAgxOkLw2031mWSpQ91LqdXdvH2y9_saHAquIMpqcFUyCkH7iHUC9YIvgM6XvzV0W79Ej97ntZIyskaAOOeg5CA33XJNLfLbJj5sGwgCsyHNiyGF_BpwzYARDFwT2tsZBCy-lyAygQ3dBsX0kUnssED1_1VW-UubEArDzDD6Ewc5ujXeiDmeGbI8-9STKr_T4CAOVbIDGQH5CgNTMuSAugs3xEBAaN735AVojO576JptdM90A%3D%3D)** With the help of patriots like you, the _Center for American Liberty_ fights the transgender movement _in the courts_ because that’s the only way to stop them. And the _Center for American Liberty_ is attacking this evil from all sides with their comprehensive three-pronged approach.
---
**#1. They're fighting radical schools**.
---
I know it may sound crazy to you but in today's taxpayer-funded schools, teachers and counselors _encourage_ young children to socially "transition" at school and then facilitate the "transition" by giving children new names and even giving them new clothes so they can dress as the opposite sex.And they keep it all a secret from parents! The _Center for American Liberty_ is taking these radicals to court in multiple cases. And they already have one major win! **[When you make your tax-deductible gift today](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=228d49649b9a434886a0c6d0f1e59ceb&_e=2mPwmKtU8vZF819JF3dmYGuCvzRtxQ_mZhK9p58EzJ1iD9sMnXU3sCG27Z_6_YLGh-eZi8LOWTzZhLwb-imYAEmSB9CA8-C9W42XSO5HijmcGfA7bq3T7SK9Q9lCHufTGbuDQY9IxJIWFi_pRtAn3V3QoP9d8TAk9FQmIHAgxOkLw2031mWSpQ91LqdXdvH2y9_saHAquIMpqcFUyCkH7iHUC9YIvgM6XvzV0W79Ej97ntZIyskaAOOeg5CA33XJW9SAjrvl6xRdv9J8HUadIUNv0aPXvbybnTPZCyvp7RRyhCEJ8QQKhcXSazxgfC1T7Vu-iJhz6fDj2U43PnNrYWkIm18f-kRdFA_bPIFjCZEEXaTWDxyBXK-0E-Cgs_7caLVndwFv7IvPUg-T4OfhlQ%3D%3D), **you're making sure PARENTS have the final word in guiding their children -- not school radicals!
---
**#2. They're fighting radical doctors.**
---
There are doctors who mutilate children for profit in the name of transgender "care." They use their "expertise" to convince _even_ _conservative_ _parents_ that if they oppose "transition," their child will commit suicide.Then these doctors pump children full of dangerous puberty blockers and perform gruesome surgeries to remove children's healthy breasts and other parts. Maybe you've seen a girl named Chloe Cole on Fox News. In a landmark case, the _Center for American Liberty_ is helping her sue the radical doctors and hospital that gave her a double mastectomy at age 15. **[**When you make your tax-deductible gift today**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=228d49649b9a434886a0c6d0f1e59ceb&_e=2mPwmKtU8vZF819JF3dmYGuCvzRtxQ_mZhK9p58EzJ1iD9sMnXU3sCG27Z_6_YLGh-eZi8LOWTzZhLwb-imYAEmSB9CA8-C9W42XSO5HijmcGfA7bq3T7SK9Q9lCHufTGbuDQY9IxJIWFi_pRtAn3V3QoP9d8TAk9FQmIHAgxOkLw2031mWSpQ91LqdXdvH2y9_saHAquIMpqcFUyCkH7iHUC9YIvgM6XvzV0W79Ej97ntZIyskaAOOeg5CA33XJ8D_5-FN95gFuqRYdBsQXm2_jY3gNlY-zpwNxKirD01VAqWj73FuldmYPznmym1jdkqQ8ZD5LNJabMUO_Xr9bqkUMnahiyXktZCwPLbk_IElvSgcU8rWhkVpsOoxfSRjrC9c-RRFilOlhdKXc3TSe0Q%3D%3D)** , you're helping Chloe and the _Center for American Liberty_ make sure this never happens to another child!
---
**#3. They're fighting for _your_ right to speak out against this evil.**
---
Fighting for Freedom of Speech is one of the _Center for American Liberty's_ specialties and they've notched plenty of victories in this space. Their next one is going to be fighting for an 82-year-old grandmother who got banned for life from the YMCA.This grandma raised the alarm that a grown man dressed in a women's bathing suit was in the women's locker room "helping" two little girls get ready to use the bathroom.And she was the one punished!**[**When you make your tax-deductible gift today**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=228d49649b9a434886a0c6d0f1e59ceb&_e=2mPwmKtU8vZF819JF3dmYGuCvzRtxQ_mZhK9p58EzJ1iD9sMnXU3sCG27Z_6_YLGh-eZi8LOWTzZhLwb-imYAEmSB9CA8-C9W42XSO5HijmcGfA7bq3T7SK9Q9lCHufTGbuDQY9IxJIWFi_pRtAn3V3QoP9d8TAk9FQmIHAgxOkLw2031mWSpQ91LqdXdvH2y9_saHAquIMpqcFUyCkH7iHUC9YIvgM6XvzV0W79Ej97ntZIyskaAOOeg5CA33XJIm4_RPtRGQARdB31HyeFXqVdDR1ZyW2X56IWkWZ6RoER1JFnZ3X1JDf_uA3thrWjjkmCcJTPpHLKBJlQgxNVoF-f4DNvWWJ9Ec-HjOQd2OFCoMdXjTzrgIiu1jTS6yjfowievUJ1Kh7ZHT7WzSiqwA%3D%3D)** , you're helping the _Center for American Liberty_ protect every American's right to speak out against this evil! I know you'd probably love to fund an entire court case on your own after all I've told you.**[But all I'm asking you to do is make a tax-deductible gift of $30, $50, $75, $100 or even $250 or more today -- before it's too late.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=228d49649b9a434886a0c6d0f1e59ceb&_e=2mPwmKtU8vZF819JF3dmYGuCvzRtxQ_mZhK9p58EzJ1iD9sMnXU3sCG27Z_6_YLGh-eZi8LOWTzZhLwb-imYAEmSB9CA8-C9W42XSO5HijmcGfA7bq3T7SK9Q9lCHufTGbuDQY9IxJIWFi_pRtAn3V3QoP9d8TAk9FQmIHAgxOkLw2031mWSpQ91LqdXdvH2y9_saHAquIMpqcFUyCkH7iHUC9YIvgM6XvzV0W79Ej97ntZIyskaAOOeg5CA33XJ2EI6ETfKE8nJEllyu02Au2bDN5Tqjl_NP_jcfsFCxZ376k7tMALo8MDRpqnWhL1ytXAfCQvUxiD_I0CdWmecGmCg_EL4Virfs0C-n3-baZm_aa7d44-qRjQ2XqEiZVcy2CFPsNn0HlXYvHrtQ6TVHA%3D%3D)** Please donate whatever amount is right for you whether it's smaller or larger. _The Center for American Liberty_ needs and appreciates every dollar that comes in.And because I believe so strongly in the work they're doing -- and because they are one of the few groups who've stood shoulder-to-shoulder with me in this fight... I**t will be my honor to send you my new book _Swimming Against the Current: Fighting for Common Sense in a World That's Lost Its Mind_ as my free gift** **[**when you donate $100 or more to the Center for American Liberty.**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=228d49649b9a434886a0c6d0f1e59ceb&_e=2mPwmKtU8vZF819JF3dmYGuCvzRtxQ_mZhK9p58EzJ1iD9sMnXU3sCG27Z_6_YLGh-eZi8LOWTzZhLwb-imYAEmSB9CA8-C9W42XSO5HijmcGfA7bq3T7SK9Q9lCHufTGbuDQY9IxJIWFi_pRtAn3V3QoP9d8TAk9FQmIHAgxOkLw2031mWSpQ91LqdXdvH2y9_saHAquIMpqcFUyCkH7iHUC9YIvgM6XvzV0W79Ej97ntZIyskaAOOeg5CA33XJjkH0w9AJHQ5AWqBP6qa7FPnRvIbkEdlYrhYzIhqZELrr00uSep_QA-dVk5uvPMOVrhvBk7e04BCFJWCOmkaWAnuKLExkmVnuQ9dU2ZxanrL_rBH4gDfaRXHDd3YpMbTmOCG-2AzR_hb7NZlAMxp3FQ%3D%3D)** Before I go, please let me share one last thought with you.Every morning as a competitive swimmer, I would get up and think of this verse: _For I consider that the sufferings of the present time are not worthy to be compared to the glory that is about to be revealed to us. Romans 8:18_ I applied it to my swimming: work hard now and wins come later. But now I see that God has a much bigger plan for my life just as He does for yours.Thank you for reading my letter all the way to the end. I'm praying for you, and I hope you'll pray for me too.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Riley Gaines
---
|
---
| | P.S. **[**Please follow this link to make your tax-deductible donation and let me know if you can help the Center for American Liberty defeat the radical transgender movement.**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=228d49649b9a434886a0c6d0f1e59ceb&_e=2mPwmKtU8vZF819JF3dmYGuCvzRtxQ_mZhK9p58EzJ1iD9sMnXU3sCG27Z_6_YLGh-eZi8LOWTzZhLwb-imYAEmSB9CA8-C9W42XSO5HijmcGfA7bq3T7SK9Q9lCHufTGbuDQY9IxJIWFi_pRtAn3V3QoP9d8TAk9FQmIHAgxOkLw2031mWSpQ91LqdXdvH2y9_saHAquIMpqcFUyCkH7iHUC9YIvgM6XvzV0W79Ej97ntZIyskaAOOeg5CA33XJI_clLmEltp0msMEkwoBNvxHyHt79ObU-xxJ1gy6STNURGazhwP0l__8fXXIFOtz-MDLVmfTXVvSMUv2K1I6Q0x24X6dEryUPL_Ymp4v8K11C1E24a7ZXc9WQZRYPEfsozWb7SU6X4YZmxp4XqQyovw%3D%3D)** God made man and God made woman. The attempts to deny those basic truths, are attempts to deny the truth of God. Your help is so critical to the _Center for American Liberty's_ work, **[when you donate $100 or more, as my personal "Thank You," I'll send you my new book,_Swimming Against the Current: Fighting for Common Sense in a World That's Lost Its Mind_ for free.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=228d49649b9a434886a0c6d0f1e59ceb&_e=2mPwmKtU8vZF819JF3dmYGuCvzRtxQ_mZhK9p58EzJ1iD9sMnXU3sCG27Z_6_YLGh-eZi8LOWTzZhLwb-imYAEmSB9CA8-C9W42XSO5HijmcGfA7bq3T7SK9Q9lCHufTGbuDQY9IxJIWFi_pRtAn3V3QoP9d8TAk9FQmIHAgxOkLw2031mWSpQ91LqdXdvH2y9_saHAquIMpqcFUyCkH7iHUC9YIvgM6XvzV0W79Ej97ntZIyskaAOOeg5CA33XJ3CkiNY5wz5spW0QFXzS4I5ZlwXAYyZpv-oWARF969txHfhf4wUGOWeenfG2dBlGNb7BmExbHvt3J61ity6HzmHJXb9xUIGttZWtjhJofbrgA4196NmXBK4HK87L-rPq6e8MuXe2eUBo63wVfWKhCUQ%3D%3D)** Please hurry. It's getting hard to hold back this evil without you. I don't want you to look back a year from now and say, "I wish I had done something when I had the chance."

clean_body: I know it may sound crazy to you but in today's taxpayer-funded schools, teachers and counselors encourage young children to socially "transition" at school and then facilitate the "transition" by giving children new names and even giving them new clothes so they can dress as the opposite sex.| | | | I’m writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope. | | | | | | Dear Fellow Conservative, | | I'm writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.Actually, in my case, it's a slippery slide. My name is Riley Gaines and I'm the University of Kentucky swimmer who had to compete against a fully intact 6'4" male swimmer dressed in a women's bathing suit.And after he stole the victory I had worked for my entire life, I had to go back to the women's locker room and undress out of my wet bathing suit while he did the same next to me. | | | I know the images I'm bringing up are horrible. But please don't stop reading -- because God-fearing, faith-filled people like you and me have a job to do today. We can't retreat into our homes and hope our government's evil culture just passes us by. My fellow conservative, you know this slippery slide.It's the same one you got pushed down when the Left told you abortion was going to be "safe, legal, and rare."Now abortion is a "right" and "women’s healthcare." And if you don’t support it up until the moment of birth, you must "hate women." It's the same slippery slide you got pushed down when the Left told you limiting gay couples to civil unions was "mean." You were told, "They just want to use the word "marriage" like everyone else. It's just a word."Now if you don't fully embrace a homosexual lifestyle by displaying rainbows and celebrating gay pride, you're a "hate-filled bigot." Enough with their lies. We have Truth on our side. And we need to start acting like it.God created man. And God created woman. It isn't any more complicated than that. Letting men believe they are women... letting girls believe they are boys... is a bold-faced rejection of God’s truth. And if we give this deranged movement one more inch, a year from now when you're forced by law to call boys "she"... when it becomes normal for kids to be taken away from parents who oppose this evil... I don't want you looking back with regret wishing you had done something when you still had a chance.Your chance is right now -- and right by my side. Maybe you're thinking like so many, "Riley, adults are free to do whatever they want. And children should be kept away from this evil by their parents."I agree this problem would have less traction if parents just said, "No." > But parents in MD had their child taken away because they refused to let their son transition to a "girl." >> Parents in Vermont are seeing their foster care licenses revoked because they admit they would not help a child who may be assigned to their home get puberty blockers or have sex change surgery.>> Parents in California got themselves elected to the school board, passed guidelines to protect their children from the transgender movement, and now the state of California is suing them. >> And Illinois is considering a bill that would change the definition of "child abuse" to include parents who oppose puberty blocking drugs and sex change operations. The radical transgender movement has parents backed into a corner. But when I'm speaking around the country, I meet so many seniors who say, "I wish someone had told me about this sooner." The good news is that right now, you still have a chance to help me stop the radical transgender movement before they push us down their slippery slide.And today I'm writing you on behalf of a group that is doing more work to block the transgender movement than anyone I know. It's the legal non-profit the Center for American Liberty. With the help of patriots like you, the Center for American Liberty fights the transgender movement in the courts because that’s the only way to stop them. And the Center for American Liberty is attacking this evil from all sides with their comprehensive three-pronged approach. #1. They're fighting radical schools. I know it may sound crazy to you but in today's taxpayer-funded schools, teachers and counselors encourage young children to socially "transition" at school and then facilitate the "transition" by giving children new names and even giving them new clothes so they can dress as the opposite sex.And they keep it all a secret from parents! The Center for American Liberty is taking these radicals to court in multiple cases. And they already have one major win! , you're making sure PARENTS have the final word in guiding their children -- not school radicals! #2. They're fighting radical doctors. There are doctors who mutilate children for profit in the name of transgender "care." They use their "expertise" to convince even conservative parents that if they oppose "transition," their child will commit suicide.Then these doctors pump children full of dangerous puberty blockers and perform gruesome surgeries to remove children's healthy breasts and other parts. Maybe you've seen a girl named Chloe Cole on Fox News. In a landmark case, the Center for American Liberty is helping her sue the radical doctors and hospital that gave her a double mastectomy at age 15. , you're helping Chloe and the Center for American Liberty make sure this never happens to another child! #3. They're fighting for your right to speak out against this evil. Fighting for Freedom of Speech is one of the Center for American Liberty's specialties and they've notched plenty of victories in this space. Their next one is going to be fighting for an 82-year-old grandmother who got banned for life from the YMCA.This grandma raised the alarm that a grown man dressed in a women's bathing suit was in the women's locker room "helping" two little girls get ready to use the bathroom.And she was the one punished! , you're helping the Center for American Liberty protect every American's right to speak out against this evil! I know you'd probably love to fund an entire court case on your own after all I've told you. Please donate whatever amount is right for you whether it's smaller or larger. The Center for American Liberty needs and appreciates every dollar that comes in.And because I believe so strongly in the work they're doing -- and because they are one of the few groups who've stood shoulder-to-shoulder with me in this fight... It will be my honor to send you my new book Swimming Against the Current: Fighting for Common Sense in a World That's Lost Its Mind as my free gift Before I go, please let me share one last thought with you.Every morning as a competitive swimmer, I would get up and think of this verse: For I consider that the sufferings of the present time are not worthy to be compared to the glory that is about to be revealed to us. Romans 8:18 I applied it to my swimming: work hard now and wins come later. But now I see that God has a much bigger plan for my life just as He does for yours.Thank you for reading my letter all the way to the end. I'm praying for you, and I hope you'll pray for me too. Sincerely, | | Riley Gaines | | | P.S. God made man and God made woman. The attempts to deny those basic truths, are attempts to deny the truth of God. Your help is so critical to the Center for American Liberty's work, Please hurry. It's getting hard to hold back this evil without you. I don't want you to look back a year from now and say, "I wish I had done something when I had the chance." | | | | | | | ---|---|--- The Center For American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization fighting against growing anti-free speech and anti-civil liberties trends. © The Center for American Liberty | PO Box 200942, Pittsburgh, PA 15251

body:

---
**FACT:** **Washington, D.C. lacks full representation in Congress,** despite its residents paying more taxes per capita than _any other state!_

**FACT:** **Data shows D.C. statehood would virtually GUARANTEE 2 more Democratic U.S. Senators** — reducing the GOP’s narrow majority!

**FACT:** **Republicans are using their power to launch all-out ATTACKS to stop D.C. statehood in its tracks.** _We have to stop them!_
[The BEST way we can help pass D.C. Statehood is by showing massive grassroots support! So we’re launching an urgent 5,000 supporter goal: Rush $7 NOW to join our fight! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85520?t=8&akid=18245%2E878179%2EV-KeCG)
**GOAL: 5,000 SUPPORTERS | DEADLINE: _TOMORROW @ MIDNIGHT_**
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Together we can do this,

_– The Voter Protection Project_
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=18245%2E878179%2EV-KeCG). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=18245%2E878179%2EV-KeCG).**

name: Yvette Martinez
subject: personal recap for you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the California Democratic Party | www
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-footer?refcode=header&amount=5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-footer?refcode=header&amount=5]
Dear friends,
In the 2024 election cycle, California Democrats focused on securing pivotal congressional seats in the United States House of Representatives while protecting supermajorities in the State Legislature.
Through strategic year-round organizing, coalition building and collective effort, our party achieved significant success, winning four out of six targeted races, including three critical Red-to-Blue seat flips.
We have every intention of keeping our year-round organizing going into the future. But that means we need to maintain our operations, which requires raising money for our 2025 Fund. I know many of you have been extremely generous in the last election, but if you’re able, will you consider donating $ or more today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-dec24?refcode=&amount=]
CHIP IN $ >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-dec24?&refcode=&amount=]As a quick recap: The Democratic candidates who emerged victorious in competitive Congressional districts are:
✓ Adam Gray in CA-13 , defeating incumbent Republican Rep. John Duarte
✓ George Whitesides in CA-27 , securing a win over incumbent Republican Mike Garcia
✓ Derek Tran in the CA-45 , beating Republican Michelle Steel
✓ Dave Min in the CA-47 , defeating Republican incumbent Scott Baugh
These victories didn’t fall out of the sky. They were made possible because of donors like you who invested in the *foundations* of our programs, long before November 5, 2024.
Because of early investments we were able to hire organizers way back in 2023, open regional offices sooner than ever, and lay the groundwork for big wins in a night that was otherwise disappointing for Democrats.
That’s why I am reaching out, to kindly ask if you’d renew your support for our 2025 Fund. We can’t just rollover and let Donald Trump steamroll us. We have to keep mobilizing and organizing. Will you make a donation today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-dec24?refcode=&amount=]
CHIP IN $ >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-dec24?&refcode=&amount=]

CHIP IN $ >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-dec24?&refcode=&amount=]
CHIP IN $ >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-dec24?&refcode=&amount=]With Republicans now controlling the White House and both chambers of Congress, California stands at the forefront of leading the way in driving economic growth, creating good-paying jobs, lowering the cost of living, and protecting our fundamental values. Together, we must fight for the future.
Yours,
- Yvette
Executive Director
CADEM.org

DONATE » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-footer?refcode=&amount=20.24]
Our Democratic leaders are working hard to make California a better place to live. From fighting for good-paying jobs, combating climate change, to expanding healthcare access so all Californians can lead safe, healthy, prosperous lives — California’s Democratic leaders turn progressive ideas into meaningful action.

We rely on email to communicate with supporters like you and conduct the business of the California Democratic Party, but if you wish to receive only our most important emails, let us know here to sign up for fewer emails. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/60txJAHUg0OznGGaWVwO_A2]

name: Newt Gingrich
subject: A full audit
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
This is what mattered most...

Friend:

After such a resounding VICTORY for not only President Trump, but also for Republicans in both chambers of Congress, I've decided to work hand-in-hand with the National Republican Senatorial Committee to **[audit](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zcj354a2lc16eavmitfcolbhlcjplaenctn2s7gg_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cli66o31clh2bs)** the 2024 election and uncover __exactly__ what led us to such a landslide victory.

Early reports and investigation indicate that one of the BIGGEST factors in this election - particularly in battleground Senate races - was, quite simply, _money_.

"...all-time record set this year in Ohio - $421 million, and likely closer to a half-billion once the final bills come in."
[Source: _Cronkite News_]

_But when all is said and done, I believe that our audit will clearly show the _single_ _most_ _important_ factor to our victories were the TOP issues for grassroots voters like YOU._

**[Which is why as the final piece of our Official 2024 Audit, I'm counting on _YOU_ to complete this survey before the submission window closes TONIGHT at 11:59 P.M.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zdqqnthm9r8rglo6mugdtqre8j8p8reig952ru2o_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cli66o31clh2bs)

name: Hillsdale College via Trump News HQ
subject: Who rules whom?
body:
The Constitution of “We the People” is being replaced by an elite, out-of-touch, and unaccountable administrative state that rules without the consent of American citizens.

This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | |
---
| | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zvdfo2cjdk7blp69bqg902arllpia4g2inlia0uo_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cli66o31clh2bs)
---
| | | Dear Fellow American, Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its [**National Referendum on the Administrative State**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zq3n4shphkmrpplfn0v34nia6se7iok1gkt9it60_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cli66o31clh2bs).

Responding will only take a few minutes. Your input as an informed patriot is needed right away...because **our country is facing a constitutional crisis**.

It's a crisis that involves a fundamental political question: **who rules whom?**

The Constitution established a limited government in which the **people** ruled through their elected officials. Under this form of government, America became the freest and most prosperous nation in history.

Today, however, our constitutional system is one that increasingly exists in name only. **The Constitution of "We the People" is being replaced by an elite, out-of-touch, and unaccountable administrative state that rules without the consent of American citizens.** This means we live in an era of growing bureaucratic despotism, manifested in an administrative state that bypasses the Constitution, rejects the separation of powers, and replaces the rule of law with regulations.

**But we can 't just TALK about the problem. We also have to TAKE ACTION--to DO SOMETHING about it, while there's still time to save our country. **

That is why I'm writing to you today.

Hillsdale College is committed to returning to the Constitution of "We the People"--before it's too late.

To do that, I need your input. What are your opinions on this topic--knowing that we can propose SOLUTIONS that will restore liberty?

**Please let me know your thoughts today by answering the National Referendum on the Administrative State using this secure link:**

**[https://info.hillsdale.edu/administrative-state-survey](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z9fd79v8kvahrvdceinbi8hg4epu5qq6tkkltdpo_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cli66o31clh2bs)**

When you send in your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

The rise of the administrative state is a grave threat to our country.

To counter this threat, Hillsdale sponsors several educational outreach efforts--including _Imprimis_ , free online courses, programs on our Washington, D.C., campus, and a growing network of classical K-12 schools and homeschoolers--to teach citizens about the meaning of the Constitution and the importance of our founding principles of liberty.

Your gift of at least $15--or even $25, $35, $50, $100, or more if you're especially motivated to TAKE ACTION--will help us to expand these educational initiatives that are reaching and teaching millions.

Your support of these efforts is essential because Hillsdale refuses to take ONE PENNY of government funding.

So please complete your **National Referendum on the Administrative State** and consider giving your most generous tax-deductible contribution.

Thank you for being on the side of the Constitution and liberty!

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

**P.S.** I look forward to receiving your opinions about what's happening in our nation. And I hope that you can support our work.

So please complete the **National Referendum on the Administrative State** using this secure link:

**[https://info.hillsdale.edu/administrative-state-survey](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zkn7e3alqi1p7jue20ip4gfd3b84kg011i0h8es8_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cli66o31clh2bs)**

As soon as you respond, we will begin your FREE lifetime subscription to _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's digest of liberty that you will receive via email ten times a year. If you'd like, you can also sign up to receive the publication through postal mail.

Educating millions about the Constitution to counter the threat from the administrative state is a monumental task. That's why when you complete your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Thank you for your time and attention--and for your commitment to liberty.
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

Trump Train News
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zdv6cnljd1onaide1d6vkqnlsho7clal5445qasg_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjk5p7atdge5p78d5jmeqjetjjkorrbdt5eer7ashmeop79chl6ujuadf161rn9cdhmir76pr02sqr8d5hmej3fddj4iqu8pj7c3gm9oj246h22sh2s8i6epj1cli66o31clh2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z8k8q1ovmddcleim296fpj3ed0f3t37gvdho3v28_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cli66o31clh2bs)_

[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zcrh414ck59lopj3j8gk9nqhi2tj43j01mhg81b8_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cli66o31clh238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: Newt Gingrich
subject: - - 2024 Audit - -
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
This is what mattered most...

Friend:

After such a resounding VICTORY for not only President Trump, but also for Republicans in both chambers of Congress, I've decided to work hand-in-hand with the National Republican Senatorial Committee to **[audit](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zt8aqein3bq8d4tikm1tjpvt5ba2lcspktp2tgfo_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cli69or6c1h2bs)** the 2024 election and uncover __exactly__ what led us to such a landslide victory.

Early reports and investigation indicate that one of the BIGGEST factors in this election - particularly in battleground Senate races - was, quite simply, _money_.

"...all-time record set this year in Ohio - $421 million, and likely closer to a half-billion once the final bills come in."
[Source: _Cronkite News_]

name: The Accountability Alliance
subject: The Era of Accountability Starts Now.
body:
Take the Survey & Join the Fight!

| | |
* * *
---
|
* * *
---
| | Friend, The last four years were a nightmare. Under Biden and Harris, corruption ran rampant, crises were ignored, and Americans paid the price. From the border to the economy, their failures hurt our country – and no one was ever held accountable.**That changes now.** We’re launching our **_Government Accountability Survey_** to hear directly from conservatives like you. [**_Your voice is critical as we work to hold the government accountable for its catastrophic failures and ensure justice for the American people. >>>_**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zbshgm0bv5g4lj052aluu7lljvqvuoaqje60sav0_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cli69or6clh2bs)

---
| | Thanks to your support, we won the 2024 election. Now, President Trump is building a team of bold, patriotic leaders to restore integrity in Washington. At the forefront of this fight are Elon Musk and Vivek Ramaswamy - **two fearless champions of transparency and accountability.** Together, they’re leading the charge to ensure no failure, no crime, and no corruption goes unpunished. **But even the strongest leaders can’t succeed alone. They need your support now more than ever.** [**_Show your support by taking the survey to let your voice be heard – and by donating to ensure Elon, Vivek, and Republicans have the resources they need to hold the government accountable. >>>_**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zgq4cqtqgrmutq8hapd2le1n8jf80c40v07rduj8_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cli69or6clh2bs)

name: Hillsdale College via ICYMI News
subject: Who rules whom?
body:
The Constitution of “We the People” is being replaced by an elite, out-of-touch, and unaccountable administrative state that rules without the consent of American citizens.

This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | |
---
| | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z5k2fna8hcm9qm2o7vb7qe0e0mig770o7km72qfg_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cli69or1cth2bs)
---
| | | Dear Fellow American, Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its [**National Referendum on the Administrative State**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zivka0i7o7pqiv8578hp28jvbe4tv6n001r54buo_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cli69or1cth2bs).

Responding will only take a few minutes. Your input as an informed patriot is needed right away...because **our country is facing a constitutional crisis**.

It's a crisis that involves a fundamental political question: **who rules whom?**

The Constitution established a limited government in which the **people** ruled through their elected officials. Under this form of government, America became the freest and most prosperous nation in history.

Today, however, our constitutional system is one that increasingly exists in name only. **The Constitution of "We the People" is being replaced by an elite, out-of-touch, and unaccountable administrative state that rules without the consent of American citizens.** This means we live in an era of growing bureaucratic despotism, manifested in an administrative state that bypasses the Constitution, rejects the separation of powers, and replaces the rule of law with regulations.

**But we can 't just TALK about the problem. We also have to TAKE ACTION--to DO SOMETHING about it, while there's still time to save our country. **

That is why I'm writing to you today.

Hillsdale College is committed to returning to the Constitution of "We the People"--before it's too late.

To do that, I need your input. What are your opinions on this topic--knowing that we can propose SOLUTIONS that will restore liberty?

**Please let me know your thoughts today by answering the National Referendum on the Administrative State using this secure link:**

**[https://info.hillsdale.edu/administrative-state-survey](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z7i3rru6jam4qg2hotn3ccpao0nrtir59nac8v40_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cli69or1cth2bs)**

When you send in your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

The rise of the administrative state is a grave threat to our country.

To counter this threat, Hillsdale sponsors several educational outreach efforts--including _Imprimis_ , free online courses, programs on our Washington, D.C., campus, and a growing network of classical K-12 schools and homeschoolers--to teach citizens about the meaning of the Constitution and the importance of our founding principles of liberty.

Your gift of at least $15--or even $25, $35, $50, $100, or more if you're especially motivated to TAKE ACTION--will help us to expand these educational initiatives that are reaching and teaching millions.

Your support of these efforts is essential because Hillsdale refuses to take ONE PENNY of government funding.

So please complete your **National Referendum on the Administrative State** and consider giving your most generous tax-deductible contribution.

Thank you for being on the side of the Constitution and liberty!

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

**P.S.** I look forward to receiving your opinions about what's happening in our nation. And I hope that you can support our work.

So please complete the **National Referendum on the Administrative State** using this secure link:

**[https://info.hillsdale.edu/administrative-state-survey](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zlpct3m643aiiml2da86cnur7cs5210v2fo3raoo_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cli69or1cth2bs)**

As soon as you respond, we will begin your FREE lifetime subscription to _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's digest of liberty that you will receive via email ten times a year. If you'd like, you can also sign up to receive the publication through postal mail.

Educating millions about the Constitution to counter the threat from the administrative state is a monumental task. That's why when you complete your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Thank you for your time and attention--and for your commitment to liberty.
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

ICYMI News
---
_PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zalimu47no1emmopegkl2e49k5g0t00o7eoidj0o_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cli69or1cth238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq9dhkumqb7d9neppqcdtlmuin7djle8r7ccjkm8qjf9v56ngj0trkm6or9djjctg1eddk6ior79hnmmpi9df4cpjm1pb4c1h2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z4okbuf5kfb9s972hojcr5f94s5j8lj6nvou96m0_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cli69or1cth2bs)_

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zkup592lanl0f7qkastkoterh6t1lrqpk0lhnni8_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28pr6c5im8p73c5jm49fg)

name: The Era of Accountability Starts Now.
subject: The Era of Accountability Starts Now.
body:
Take the Survey & Join the Fight!

| | |
* * *
---
|
* * *
---
| | Friend, The last four years were a nightmare. Under Biden and Harris, corruption ran rampant, crises were ignored, and Americans paid the price. From the border to the economy, their failures hurt our country – and no one was ever held accountable.**That changes now.** We’re launching our **_Government Accountability Survey_** to hear directly from conservatives like you. [**_Your voice is critical as we work to hold the government accountable for its catastrophic failures and ensure justice for the American people. >>>_**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3ulpag1sjav9foi7fkll8q93eb5ectdivggr5eo_rp22sh2s8i6epj1clh68ob6chh2bs)

name: Republican Party of Wisconsin
subject: Wisconsin Casts 10 Electoral Votes for President Donald J. Trump and Vice President-Elect JD Vance
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE REPUBLICAN PARTY OF WISCONSIN** NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
[](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-cehddk-didthutlhu-r/) Friend,Today, we made history.Just now, Wisconsin's Presidential Electors proudly cast our state's 10 electoral votes for** President Donald J. Trump** and **Vice President-Elect J.D. Vance!** First of all, THANK YOU for your vote, support, prayers, and hard work. Together, we are sending President Trump back to the White House! Wisconsin played a critical role in President Trump's historic victory. This is only the second time since 1984 that a Republican presidential candidate has won Wisconsin. We are incredibly proud of the work we did which included gains in 68 of 72 counties across the state. [](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-cehddk-didthutlhu-y/) We should enjoy this achievement but our work is not done. _[Chip in today](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-cehddk-didthutlhu-j/)_ to build on the success we've achieved together! [CONTRIBUTE](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-cehddk-didthutlhu-d/) Sincerely, Chairman Brian Schimming | **PAID FOR BY THE REPUBLICAN PARTY OF WISCONSIN** NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. www.WisGOP.org Republican Party of Wisconsin **|** 148 E. name: Not The Bee
subject: We’re Mocking the Left - And Sharing Real News You Won’t Believe!
body:
TheFederalistWire.com

Dear Fellow American,

If you're a fan of The Babylon Bee then you know the staff is
devoid of lefty snowflakes.

And, that means they can find humor in almost anything.

What you might not know is that while we love bringing humor to
life over at The Bee, we also take the current state of our
nation very seriously.

The popularity and success of our sister site - The Babylon Bee
- has allowed my brother, Seth Dillon, the chance to:

Stand up for free speech in front of Congress,

Refuse to back down from his beliefs when threatened on
Twitter (resulting in our friend Elon Musk - a fellow believer in
free speech - purchasing the platform)

Use the incredible following The Babylon Bee amassed
through its satirical articles to launch Not the Bee, where we
share real news stories that sound like satire

Far too many "news" outlets are scared to call out the left for
being liars and tyrants.

While the team over at The Babylon Bee mocks liberal fools with
humor, our team here at Not the Bee allows lefties to create a
mockery of themselves through REAL NEWS stories.

To help us continue publishing the craziest news, videos, and
memes of the week, please join Not the Bee as a Premium
Subscriber today. Your support will allow us to expose TRUTHS
that leftist outlets will never cover.

Subscribe to Not The Bee

The national media can't be trusted, you and I both know that.

And, we both know that "woke" staffers at social media
companies do everything they can to suppress content they
disagree with … namely, anything that makes fun of - or
calls out - the left.

Look no further than the Kamala Harris v. Donald Trump "debate"
on ABC News.

The media is not ashamed to publicly show liberal bias and
claim they're neutral.

"Fact-checkers" who spewed misinformation after the debate even
had the nerve to double down on their lies about Donald Trump
when confronted with the truth.

We're up against a massive lie-filled media machine, which is
why we MUST ensure that TRUTH wins the day. When you join Not the
Bee as a Premium Subscriber, you'll help us make a greater impact
by reaching a larger audience with REAL NEWS.

You'll also gain access to:

Ad-free browsing,

Not the Bee's member forum,

Exclusive subscriber-only content,

Premium podcasts,

Private social posts and groups, and more.

But, most importantly, when you become a Premium Subscriber,
you'll give us the ability to continue bringing the craziest news
stories to light.

While Americans are being inundated with "news" from the lefty
media - who gleefully chat about Kamala's favorite snack choices
while downplaying two assassination attempts on Donald Trump -
Not the Bee's content must be spread far and wide.

Subscribe today and help us to continue publishing REAL NEWS.

Subscribe to Not The Bee

Dan Dillon

Chief Executive Officer

Not the Bee

Not the Bee PO Box 1322, Jupiter, FL 33468

DISCLAIMER
Your privacy is important to us.
It is The Federalist Wire's policy to respect your privacy and
comply with any applicable law and regulation regarding any
personal information we may collect about you, including across
our website, and other sites we own and operate.

TheFederalistWire.com

today@thefederalistwire.com

This is an exciting development, and there's a lot of work to be done to cut the waste.
