name: The Accountability Alliance
subject: The Era of Accountability Starts Now.
body:
Take the Survey & Join the Fight!

| | |
* * *
---
|
* * *
---
| | Friend, The last four years were a nightmare. Under Biden and Harris, corruption ran rampant, crises were ignored, and Americans paid the price. From the border to the economy, their failures hurt our country – and no one was ever held accountable.**That changes now.** We’re launching our **_Government Accountability Survey_** to hear directly from conservatives like you. [**_Your voice is critical as we work to hold the government accountable for its catastrophic failures and ensure justice for the American people. >>>_**](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z8buamhk9q9ps1sttuat8ab1j80dqmvoftvdmq00_rp22sh2s8i6epj1clh6ap72cth2bs)
---
| | [](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zhob94s9avksufcfg206vk30ob1bp2ms2jequen0_rp22sh2s8i6epj1clh6ap72cth2bs)
---
| | | [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zt6svep7lqanrleuc38gu92bkg732h6d71570hj0_rp22sh2s8i6epj1clh6ap72cth2bs)
---
| | Thanks to your support, we won the 2024 election. Now, President Trump is building a team of bold, patriotic leaders to restore integrity in Washington. At the forefront of this fight are Elon Musk and Vivek Ramaswamy - **two fearless champions of transparency and accountability.** Together, they’re leading the charge to ensure no failure, no crime, and no corruption goes unpunished. **But even the strongest leaders can’t succeed alone. They need your support now more than ever.** [**_Show your support by taking the survey to let your voice be heard – and by donating to ensure Elon, Vivek, and Republicans have the resources they need to hold the government accountable. >>>_**](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zp0lhc8fo2m54mbq2tkg9cujo4pjnktsitn6ddr8_rp22sh2s8i6epj1clh6ap72cth2bs)

| | The American people expect justice for all. Together, we can bring it. Thank you, The Accountability Alliance

| John McGuire Appointed to House Armed Services Committee (HASC)
---
| |
---
| Team,

### Peace is best preserved through a strong national defense. We would not have a country without our men and women who keep us safe. I am honored to be appointed to The U.S. House Committee on Armed Services, commonly known as HASC, in the upcoming 119th Congress!
---
| The U.S. House Committee on Armed Services is responsible for funding and [oversight](https://eky6fg9ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001wi_lVANwgXyUmr0R_l7IysT5GvJOn0kYBDUJzeUoZNE2QWMuA5rn_m6THvaWre9VppCakvfjPQz0T-q233sKYnTJzihsWlGVrsh119Pkjm-a6uFstT0OdKXQ-OJ8ipLk09tQjlNycrMHkE3tbpCSodD0GuL45-GJ9Bb4G6EA1Yod6kX2xHmR-7hTmpu8J5Zf&c=oeBMsz1E8klieJ4GgxgTnN-73GaTQpQg5DxT9WR76SqfCs8vnyL3Ig==&ch=7r3J72DIT4IIx3A7OGbgNSnAAE0BZvXUZDGbn5Le30ce9cAwz_0kJw==) of the [Department of Defense](https://eky6fg9ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001wi_lVANwgXyUmr0R_l7IysT5GvJOn0kYBDUJzeUoZNE2QWMuA5rn_m6THvaWre9VAPvfJGb-XlSyAmiUxUjQa-GYv_u0m80SCwi7rkcm4ohZ0S0-uojKWqgEeXhL6gBIfaJM415hPMWlurU-Bdeei19GAY9iy3QQRExHBdTirGgqD9yE34jQL6qG9Ev77fI-RKdjbt52PVyFQUHeegBabA==&c=oeBMsz1E8klieJ4GgxgTnN-73GaTQpQg5DxT9WR76SqfCs8vnyL3Ig==&ch=7r3J72DIT4IIx3A7OGbgNSnAAE0BZvXUZDGbn5Le30ce9cAwz_0kJw==) (DoD) and the [United States Armed Forces](https://eky6fg9ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001wi_lVANwgXyUmr0R_l7IysT5GvJOn0kYBDUJzeUoZNE2QWMuA5rn_m6THvaWre9ViEh2ZsRwIRREVq9MwXG_SPnugWaxlntiFKaVEqj3AN4OZam2f5MUbrnTrMV9ijo5dZ_sfUpB3JktwqNVL0ABZv3FM4MaI6j4uyCNfsa5VrBfcYcr3oQy-fJJZh5K8wVLGXzqvFIjSDI=&c=oeBMsz1E8klieJ4GgxgTnN-73GaTQpQg5DxT9WR76SqfCs8vnyL3Ig==&ch=7r3J72DIT4IIx3A7OGbgNSnAAE0BZvXUZDGbn5Le30ce9cAwz_0kJw==), as well as substantial portions of the [Department of Energy](https://eky6fg9ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001wi_lVANwgXyUmr0R_l7IysT5GvJOn0kYBDUJzeUoZNE2QWMuA5rn_m6THvaWre9VBVoI8t79EuVZFQlsw8CCOeAexb1mZdRuK2mUV2jzDoy2H76EJceio8KFEtlr8rCoT8i6xf9IWyBYf8XxotPDc4KpOqcwPn0WbWJcs5O4W05uKGpYr9zJ4a7tK1e4DgwqvWTj3_gtrMyr-WMXdW5s3w==&c=oeBMsz1E8klieJ4GgxgTnN-73GaTQpQg5DxT9WR76SqfCs8vnyL3Ig==&ch=7r3J72DIT4IIx3A7OGbgNSnAAE0BZvXUZDGbn5Le30ce9cAwz_0kJw==). Its regular legislative product is the [National Defense Authorization Act](https://eky6fg9ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001wi_lVANwgXyUmr0R_l7IysT5GvJOn0kYBDUJzeUoZNE2QWMuA5rn_m6THvaWre9VgSuA0tcCtu9u5ibBIoQVWoPYy6A79HooUBv8A4_4gMkaPJXgpyKxIQ3sHZRHAVj8XEJa9C0rV5TqHBKIV2jCuxQe1XHT5Hi_IA6VSCoq5A2YRi9vKskMXJUPCkYZvXgCZlQ1Pq5sPdh2CO-mNwWysw==&c=oeBMsz1E8klieJ4GgxgTnN-73GaTQpQg5DxT9WR76SqfCs8vnyL3Ig==&ch=7r3J72DIT4IIx3A7OGbgNSnAAE0BZvXUZDGbn5Le30ce9cAwz_0kJw==), which has been passed by Congress and signed into law each year since 1962.
The Armed Services Committee has jurisdiction over defense policy generally, ongoing military operations, the organization and reform of the Department of Defense and Department of Energy, counter-drug programs, acquisition and industrial base policy, technology transfer and export controls, joint interoperability, the Cooperative Threat Reduction program, Department of Energy nonproliferation programs, and detainee affairs and policy.

name: Hillsdale College via Freedom Nation Today
subject: Who rules whom?
body:
The Constitution of “We the People” is being replaced by an elite, out-of-touch, and unaccountable administrative state that rules without the consent of American citizens.

This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | |
---
| | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f913059dad31403eb4a300dfefd68691&_e=3JZ_9auhC4sypQBeUTlDkf1lfK0LbjhG9Y-MsvNR2lxGUbjZpaenSo90EZc6uXsAFGkuuqeYYT7auDM4Hym0ezUggkvpj1XGTOKgRLBBjxEuWPKI7E6tD0HAJGTjNJY2gYjH01AaVePt-s0dfT1D0lXSLvSAsGblS4r_qG0y_0Sgc5WA7cl6Y-y7pbZ_i9QUMs-eoMORXZZwrw-TzSO8KLvFrVCg2YO35oWXK7AjyH0skrMcSz54I4IjEPMbBebN9xH7Pwz5WcxEoHXVV6zyw_1-8bKtAnMd8Uc-He0JNCyxSdlQdjQyMIyrUGIgwwm0FGGtDiQek0cPV6nSdPPHdQqCEncbsFkuik1j-rv19FpvQXTmitRTEbvO-lM3x0mgPnGKZao0mw0vuuNlTdpqxfE9CvoT033SxoPSnvQGdNo%3D)
---
| | | Dear Fellow American, Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its [**National Referendum on the Administrative State**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f913059dad31403eb4a300dfefd68691&_e=3JZ_9auhC4sypQBeUTlDkf1lfK0LbjhG9Y-MsvNR2lxGUbjZpaenSo90EZc6uXsAFGkuuqeYYT7auDM4Hym0ezUggkvpj1XGTOKgRLBBjxEuWPKI7E6tD0HAJGTjNJY2gYjH01AaVePt-s0dfT1D0lXSLvSAsGblS4r_qG0y_0Sgc5WA7cl6Y-y7pbZ_i9QUMs-eoMORXZZwrw-TzSO8KLvFrVCg2YO35oWXK7AjyH0skrMcSz54I4IjEPMbBebN6j6VtKnTTUv9hIMS4v9wFkcnpRyemuoFgfjH1JFgQ_VsklharS1aTANoamaMFO6ls82TK7L2rRtEapCWTppgvdHTchJh2Pwbw0MrnXp1t0EvdStSR6FlJLRPdzEahtyrav02L1ne5HX07iUtbkbJgPzTYAXPVn9JYuwOyrjz6N0%3D).

Responding will only take a few minutes. Your input as an informed patriot is needed right away...because **our country is facing a constitutional crisis**.

It's a crisis that involves a fundamental political question: **who rules whom?**

The Constitution established a limited government in which the **people** ruled through their elected officials. Under this form of government, America became the freest and most prosperous nation in history.

Today, however, our constitutional system is one that increasingly exists in name only. **The Constitution of "We the People" is being replaced by an elite, out-of-touch, and unaccountable administrative state that rules without the consent of American citizens.** This means we live in an era of growing bureaucratic despotism, manifested in an administrative state that bypasses the Constitution, rejects the separation of powers, and replaces the rule of law with regulations.

**But we can 't just TALK about the problem. We also have to TAKE ACTION--to DO SOMETHING about it, while there's still time to save our country. **

That is why I'm writing to you today.

Hillsdale College is committed to returning to the Constitution of "We the People"--before it's too late.

To do that, I need your input. What are your opinions on this topic--knowing that we can propose SOLUTIONS that will restore liberty?

**Please let me know your thoughts today by answering the National Referendum on the Administrative State using this secure link:**

**[https://info.hillsdale.edu/administrative-state-survey](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f913059dad31403eb4a300dfefd68691&_e=3JZ_9auhC4sypQBeUTlDkf1lfK0LbjhG9Y-MsvNR2lxGUbjZpaenSo90EZc6uXsAFGkuuqeYYT7auDM4Hym0ezUggkvpj1XGTOKgRLBBjxEuWPKI7E6tD0HAJGTjNJY2gYjH01AaVePt-s0dfT1D0lXSLvSAsGblS4r_qG0y_0Sgc5WA7cl6Y-y7pbZ_i9QUMs-eoMORXZZwrw-TzSO8KLvFrVCg2YO35oWXK7AjyH0skrMcSz54I4IjEPMbBebNLnBIJEK6xq6BMYxAbW24pWPW635etYIbFuEJKQMzXxle4StMvtBs0CSXxSDvd0SwfylLzte9_AFM5WTyK84ouIq-RI9hcPYhj7WHpKaXYEPEkOEC3Xb2yRtgqgZmBY_1Ph741-U4mVVISWCxs90MdhnZCsk7h7Iwp6hbgQyKVLI%3D)**

When you send in your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

The rise of the administrative state is a grave threat to our country.

To counter this threat, Hillsdale sponsors several educational outreach efforts--including _Imprimis_ , free online courses, programs on our Washington, D.C., campus, and a growing network of classical K-12 schools and homeschoolers--to teach citizens about the meaning of the Constitution and the importance of our founding principles of liberty.

Your gift of at least $15--or even $25, $35, $50, $100, or more if you're especially motivated to TAKE ACTION--will help us to expand these educational initiatives that are reaching and teaching millions.

Your support of these efforts is essential because Hillsdale refuses to take ONE PENNY of government funding.

So please complete your **National Referendum on the Administrative State** and consider giving your most generous tax-deductible contribution.

Thank you for being on the side of the Constitution and liberty!

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

**P.S.** I look forward to receiving your opinions about what's happening in our nation. And I hope that you can support our work.

So please complete the **National Referendum on the Administrative State** using this secure link:

**[https://info.hillsdale.edu/administrative-state-survey](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f913059dad31403eb4a300dfefd68691&_e=3JZ_9auhC4sypQBeUTlDkf1lfK0LbjhG9Y-MsvNR2lxGUbjZpaenSo90EZc6uXsAFGkuuqeYYT7auDM4Hym0ezUggkvpj1XGTOKgRLBBjxEuWPKI7E6tD0HAJGTjNJY2gYjH01AaVePt-s0dfT1D0lXSLvSAsGblS4r_qG0y_0Sgc5WA7cl6Y-y7pbZ_i9QUMs-eoMORXZZwrw-TzSO8KLvFrVCg2YO35oWXK7AjyH0skrMcSz54I4IjEPMbBebNTXL2aq17tTA69sGKx4QMyaJL8kYTNxGxkPirdK6FN6DBjfB6NwuZaKqMR83vV65F_JGCJqH081TAmDWSOogXIVVXNJ8bcBTXaxyhbXrybZ0Q17NEsSMqGOjYgqDeIRvHsMtyAEwl8Z9-OnwRNPc7-MDAauc3vdCs3TLJFWdrjeM%3D)**

As soon as you respond, we will begin your FREE lifetime subscription to _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's digest of liberty that you will receive via email ten times a year. If you'd like, you can also sign up to receive the publication through postal mail.

Educating millions about the Constitution to counter the threat from the administrative state is a monumental task. That's why when you complete your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Thank you for your time and attention--and for your commitment to liberty.

clean_body: The Constitution of “We the People” is being replaced by an elite, out-of-touch, and unaccountable administrative state that rules without the consent of American citizens. This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | | | | | | Dear Fellow American, Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its . Responding will only take a few minutes. Your input as an informed patriot is needed right away...because our country is facing a constitutional crisis. It's a crisis that involves a fundamental political question: who rules whom? The Constitution established a limited government in which the people ruled through their elected officials. Under this form of government, America became the freest and most prosperous nation in history. Today, however, our constitutional system is one that increasingly exists in name only. The Constitution of "We the People" is being replaced by an elite, out-of-touch, and unaccountable administrative state that rules without the consent of American citizens. This means we live in an era of growing bureaucratic despotism, manifested in an administrative state that bypasses the Constitution, rejects the separation of powers, and replaces the rule of law with regulations. But we can 't just TALK about the problem. We also have to TAKE ACTION--to DO SOMETHING about it, while there's still time to save our country. That is why I'm writing to you today. Hillsdale College is committed to returning to the Constitution of "We the People"--before it's too late. To do that, I need your input. What are your opinions on this topic--knowing that we can propose SOLUTIONS that will restore liberty? Please let me know your thoughts today by answering the National Referendum on the Administrative State using this secure link: When you send in your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. The rise of the administrative state is a grave threat to our country. To counter this threat, Hillsdale sponsors several educational outreach efforts--including Imprimis , free online courses, programs on our Washington, D.C., campus, and a growing network of classical K-12 schools and homeschoolers--to teach citizens about the meaning of the Constitution and the importance of our founding principles of liberty. Your gift of at least $15--or even $25, $35, $50, $100, or more if you're especially motivated to TAKE ACTION--will help us to expand these educational initiatives that are reaching and teaching millions. Your support of these efforts is essential because Hillsdale refuses to take ONE PENNY of government funding. So please complete your National Referendum on the Administrative State and consider giving your most generous tax-deductible contribution. Thank you for being on the side of the Constitution and liberty! Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 P.S. I look forward to receiving your opinions about what's happening in our nation. And I hope that you can support our work. So please complete the National Referendum on the Administrative State using this secure link: As soon as you respond, we will begin your FREE lifetime subscription to Imprimis , Hillsdale's digest of liberty that you will receive via email ten times a year. If you'd like, you can also sign up to receive the publication through postal mail. Educating millions about the Constitution to counter the threat from the administrative state is a monumental task. That's why when you complete your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your commitment to liberty. | | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA Freedom Nation Today PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

| | Friend, The last four years were a nightmare. Under Biden and Harris, corruption ran rampant, crises were ignored, and Americans paid the price. From the border to the economy, their failures hurt our country – and no one was ever held accountable.**That changes now.** We’re launching our **_Government Accountability Survey_** to hear directly from conservatives like you. | Peter – you’ve heard of this guy, right? [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tcb64c2d9-768b-4682-982a-40f088fb5c6b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) That’s Tom Homan – you know, the new Director of Homeland Security for Trump? Well, here’s three things you need to know about him:
1. Homan spearheaded the controversial family separation policy under Trump’s first administration.
2. He wants to go further than family separation – he wants to deport ALL immigrants, even if it means deporting their American-born children too.
3. And Homan is vowing to take on Democratic cities and mayors on immigration by telling them to “move out the way” or be prosecuted.

---
| | [FIGHT BACK AGAINST HOMAN →](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta0d3e945-453d-4655-96bb-74f1879f1503/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | | This man is just pure evil, Peter. Just like Trump, Tom Homan only wants to invoke fear, hatred and further division within this country. And we have to support Democrats who will stand up for our immigrant communities, not mass deportation. [We set a goal to fundraise $25,000 by MIDNIGHT to build up our warchest and help Democrats fight back against these extremist MAGA policies that hurt ALL AMERICANS. Will you step up and make a contribution today?](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tac0ad14a-c233-4e4e-afac-82c3bc5d5856/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. name: Gun News USA
subject: The Dollar's Days Are Numbered – Is Your Money Safe?
body:
For decades, America could keep rogue states in check by...
| | | [](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19404/6374453/9a1aa73843785a97beeda4f777e491650b0c3ee8/bb674d27d4e8fd2d62008716135e6b2b0ac91414)
---
| | |
---
_December 18th, 2024_
---
| | |
---
[](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19404/6374453/9a1aa73843785a97beeda4f777e491650b0c3ee8/bb674d27d4e8fd2d62008716135e6b2b0ac91414)
---
For decades, America could keep rogue states in check by freezing their dirty money and locking them out of global trade. But now, China's new 'digital' currency could finally dethrone the dollar... By letting them move BILLIONS in secret, completely outside America's control. Russia, Iran, and North Korea have all joined the crusade to destroy the dollar, and together... **Which now means that:**
* Iran can freely fund terrorist attacks on American soil using money we can't trace or stop...
* North Korea can build MORE nuclear missiles aimed at American cities...
* Russia can bankroll cyber-attacks on our power grid and water supply...
* PLUS: Communist China can strangle our food supply by buying up even more American farmland.

When all is said and done... [This final attack on the dollar is putting your IRA and 401K savings at risk.](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19404/6374453/9a1aa73843785a97beeda4f777e491650b0c3ee8/bb674d27d4e8fd2d62008716135e6b2b0ac91414) But President Trump saw this attack coming... Which is why Trump's IRS is handing out a little-known "IRS Loophole" to help America First patriots like YOU fight back.

name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: Who rules whom?
body:
The Constitution of “We the People” is being replaced by an elite, out-of-touch, and unaccountable administrative state that rules without the consent of American citizens.

This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | |
---
| | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b2a50c71cac04434b3fe3802cc925a66&_e=jDwfQMXYrD2a_vkRwCgzTRD67TzgAI4pX1qrHkXEKulnjOb6w0GrfYNaHeYN_gm-lZjhuMFayUohv4Aupk6vb7f_FMR_WNmTE7IvOLFp1wdAq2AaKE29q5GAkhd_XeaY1mWfXl3xOWQfes1eeCgB_JiShVL61rFHmpVuMsllUwbfnltDvB_gwG4v6JZTo9A1hLWXzxnskFH7_Zlpks-QFZDQNSkMlPXz3HPwQXDCsaadeMcq7F8IjgaBxKYpyTShMi8ZRrWnnIn717F3na-QBjAFfDZNJCpizULbQY51O4BIFa-B_VydlNU1uCZRf2IvhiQsh9gXwqHoXJhmVyPwRsmpco0-83E9L8OOhUeFz2w2QAAk8FWPGBcttGvUm7zrsdTCvQx-JWkNpaRSSRxkYPVoAfWqYCc6PfmnkBeXSuM%3D)
---
| | | Dear Fellow American, Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its [**National Referendum on the Administrative State**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b2a50c71cac04434b3fe3802cc925a66&_e=jDwfQMXYrD2a_vkRwCgzTRD67TzgAI4pX1qrHkXEKulnjOb6w0GrfYNaHeYN_gm-lZjhuMFayUohv4Aupk6vb7f_FMR_WNmTE7IvOLFp1wdAq2AaKE29q5GAkhd_XeaY1mWfXl3xOWQfes1eeCgB_JiShVL61rFHmpVuMsllUwbfnltDvB_gwG4v6JZTo9A1hLWXzxnskFH7_Zlpks-QFZDQNSkMlPXz3HPwQXDCsaadeMcq7F8IjgaBxKYpyTShNaq8wyXpA4iEDH7VBOsGFq95QlzD6NG__9Z6Q-U2seYdjSKSjEVX8rAmyXfiiUTbBTzX9wm4tYb-KrgsmUyhXZEZAQBQOyp46l4uMBFh8sC2peIpgJRb8WKOTVgp2Mswk0LZpXa6vXQaTt8TK0oRFR8B-Ctb36HhI5DnVwimvr8%3D).

Responding will only take a few minutes. Your input as an informed patriot is needed right away...because **our country is facing a constitutional crisis**.

It's a crisis that involves a fundamental political question: **who rules whom?**

The Constitution established a limited government in which the **people** ruled through their elected officials. Under this form of government, America became the freest and most prosperous nation in history.

Today, however, our constitutional system is one that increasingly exists in name only. **The Constitution of "We the People" is being replaced by an elite, out-of-touch, and unaccountable administrative state that rules without the consent of American citizens.** This means we live in an era of growing bureaucratic despotism, manifested in an administrative state that bypasses the Constitution, rejects the separation of powers, and replaces the rule of law with regulations.

**But we can 't just TALK about the problem. We also have to TAKE ACTION--to DO SOMETHING about it, while there's still time to save our country. **

That is why I'm writing to you today.

Hillsdale College is committed to returning to the Constitution of "We the People"--before it's too late.

To do that, I need your input. What are your opinions on this topic--knowing that we can propose SOLUTIONS that will restore liberty?

**Please let me know your thoughts today by answering the National Referendum on the Administrative State using this secure link:**

**[https://info.hillsdale.edu/administrative-state-survey](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b2a50c71cac04434b3fe3802cc925a66&_e=jDwfQMXYrD2a_vkRwCgzTRD67TzgAI4pX1qrHkXEKulnjOb6w0GrfYNaHeYN_gm-lZjhuMFayUohv4Aupk6vb7f_FMR_WNmTE7IvOLFp1wdAq2AaKE29q5GAkhd_XeaY1mWfXl3xOWQfes1eeCgB_JiShVL61rFHmpVuMsllUwbfnltDvB_gwG4v6JZTo9A1hLWXzxnskFH7_Zlpks-QFZDQNSkMlPXz3HPwQXDCsaadeMcq7F8IjgaBxKYpyTShBkIErIMGWxGMR5NaP3-QVIZDEVKRy8EMVwHaKHd5ZcUGtAUOiLMFEt4K1cVblSDpvDLEAHX8_izRW43bZwK3_CvGpyco-PMG2hIvZPmy03B9qwLBkv2PUqYVKMsJbV958Dibcn_n9-otqj8DJ2q7oOomL-ufNw_qB3SsRPtECFQ%3D)**

When you send in your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

The rise of the administrative state is a grave threat to our country.

To counter this threat, Hillsdale sponsors several educational outreach efforts--including _Imprimis_ , free online courses, programs on our Washington, D.C., campus, and a growing network of classical K-12 schools and homeschoolers--to teach citizens about the meaning of the Constitution and the importance of our founding principles of liberty.

Your gift of at least $15--or even $25, $35, $50, $100, or more if you're especially motivated to TAKE ACTION--will help us to expand these educational initiatives that are reaching and teaching millions.

Your support of these efforts is essential because Hillsdale refuses to take ONE PENNY of government funding.

So please complete your **National Referendum on the Administrative State** and consider giving your most generous tax-deductible contribution.

Thank you for being on the side of the Constitution and liberty!

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

**P.S.** I look forward to receiving your opinions about what's happening in our nation. And I hope that you can support our work.

So please complete the **National Referendum on the Administrative State** using this secure link:

**[https://info.hillsdale.edu/administrative-state-survey](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b2a50c71cac04434b3fe3802cc925a66&_e=jDwfQMXYrD2a_vkRwCgzTRD67TzgAI4pX1qrHkXEKulnjOb6w0GrfYNaHeYN_gm-lZjhuMFayUohv4Aupk6vb7f_FMR_WNmTE7IvOLFp1wdAq2AaKE29q5GAkhd_XeaY1mWfXl3xOWQfes1eeCgB_JiShVL61rFHmpVuMsllUwbfnltDvB_gwG4v6JZTo9A1hLWXzxnskFH7_Zlpks-QFZDQNSkMlPXz3HPwQXDCsaadeMcq7F8IjgaBxKYpyTShFAz9okeq10SbFbhn6821CeW2DAFPjuV5hlzCmgZgCQC04VKDa_5cSmH20T_O65YoxVFNgjYIRyNtqlaqhwA1mBsWjTSO3R03p5uRviVniWR3j6lFR7hYZbJPzYy2qUttZvr6HYgD_WzSsKYJZitqEHMxNcF9YKnZlsKBHoyf-Vs%3D)**

As soon as you respond, we will begin your FREE lifetime subscription to _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's digest of liberty that you will receive via email ten times a year. If you'd like, you can also sign up to receive the publication through postal mail.

Educating millions about the Constitution to counter the threat from the administrative state is a monumental task. That's why when you complete your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Thank you for your time and attention--and for your commitment to liberty.
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

subject: Who rules whom?
body:
The Constitution of "We the People" is being replaced by an elite, out-of-touch, and unaccountable administrative state that rules without the consent of American citizens.

This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | |

| | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=84861820048c4dc29b2c631261e70b9e&_e=7GHBUsa6MIHbuMw4w9malzNOT2gvVFWSDMm1g8QBCWA0lOGtazYTzZP1uuWFglcyEE5Egw1HnTUObM9KdthAN-rbTqPVA-Owq9zrjQ206of4A32d96kwbtUaxYVC5zq0UGO-TrzWzpLKTGNbDy8x5JeY1OLsJBdpaFEKc5de1j1wYD1bR5Py9VaasKK23IHQpxv32uhnfzNKqLTaiZO1RNLaqpDnaa0UdlFrWtD6LfNHQftbl7e1crxDrFUPIIyHG4_uB-Mpr9lXpzeucxvmkJ73ZZXnIExmbp9-dV1-BqS2nbMD5Vm_5_m2e-1txsPX0TYbDA5eIS-w9DdNR-ijtk6vAuCKghj8z5cxqutRe-sZhvyUWSpFHhiBYQUskaiI02WxOWbosaINBgGhd_GPizDxhzObGUR_9IaPNOIAzac%3D)

| | | Dear Fellow American, Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its [**National Referendum on the Administrative State**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=84861820048c4dc29b2c631261e70b9e&_e=7GHBUsa6MIHbuMw4w9malzNOT2gvVFWSDMm1g8QBCWA0lOGtazYTzZP1uuWFglcyEE5Egw1HnTUObM9KdthAN-rbTqPVA-Owq9zrjQ206of4A32d96kwbtUaxYVC5zq0UGO-TrzWzpLKTGNbDy8x5JeY1OLsJBdpaFEKc5de1j1wYD1bR5Py9VaasKK23IHQpxv32uhnfzNKqLTaiZO1RNLaqpDnaa0UdlFrWtD6LfNHQftbl7e1crxDrFUPIIyH_2fhZ2ibCOrEJz8-ZWsCrLYCMFH6-xOzI3qeD41nZdFdt4Ffm0I8WQjxO-EzUoFkunKC7DzlV7ijYjuVFzDRwqvHFOrMVppSuSxGEPI_OlQkpmDuqRGHMy5_ROlAfupz-go6v5rStuiWz_1ZxfeJLcqtiHYoMx9gdn1u19X12Zo%3D).

Responding will only take a few minutes. Your input as an informed patriot is needed right away...because **our country is facing a constitutional crisis**.

It's a crisis that involves a fundamental political question: **who rules whom?**

The Constitution established a limited government in which the **people** ruled through their elected officials. Under this form of government, America became the freest and most prosperous nation in history.

Today, however, our constitutional system is one that increasingly exists in name only. **The Constitution of "We the People" is being replaced by an elite, out-of-touch, and unaccountable administrative state that rules without the consent of American citizens.** This means we live in an era of growing bureaucratic despotism, manifested in an administrative state that bypasses the Constitution, rejects the separation of powers, and replaces the rule of law with regulations.

**But we can 't just TALK about the problem. We also have to TAKE ACTION--to DO SOMETHING about it, while there's still time to save our country. **

That is why I'm writing to you today.

Hillsdale College is committed to returning to the Constitution of "We the People"--before it's too late.

To do that, I need your input. What are your opinions on this topic--knowing that we can propose SOLUTIONS that will restore liberty?

**Please let me know your thoughts today by answering the National Referendum on the Administrative State using this secure link:**

**[https://info.hillsdale.edu/administrative-state-survey](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=84861820048c4dc29b2c631261e70b9e&_e=7GHBUsa6MIHbuMw4w9malzNOT2gvVFWSDMm1g8QBCWA0lOGtazYTzZP1uuWFglcyEE5Egw1HnTUObM9KdthAN-rbTqPVA-Owq9zrjQ206of4A32d96kwbtUaxYVC5zq0UGO-TrzWzpLKTGNbDy8x5JeY1OLsJBdpaFEKc5de1j1wYD1bR5Py9VaasKK23IHQpxv32uhnfzNKqLTaiZO1RNLaqpDnaa0UdlFrWtD6LfNHQftbl7e1crxDrFUPIIyHIOYYrL4Q5UWaMZSyi9eoyS5KHLxM6CaLZSm1_iXBQG6D2qmlFAcvpLVqVC9IudVQ7Ut-yI3bvNwphbzCphsNgpeYBKyx2WurefLXgqvYIZIxMqzqXZugLxnYsJmWzYsb5N_CP1Fd3lLeZq7ZKt9csnNpwMj35B7RweBPOKOG2Co%3D)**

When you send in your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

The rise of the administrative state is a grave threat to our country.

To counter this threat, Hillsdale sponsors several educational outreach efforts--including _Imprimis_ , free online courses, programs on our Washington, D.C., campus, and a growing network of classical K-12 schools and homeschoolers--to teach citizens about the meaning of the Constitution and the importance of our founding principles of liberty.

Your gift of at least $15--or even $25, $35, $50, $100, or more if you're especially motivated to TAKE ACTION--will help us to expand these educational initiatives that are reaching and teaching millions.

Your support of these efforts is essential because Hillsdale refuses to take ONE PENNY of government funding.

So please complete your **National Referendum on the Administrative State** and consider giving your most generous tax-deductible contribution.

Thank you for being on the side of the Constitution and liberty!

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

**P.S.** I look forward to receiving your opinions about what's happening in our nation. And I hope that you can support our work.

So please complete the **National Referendum on the Administrative State** using this secure link:

**[https://info.hillsdale.edu/administrative-state-survey](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=84861820048c4dc29b2c631261e70b9e&_e=7GHBUsa6MIHbuMw4w9malzNOT2gvVFWSDMm1g8QBCWA0lOGtazYTzZP1uuWFglcyEE5Egw1HnTUObM9KdthAN-rbTqPVA-Owq9zrjQ206of4A32d96kwbtUaxYVC5zq0UGO-TrzWzpLKTGNbDy8x5JeY1OLsJBdpaFEKc5de1j1wYD1bR5Py9VaasKK23IHQpxv32uhnfzNKqLTaiZO1RNLaqpDnaa0UdlFrWtD6LfNHQftbl7e1crxDrFUPIIyHDpFCAN8lVNShYqM1UqqSjOnIfMwCfqe51UXYNftDQN1Hs8VQkF_OMbw-ceLbPBGVdqBxX8cIen_xRvFAwpzClaG8snZOFiIB9sJTfoJs0eplxuc1RYhpZdESGoIypKhyoq_YC_uteyWhqj9o0aUWECb2d3YpMByHvjKL12KAXeM%3D)**

As soon as you respond, we will begin your FREE lifetime subscription to _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's digest of liberty that you will receive via email ten times a year. If you'd like, you can also sign up to receive the publication through postal mail.

Educating millions about the Constitution to counter the threat from the administrative state is a monumental task. That's why when you complete your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Take the Survey & Join the Fight!

| | Friend, The last four years were a nightmare. Under Biden and Harris, corruption ran rampant, crises were ignored, and Americans paid the price. From the border to the economy, their failures hurt our country – and no one was ever held accountable.**That changes now.** We’re launching our **_Government Accountability Survey_** to hear directly from conservatives like you. clean_body: Take the Survey & Join the Fight! | | | | | | Friend, The last four years were a nightmare. Under Biden and Harris, corruption ran rampant, crises were ignored, and Americans paid the price. From the border to the economy, their failures hurt our country – and no one was ever held accountable.That changes now. We’re launching our Government Accountability Survey to hear directly from conservatives like you. | | | | | | | Thanks to your support, we won the 2024 election. Now, President Trump is building a team of bold, patriotic leaders to restore integrity in Washington. At the forefront of this fight are Elon Musk and Vivek Ramaswamy - two fearless champions of transparency and accountability. Together, they’re leading the charge to ensure no failure, no crime, and no corruption goes unpunished. But even the strongest leaders can’t succeed alone. They need your support now more than ever. | | | | | | | | The American people expect justice for all. Together, we can bring it. Thank you, The Accountability Alliance | | | | | * | | Defend the Constitution PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

| | Friend, The last four years were a nightmare. Under Biden and Harris, corruption ran rampant, crises were ignored, and Americans paid the price. From the border to the economy, their failures hurt our country – and no one was ever held accountable.**That changes now.** We’re launching our **_Government Accountability Survey_** to hear directly from conservatives like you. The Radical Left and their cronies in the courts are desperate. They know Trump is winning. They know YOU are with him. And they know they can 't stop the America First movement at the ballot box--so they're trying to destroy him in the courts. They think they can silence your voice by attacking Trump. They think they can bury him under sham convictions and lies. They are WRONG. We must call on the Supreme Court to intervene and end this sham witch hunt once and for all. This isn't just an attack on Trump--it's an attack on the entire America First movement. We need 50,000 Patriots to stand up and demand SCOTUS drop these charges NOW. Will you add your name and show them we will NEVER back down? The stakes have never been higher. If we don 't fight back, the Left will do everything they can to derail Trump and destroy the future of the MAGA agenda. Stand with me. Stand with President Trump. Stand for America First. Paid for by Eric Burlison for Congress 2135 E. Independence Ave. #1007 Springfield, MO 65807 "Eric Burlison for Congress" Full Mag News PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: The Texas Flyover
subject: A Fraudulent Fisherman, a Bum Steer, and a Boot Man
body:
Pro fisherman and YouTuber Ben Milliken surrendered to Nacogdoches County authorities last week after he was [charged with fishing tournament fraud](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2uozAQRp_GdEaescGhcLENXbbdEg14CNYaG2ErJG9_lfS3_36Ozr_7dKcQQ3r8pZ1dfa15QoVGAkq4TZ5CfE-m8W5WfoCGHVhtOgRrbbO5bu6tYraK0RLzikjz4nWngTQaNE1wnzFAuAHoHlQLhLDqoV-GXi--18Io9qHms60bV35RWeM7P_lsl7w30W21HkXoPwJHgeN1Xe3-LpQo1ZxC_oQEjomvInCMeaEocKSzhiWywHHmJPcQY_jPSdJ5cqns5fdGrqFsIT0kDMNNd2jbYzua0_nj-hRKb4VRj51C_JLUX9U8Hf4EAAD__4YXZuY).

**Good morning!** On this day in 1943, saxophonist [Bobby Keys](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00DFv8yAQxvFPgzcsDgjYA8O7eMu7drTOcI5RsYkMjeNvXyVqx063_HT66_m4jleMKW63_7iSq885j1JIzUFy6MaAMZ2jboKbROihIQdW6YsEa22zOAiKOlQX71GAmOaL8T0Amm42QNiFJrrXM5DQASgDogWUMKve-N4oH4xiWlCINe9tXajSE8uczvygvfV5bZJbar0Xpv4xOTA5HMfR7jm9ckvNG70Qk8P6VaL_vXyjozA5_Dj-hoUXfOb7krdYKp_yNJ38k87CA2HgWLkV3GhhDZNDs7twP2JKsRjLtLitGNM7p_65z8PJ7wAAAP__AGho_w) was born in Slaton. He performed with Lynyrd Skynyrd, John Lennon, Eric Clapton, and other prominent musicians, but he is best remembered for touring with the Rolling Stones for more than 45 years. Dallas Cowboys owner Jerry Jones hasn't had the best year, and a Texas magazine is rubbing salt in the wound by naming him its "Bum Steer of the Year." Check out [the story](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0UDGP8yAU-zXJRpT3oNAMDN-Srd96Y0QDJK8ioQJUmvv1p1S33mTZlmzLX7fpZijQvvw3m9Pl7eOEPQoGyOA6WUPhmERr9b23A7ROg-LigqCUalc99OiGKxcDt-gvDrhQkgsjlBCAXl5a0mcYIFwBuIS-A4Pg-SDnQfLZSt6I3lkqMXVldcW9TfbhiC-XujlubdBrKc_c8H8Njg2OtdYu02k1OO4-NDjOsd7jkU_u6gnWhGAy-9XZw6V0sEfcXWaV9sxWWlaXC7OU17jHxHyKG_tUs80s5pt21yZtn5VCoCxVI_plMxQ-i8qfF700_gQAAP___v1qZA) in _The Roundup,_ and let us know what you think about the selection! Today's sponsor is [Organixx](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyEkcGK4zAMhp9GubnYcmo3hxwWSm4dBjqwx6DIdmtw7JK43czbL52dHpe5_v-nDyT9Po0niinmyxvNvq9bKCNKbIVCoQ6jo5g-x7Zx_SRdpxrfK6vbPSprbXPtO3J26oJv5b4Nk2JvJZPdK2cO0nCHTeyfMoXqoJQ2Su4UoQq6M9wZzc5oaKV3sZZlV6---o3WkD7Lwy87LnOT-muttxX0L8ABcCjLhXLctmcJOHDylMVa7gt7J7ikRBefV_FA0AONU3Sgj4HDhFYyoKGRvqK1LpQdoLnXefw3DvpIIcQUqfrvYvYu3mfQR77xd8QlV5_rEwY8vDQdoHFUCUEfX-uKj-F0fn87i4_z6V3wyg8UfCNAw1fKP4PN0rvbn5hSXI2FVl5miunrJvW_T3r0-DcAAP__xxKQWw), offering collagen products to help promote healthy skin and hair.

## Report: 2,870 Active Groundwater Contamination Sites
An [annual report](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL1uwyAUhZ8Gb1hcIHYyMHTxlq4drRt-HCoMLtzGydtXydQOHY_0naNP5-M8nzGmmJd3XL2heyizFFJzkByOs8OYHrPunLkId4LOGxiVPkgYx7G7GgHKo1YwopVWexECWHUI1uLFqSNcumieYyDhCKAGED2ghKBOgz0NyrpBMS28i1RqT1dP_o4tpEe5-drbsnbJXIm2xtQbkxOT077vPVn_1b_Ifik3Jqellu_sdiRf_ya-Jcw55oVja7611WdicmqhcnEY-GeJmfhvfi35qfJs2JIJ15iRYsm8-q1U6qpx2x5Tim0YmRbLijG9POnf425G_gQAAP__P851lw) from the Texas Groundwater Protection Committee—composed of nine state agencies and an association of groundwater districts—reveals that 252 new cases of groundwater contamination were reported in 2023, bringing the total number of active cases in Texas to 2,870. Groundwater provides over 55% of the state’s water supply, with agriculture being the biggest consumer. Nearly every county in Texas is [affected by groundwater contamination](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00L2O3CAUxfGnwd214PJlCoo07jZtSgsDHl8Fw8om4923j2b6rY909NP_z8fyEahQffwOR_b9a2sLclQgEMS0pEDle1FD8itPTgzZCyuVRmGtHXYfNcp13bbJTMrlFW2MZnUxO65N4EkP5F9nAsUkhDSCjyKg2KQz0RkZk5FM8Zyot3Pse-75K1xb-W7PfI6xHUPxe--fF5O_GM4M5_u-x79E1J-vmeEczk6xZIZzzffFcC4thsJwPtqZoe-hAmoONd8Qw5UvaBs8zvavpjv0fEJstYeDaujUKlCFN4HhrLkE5MoqkxMYpxSoTU-wOq6Ba6u4sgajmIbTp8-bSqHLWKb44whU3vb-Y8ynx_8BAAD__4Z1dB4). The most common source is gas stations, which make up a third of all cases. Contamination can persist for years or indefinitely. While some sites are remediated, groundwater use is restricted at others. Public water systems [must test for contaminants regularly](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGutCAUhJ8GOw3ngIgFxd_Y7d_e0rCAKwmCwbPr7tvfrP1tv8lMJt_Pbb7ZmGJ-_LdbMPReyowcZQvYgp69jekzy8abO_cjNMHAIGSPMAxDsxrBveZW9Vwi1wPIuw520TB6kAssvWui-Y4BggYQCngHFmERo3KjEs4rwSQPPlKpHa2BwtseS_qUV6idK1uTzEq0H0z8YzgxnM7z7NxaS_6mDKcczoPhtJbnQSW3V5_hZCtFlwLD6SLto5Zn9qelUFtXMtktZkux5LaGvVRq95LS8wIwjrpXUnT7ujfV-P2MKcVDDUzyx2Zjun7Rn6JeBn8DAAD__0AAbJE), but private water wells are exempt from those regulations. State agencies notified 34 local authorities and 289 private well owners about potential contamination last year. The Texas Commission on Environmental Quality [provides a map](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0j7GOqzAQRb8GOpBn7NihcPGadHntlsjYA4xkcNZ4cfL3q6Tf5lZX5-h83ce748j78t9tZMtzTiMKVB1gB9cxOI6vUbXBTiIM0JIFI9UFwRjTrlZfg7r4yYR5Iu8xDAJxngQZT0NQRrRs3zBAuAJIDaIHhzDLQftBSx-0bJSgwCXlvqxU6OmOOb7SSbn3aWujXUt5HI381-CtwVuttS-evvvPs1_S2eBt4eO9Of3sobpCufNpL27j3RVOe3cyVcpttuFROUY-tGmUWDbH8SMpf1afFn8DAAD__xToW_U) of active contamination sites.
## Pro Fisherman and YouTuber Arrested
Pro fisherman and YouTuber Ben Milliken surrendered to Nacogdoches County authorities last week after he was [charged with fishing tournament fraud](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2uozAQRp_GdEaescGhcLENXbbdEg14CNYaG2ErJG9_lfS3_36Ozr_7dKcQQ3r8pZ1dfa15QoVGAkq4TZ5CfE-m8W5WfoCGHVhtOgRrbbO5bu6tYraK0RLzikjz4nWngTQaNE1wnzFAuAHoHlQLhLDqoV-GXi--18Io9qHms60bV35RWeM7P_lsl7w30W21HkXoPwJHgeN1Xe3-LpQo1ZxC_oQEjomvInCMeaEocKSzhiWywHHmJPcQY_jPSdJ5cqns5fdGrqFsIT0kDMNNd2jbYzua0_nj-hRKb4VRj51C_JLUX9U8Hf4EAAD__4YXZuY). Texas Parks and Wildlife Department (TPWD) officials determined Milliken [did not have a valid fishing license](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00DGvrCAQBeBfox2GGV1YC4rX2O1rX2kQBiWLYBDX3X__4s1NbnXLyZx8OTn_HuND--Dj_FevpMrbpRE5dgyQwX202ofP2NVWTdz2UJMC2XY3BCllvSgu6Q6tASd6N8negbUohHVc4I0j6NqrCwOEO0ArgDegEVzbC9OL1ljRVh0n60vKTVmo0FvvLnzSi3Jj0loHtZSy7VX7p8KhwuE8z-ZJ5Xk9KxwinXuFQ0hGB_Z9bGk7gs7M-X3xcWafdJRjoswmimz1IfgnRaZzpr2QZS79REs6ctQrxcJc1odlPrKoTZptMgtdeJ2V3c4L2YWsOj6v2oevpuXX6V4K_wcAAP__2dd0Wg) when he caught a 13.15-pound bass from Lake Naconiche in February. Milliken reported the catch to the department’s Toyota ShareLunker Program, which awards prizes up to $10,000 to anglers who catch 13-pound largemouth bass or larger between January 1 and March 31. TPWD has accused Milliken of knowingly falsifying his entry form. He was [disqualified from the program](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGOszAQhJ_GdEbeNTGhcPE3dPnbK5HBS1idwZHthPD2J0466ZorRzPfaDQft-HmOPB2_-9WsuU9xwEVNhJQwnXwjsMxNJW3o_IdVGSh1c0FoW3barEzOHcBwAZhMtNIo-9apa4GfXfR3QQV27MMEK4A2oCqwSHMujNTZ_TkjRaNIs8lprosVOjt8hyO-KJUT3Gtgl1KeWSh_wnsBfb7vteZT0tgH7fMAvuZ88LbXWA_upzlL0mbXDkE_qRNupQoF_LyiM_yHEme4dXlQklS4EI_oJyTe_oqWf_YTzibVjTqvjoO35PKnx-9LH4FAAD__zjJa3U) and cited for fishing without a license. Milliken, who has over 570,000 YouTube subscribers, called the incident a “complete misunderstanding” and promised to address the allegations publicly at a later time.
## Jerry Jones Receives Bum Steer Award
_Texas Monthly_ has named Dallas Cowboys owner Jerry Jones its [Bum Steer of the Year](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0UDGP8yAU-zXJRpT3oNAMDN-Srd96Y0QDJK8ioQJUmvv1p1S33mTZlmzLX7fpZijQvvw3m9Pl7eOEPQoGyOA6WUPhmERr9b23A7ROg-LigqCUalc99OiGKxcDt-gvDrhQkgsjlBCAXl5a0mcYIFwBuIS-A4Pg-SDnQfLZSt6I3lkqMXVldcW9TfbhiC-XujlubdBrKc_c8H8Njg2OtdYu02k1OO4-NDjOsd7jkU_u6gnWhGAy-9XZw6V0sEfcXWaV9sxWWlaXC7OU17jHxHyKG_tUs80s5pt21yZtn5VCoCxVI_plMxQ-i8qfF700_gQAAP___v1qZA), an award it has given since 1975 and describes as its “highest dishonor.” The magazine highlighted some of this year’s [most embarrassing moments](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0j72O8yAQAJ_G7rDYZf1XUHxNunztlRYYCJxwsADF4e1Puf760Yzm677dVYjh-fivDivr26UNORIDZLBsRoXYNuqN1Nys0FsJs6ARYZ7n3ktDqEe90sR3B4a0E6NGGq11tChSvA_yIwOEBUBMwAdQCE6s075OYjeT6IhbE2rKQ_W22rcqLrb0snnY09FH6Ws9Syf-dXjr8FbOlGsZmvIpfYAOb5dvzKgYVWF7unRqhaXraTP7tjk3BstIOC7zOvh6xD5Lc14hxlCmuSP-OFSIv6X65_pL4k8AAAD__zJmW7k) for the 82-year-old owner and general manager, including the Cowboys’ lopsided 48-32 loss to the Green Bay Packers in the first round of the playoffs in January, a spat with two local radio hosts in October following the Cowboys’ blowout 47-9 loss to the Detroit Lions at home, and Jones’s comments dismissing criticism of sun glare at AT&T Stadium in November. While politicians are usually the recipients of the ignominious award, Jones previously [shared it with the Texas Longhorns in 2010](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGOqzAQRb8GukHMmBgoXLyGLq_dEhl7CI4MjmwnDn-_Svrt7z06Oj_X-aqdd8ftv95Z5fcaZmqpAyTAYbba-XPuaquW1o5Ys8JedBfCvu_rTVkcxLgIIy5I0rYL90xkl35hiXLUpnbqA0PCAVFIbBvUhKsYpRmlMFaKqmvZuhxikzfO_NZp9Wd4cWxM2GuvtpwfqRL_KpoqmkopTdLmGSMf-bOoaDq4pIqm7xf2cOTNn3BzL05gQlnCmSCUgyPcOcYT7uHgBC4nWJ47pMwcIayQN4aTdQRddLQgpMBB4lhHZR_Fee-S7Kuuve3a-a9a_rPVS9FvAAAA__9Hjm3_), when he fired Cowboys head coach Wade Phillips in the middle of a 6-10 season.
| [](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyEkcGK4zAMhp9GubnYcmo3hxwWSm4dBjqwx6DIdmtw7JK43czbL52dHpe5_v-nDyT9Po0niinmyxvNvq9bKCNKbIVCoQ6jo5g-x7Zx_SRdpxrfK6vbPSprbXPtO3J26oJv5b4Nk2JvJZPdK2cO0nCHTeyfMoXqoJQ2Su4UoQq6M9wZzc5oaKV3sZZlV6---o3WkD7Lwy87LnOT-muttxX0L8ABcCjLhXLctmcJOHDylMVa7gt7J7ikRBefV_FA0AONU3Sgj4HDhFYyoKGRvqK1LpQdoLnXefw3DvpIIcQUqfrvYvYu3mfQR77xd8QlV5_rEwY8vDQdoHFUCUEfX-uKj-F0fn87i4_z6V3wyg8UfCNAw1fKP4PN0rvbn5hSXI2FVl5miunrJvW_T3r0-DcAAP__xxKQWw) Is your neck drooping, hair dry and flaky, or maybe your nails are getting brittle? [These are WARNING signs](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyEkcGK4zAMhp9GubnYcmo3hxwWSm4dBjqwx6DIdmtw7JK43czbL52dHpe5_v-nDyT9Po0niinmyxvNvq9bKCNKbIVCoQ6jo5g-x7Zx_SRdpxrfK6vbPSprbXPtO3J26oJv5b4Nk2JvJZPdK2cO0nCHTeyfMoXqoJQ2Su4UoQq6M9wZzc5oaKV3sZZlV6---o3WkD7Lwy87LnOT-muttxX0L8ABcCjLhXLctmcJOHDylMVa7gt7J7ikRBefV_FA0AONU3Sgj4HDhFYyoKGRvqK1LpQdoLnXefw3DvpIIcQUqfrvYvYu3mfQR77xd8QlV5_rEwY8vDQdoHFUCUEfX-uKj-F0fn87i4_z6V3wyg8UfCNAw1fKP4PN0rvbn5hSXI2FVl5miunrJvW_T3r0-DcAAP__xxKQWw) that you’re collagen-deficient, and it’s going to get worse if you don’t do something about it. Believe it or not, collagen deficiency strikes nearly everyone over the age of 30. Because after 30, [you start losing 1% of collagen per year](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyEkcGK4zAMhp9GubnYcmo3hxwWSm4dBjqwx6DIdmtw7JK43czbL52dHpe5_v-nDyT9Po0niinmyxvNvq9bKCNKbIVCoQ6jo5g-x7Zx_SRdpxrfK6vbPSprbXPtO3J26oJv5b4Nk2JvJZPdK2cO0nCHTeyfMoXqoJQ2Su4UoQq6M9wZzc5oaKV3sZZlV6---o3WkD7Lwy87LnOT-muttxX0L8ABcCjLhXLctmcJOHDylMVa7gt7J7ikRBefV_FA0AONU3Sgj4HDhFYyoKGRvqK1LpQdoLnXefw3DvpIIcQUqfrvYvYu3mfQR77xd8QlV5_rEwY8vDQdoHFUCUEfX-uKj-F0fn87i4_z6V3wyg8UfCNAw1fKP4PN0rvbn5hSXI2FVl5miunrJvW_T3r0-DcAAP__xxKQWw). And that’s no good because... the fact is, collagen is the glue that holds your body together. Without it your body literally starts falling apart (FAST!). So if you have those signs, [it's time to act, now, not later](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyEkcGK4zAMhp9GubnYcmo3hxwWSm4dBjqwx6DIdmtw7JK43czbL52dHpe5_v-nDyT9Po0niinmyxvNvq9bKCNKbIVCoQ6jo5g-x7Zx_SRdpxrfK6vbPSprbXPtO3J26oJv5b4Nk2JvJZPdK2cO0nCHTeyfMoXqoJQ2Su4UoQq6M9wZzc5oaKV3sZZlV6---o3WkD7Lwy87LnOT-muttxX0L8ABcCjLhXLctmcJOHDylMVa7gt7J7ikRBefV_FA0AONU3Sgj4HDhFYyoKGRvqK1LpQdoLnXefw3DvpIIcQUqfrvYvYu3mfQR77xd8QlV5_rEwY8vDQdoHFUCUEfX-uKj-F0fn87i4_z6V3wyg8UfCNAw1fKP4PN0rvbn5hSXI2FVl5miunrJvW_T3r0-DcAAP__xxKQWw).

We have to adjust_ ,” said board president Doyle Corder. ([See Details](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGOszAQhJ_GdEbeNT8OhYu_ocu1V6KNvQRLC46wFcLbn7j-mqlGM5--7_t0pyRpe37Ryr5-5jyhwU4DarhNkZKcU9dE_zBxgIY9ONv9Q3DONYsPOKANltCa2QTLBrrHENHMxg03JNMkf40Bwg3A9mBaIITZDn0Yehtib1VnOKaa97YuXPlDZZYzv3lvQ14b8Uutr6Lsf4WjwvE4jnbjo4SFto0FzNVSOF4nCkfAK5zCkVbak0jWqUQdJBcuOuStZEmRKhdtNQuvvFXaT13CkrMUhWOz-_g6kkgqvVOdea6U5Bel_unm7fEnAAD__2VIZUo)) **➤ Houston:** A 23-year-old mother and her four children were arrested and deported to Mexico last week when they arrived at a court hearing about their immigration case. The husband and father, a U.S. citizen, said they missed a hearing in October after the woman had an emergency cesarean section. Groundwater provides over 55% of the state’s water supply, with agriculture being the biggest consumer. Nearly every county in Texas is . The most common source is gas stations, which make up a third of all cases. Contamination can persist for years or indefinitely. Pro Fisherman and YouTuber Arrested Pro fisherman and YouTuber Ben Milliken surrendered to Nacogdoches County authorities last week after he was . Texas Parks and Wildlife Department (TPWD) officials determined Milliken when he caught a 13.15-pound bass from Lake Naconiche in February. Milliken reported the catch to the department’s Toyota ShareLunker Program, which awards prizes up to $10,000 to anglers who catch 13-pound largemouth bass or larger between January 1 and March 31. TPWD has accused Milliken of knowingly falsifying his entry form. He was and cited for fishing without a license. Milliken, who has over 570,000 YouTube subscribers, called the incident a “complete misunderstanding” and promised to address the allegations publicly at a later time. ## GOP Panel Calls for Cheney Investigation
A House GOP-led panel on Tuesday called for the Justice Department to open [a criminal investigation](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL_unDAQhJ_GdHuylz-GwkUaukubEhm8ho2MjbDvTuTpI67_NdPM6NPo-_OcnpYDx_W33ckUnyaU2IBCUP3kLIdraipnPBFSXZFRum5aVH2tqs1opNpjq7W20suhVc71spkX33m1IA0Vm5umUPVK1VoOj3meW-oHaee6a6TsRCPJcUnn42_iWDby4UpvOh9L2qtgtlKOLOpfAkeBY7yOlMtdCRxvsMBR4R1a4PjKEOmTBY5bemWCNR1w2EgBFhtCBp9OCPwPlo0iXVASzAQc35QLr7aQ-y6Wk3eONsCHS6Scodj9oJPjKnCsTuOOD4fAudOiketuOXyvlp_UvQ3-DwAA___WinEi) of former Rep. Liz Cheney for potential "criminal witness tampering" related to her role on the House Jan. 6 Select Committee. ## Ukraine Kills Russian General in Moscow
Russian officials confirmed that [Lt. Gen. Igor Kirillov](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGO6yAQAL8GOiJYwHYKite4y2uvtCBe7L2sTYS5nPz3p1x_9Ugz0nzcplskpn35HzcMLZcJNDhlQJlhmiPxOTk5h4wIaCUG01vnwQzWyDV0yQIMmHprY8wQr_09IvronPU-905SeNsMmMEY2-vrJaXkcbjqmGzntO6E0zhTK_XyWWhvK2Y-ywvr5V42yWFt7XkI-0_AKGBsK67E_GYCxmdhup8Cxhkz7gcKGL12dvBO1a_joLirBXeskRUtpaoHVWIuL_UgZpxVOlUqWxIwyhrm5zcx09H1wulli_Rbke2vI68APwEAAP__Qgxi6w), head of the country’s nuclear defense forces, was killed Tuesday by a bomb hidden in a scooter outside his home in Moscow. Kirillov and his assistant were on their way to his office when they died in the explosion. [Ukraine has claimed credit](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2O6yAUhJ_G7oj4NxQUt0mX225pHcwhZhcbC0iyefuVt99yNNJovu_jNt8g5bTf_8OGrscyc8olYZwwMwdI-T3LMbiIyFGM6NgkpOLMCDauDhaYjNdmYiHaoISSQK3XggKgQOnH5M41xplhTEzUXrz3Co2l4IWWlOpBUgypl3r5LGnvK8b8Lk-sl6VsY3Zr70cbxL-BXwd-hWPHVzurM9SelowDv9ZHawkIfh-5tFR2siIEUiLZH0tGqCRgxL0hiaUu2MhXyhkDsVppv6CVGmxUikslTwr0qKIPzIzVheOVck5NT4Ok9w1S_v3V__L0dPwnAAD__8OhaqQ) for the attack, killing the most high-ranking Russian official inside of Russia since the war started in 2022. Ukraine charged Kirillov in absentia with war crimes on Monday for using banned chemical weapons. He was also under sanctions from several countries, including the U.K. and Canada, for his wartime actions.

Friend,

I'm a numbers guy, so I know just __**how important**__ it is to have the most accurate data and input from our top supporters...Top supporters like YOU.

name: History Facts
subject: Some Civil War armor was made of... cotton?
body:
When the Civil War began in 1861, the United States Navy had just 90 warships. [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?xtl=1krv9cfc68cne546feniwu1f6e5whn181juetcdo4xh4d3w7r5alolk69ju3mp07kfgub56ovk067cqaumu6t40ld7dv21dj928bhyvfez22gn8wx66ci6z1p8tz4xuuix6o0pvzz3mru3vx7yduhhvta&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=soouy5&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
---
---
# [Some Civil War ships used cotton for armor.](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=soouy5&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
### [U.S. History](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=soouy5&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=soouy5&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
| W hen the Civil War began in 1861, the United States Navy had just 90 warships. By the conflict’s end four years later, it had 626. Sixty-five of the ships were ironclads, which were the strongest seafaring vessels in the world at the time. But they were also expensive and made from scarce resources, which is why they accounted for such a small percentage of either side’s fleet. Hence the Confederacy’s eventual reliance on “[cottonclads](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=soouy5&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com),” which were armored with 500-pound bales of cotton lining their sides. Because they were weaker than their iron counterparts, cottonclads would often steam at full speed toward their combatants as the cotton absorbed as much enemy gunfire as possible, then would attack once they were within firing range.
---
This proved more successful than you might expect. The Battle of Galveston began before dawn on January 1, 1863, with cottonclads playing a crucial role in the Confederate victory; the South held the Texas port for the rest of the war. Nevertheless, the Confederates were ultimately bested on the sea just as they were on land, failing to defend their rivers, coasts, and seas en route to their eventual surrender.
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=soouy5&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) | [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=soouy5&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)

## Civil War generals were more likely to die in combat than privates.
We often think of the lowest-ranking soldiers as the most vulnerable when it comes to dying in combat, but that wasn’t the case during the Civil War. Generals and other high-ranking officers personally led their troops into battle during the internecine conflict (which remains the war with the most American fatalities by a considerable margin), making them [50% more likely](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=soouy5&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) to die in combat than privates. Six generals were killed and several more were wounded during the Battle of Antietam alone, the bloodiest one-day battle in American history. Perhaps unsurprisingly, generals have rarely entered the fray in subsequent wars.

---
Because this new boresighter will let you zero in on your target with pinpoint accuracy, all without firing a single shot!

In fact, you can achieve sniper precision without wasting a single round of ammo or even leaving your home!

Introducing...

Codename: **The Boar**

Once reserved for military sharpshooters, this advanced sighting technology is now available for civilian use.

Take a look: The Boar is compatible with all calibers from .17 HMR to .50 Cal, requires no live fire, and gives you a perfect zero in just 10 seconds!

Thanks to an exclusive deal, I’m able to offer The Boar to you at an insane [**36% OFF discount...**](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/19394/6374453/267a806eee34073d3d1eaa1f7eb72d74ba60de2e/e5001599f4fc2d58279527157abff4f8a59b82e6)

While supplies last, I’m throwing in free adapters and free shipping!

[**Grab your MCG Boar Laser Boresighter before I run out.**](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/19394/6374453/267a806eee34073d3d1eaa1f7eb72d74ba60de2e/e5001599f4fc2d58279527157abff4f8a59b82e6)

In Liberty, Oli Fischer

P.S. Imagine getting the best zero or your entire shooting life... without firing a single round.

[](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/19394/6374453/399a048d8dd10d2e76667d3900fe72ab239ac7d6/e5001599f4fc2d58279527157abff4f8a59b82e6)**Zero ammo. Zero range trips. Zero frustration.**

This little device allows you to get a sub-MOA zero on any rifle, carbine, handgun or even shotgun -- 100% safely and from the comfort of your own home.

[**Get your MCG Boar 37% OFF here (Free S &H)**](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/19394/6374453/267a806eee34073d3d1eaa1f7eb72d74ba60de2e/e5001599f4fc2d58279527157abff4f8a59b82e6)

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: I’ve been hearing from THOUSANDS of students
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsuTCgFWZN

The Turning Point USA team has heard from THOUSANDS of
America-loving young people about AMERICAFEST 2024

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osuTCgFWZN

Friend,

The
Turning Point USA team has heard from THOUSANDS of America-loving
young people about AMERICAFEST 2024 - and I don't want to turn
away ANY student!

With
MILLIONS MORE young people turning away from Leftism and deciding
to LOVE AMERICA again, Turning Point USA's AMERICAFEST is on
track to be our BIGGEST EVENT EVER.

Friend,
can I count on YOUR support to help bring EVEN MORE young people
to AMERICAFEST this year? Your gift today of $50 will help
sponsor ONE MORE student to attend ... your gift of $100 will
help sponsor TWO MORE students to attend ... and so on.

But any
amount is a true blessing ... and it will help me bring another
patriotic young person to this year's AMERICAFEST.

Support
the AMERICAFEST Scholarship Fund

Turning
Point USA's AMERICAFEST is the BIGGEST and BOLDEST celebration of
America and our freedoms ... and with YOUR help, this year's
event will bring us to OVERWHELMING VICTORY in the American
Culture War.

Over four
action-packed days, 15,000+ attendees will:

Hear
from the MOST EXCITING speakers in the conservative movement,
including TUCKER CARLSON, DONALD TRUMP JR., RILEY GAINES, and
MANY MORE,

Get
critical activism and leadership TRAINING so these hard-working
kids are ready to return home and inspire MILLIONS MORE in their
generation to LOVE AMERICA again, and

Build
a NATIONWIDE NETWORK of PATRIOTIC STUDENTS - with 15,000+
attendees from ALL 50 states! - so that our pro-America Movement
is STRONGER and MORE UNITED than ever before heading into 2025!

Your gift
today to Turning Point USA's AMERICAFEST Scholarship Fund could
be the reason that a young conservative from <<%STATE% / default:
your state >>, or elsewhere in America, can join this
one-of-a-kind event.

Friend,
would you consider a gift of $50 to help sponsor ONE MORE student
... a gift of $100 to help sponsor TWO MORE students ... and so
on? Truly, any amount you're able to chip in will make a
difference for young patriots across the country.

Support
the AMERICAFEST Scholarship Fund

Earlier
this year, I told Turning Point USA supporters that - when we
worked together - we could inspire GEN Z to become the MOST
CONSERVATIVE and MOST PATRIOTIC youth generation EVER.

Now we
have seen the BIGGEST CONSERVATIVE SHIFT among young people in
generations!

While we
must celebrate this MASSIVE VICTORY, we must also continue to
press our advantage and keep up the pressure on the "Woke" Left
... so we can make this PERMANENT GENERATIONAL CHANGE.

I truly
believe that bringing THOUSANDS MORE kids to this year's
AMERICAFEST can be a GAME-CHANGER for our pro-America Movement -
which is why I hope you'll make your most generous gift today to
support Turning Point USA's AMERICAFEST Scholarship Fund.

Thank
YOU, Friend, for standing with Turning Point USA to build the
NEXT GENERATION of America-loving patriots!

For
America,

Charlie
Kirk
Founder &
CEO
Turning
Point USA

Support
Turning Point USA

4940 East
Beverly Road
Phoenix,
Arizona 85044

body:
For years, the federal government has grown bigger, more bloated, and more out of touch with the American people. | | | Peter, For years, the federal government has grown bigger, more bloated, and more out of touch with the American people.

**But now President Trump, a liberty majority in the Senate, and outsiders like Elon Musk and Vivek Ramaswamy are working together to shrink the government back down to size!**

[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=8475eaa4895747a8a8a650144a309c57&_e=9MihBYFrVDGpCaGYJ8kxYXR7R1JVyDE9lKyn0myA_Qs1RJLCoPCOxiYHLWFwO5Uc8Cw0hUmf1PxdJLi85jT1cr1AdB0LjbOG-B_f5er2prVv_JgJy1HKlMyLfq07SuZzkdDlpJ_Y3W5NTv3iRzqjcBMm-J6NQXiOGj_nnEoTMi7cbrow41Ddcn_MSj9m0rz6zAXU-xR1NzwyQ3oeLbFRd1WBlWHIu9PNMGMU5noh9ikDZ8_i0gXOM5QiMdtvV957C1wOc-7Lfm3yf28co9hrHsFd374sOS4p9hG6skD372_Tte8Y4nkvkeDukKtfmDb4ryXAEf50L2U4GcOCt2floxN9WWNUR8QIdlvDQEqS5GZlM3wHpL6TFP54EPy3kHZCfKrbJvprViiRbz7U5zXNRRsOOf4-VGAfBmnfkDq1f4t0ePubiwAotaBzTmxrQlwFGo_wvAs47YmwVw6ojNKdLQ%3D%3D)
---
The new Department of Government Efficiency could be the most important tool in our arsenal to...
* Rein in the 3 million bureaucrats who waste your tax dollars.
* End government abuse of your freedoms.
* And stopping the Deep State from burning the Constitution.

If you're ready to fight for the liberty agenda, then this is your invitation! **[**Stand with Rand Paul and help make DOGE a success. >>**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=8475eaa4895747a8a8a650144a309c57&_e=9MihBYFrVDGpCaGYJ8kxYXR7R1JVyDE9lKyn0myA_Qs1RJLCoPCOxiYHLWFwO5Uc8Cw0hUmf1PxdJLi85jT1cr1AdB0LjbOG-B_f5er2prVv_JgJy1HKlMyLfq07SuZzkdDlpJ_Y3W5NTv3iRzqjcBMm-J6NQXiOGj_nnEoTMi7cbrow41Ddcn_MSj9m0rz6zAXU-xR1NzwyQ3oeLbFRd1WBlWHIu9PNMGMU5noh9ikDZ8_i0gXOM5QiMdtvV957C1wOc-7Lfm3yf28co9hrHsFd374sOS4p9hG6skD3729zz3edNmsIc_UtJ5NhEyQ8HVd6uW__FBPForxxg-Jy2LygvOzCHoJEulkfTjbzeO3OPjTZ9P4PMSN2ZaUrn7y4zm5FH4VNGxUmouqurvNlATr7iG-T6vr8jrCqddSUjF5455fJI6t0EoZ7fBAHmBjyi9Uez5SHIDbcuJ9Okz68Xg%3D%3D)**
---
[**MAKE GOVERNMENT ACCOUNTABLE AGAIN**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=8475eaa4895747a8a8a650144a309c57&_e=9MihBYFrVDGpCaGYJ8kxYXR7R1JVyDE9lKyn0myA_Qs1RJLCoPCOxiYHLWFwO5Uc8Cw0hUmf1PxdJLi85jT1cr1AdB0LjbOG-B_f5er2prVv_JgJy1HKlMyLfq07SuZzkdDlpJ_Y3W5NTv3iRzqjcBMm-J6NQXiOGj_nnEoTMi7cbrow41Ddcn_MSj9m0rz6zAXU-xR1NzwyQ3oeLbFRd1WBlWHIu9PNMGMU5noh9ikDZ8_i0gXOM5QiMdtvV957C1wOc-7Lfm3yf28co9hrHsFd374sOS4p9hG6skD3728RhW-X7rjpcKQJF3niF9-_xG0ytezn8hc0jYcOn2KY9imGFmBBsLUoTtA4ORr4m2gAXaTlg60xilZodAxU3Zk4p_dN8OsJAWAEM0v88HFFXaGm5VvUCIFFG5b5-034I-QcWEPkTfDuEZ_ssTtueOWF90C9yum8DQxxAXLVrr-tUA%3D%3D)

A Chicago man **[TORE woke mayor Brandon Johnson a new one](https://substack.com/redirect/63fdbcc8-8c0a-4fbc-9385-aba60b541ce8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** during an off-the-rails community meeting for giving millions in tax dollars to illegal migrants surging into the city.
"Let me tell you another thing!" the man said, pointing right at Johnson. "All these illegals, they're not gonna have a merry Christmas, they're gonna have a merry DEPORTATION Christmas!!"
**[Watch him GO OFF below:](https://substack.com/redirect/63fdbcc8-8c0a-4fbc-9385-aba60b541ce8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[](https://substack.com/redirect/63fdbcc8-8c0a-4fbc-9385-aba60b541ce8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[ Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/63fdbcc8-8c0a-4fbc-9385-aba60b541ce8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Many community members wearing "Chicago Flips Red" shirts took the meeting by storm to give the disgraced mayor a piece of their mind, though still followed decorum.
Some of the attendees called Johnson **[a"loser" and a "criminal"](https://substack.com/redirect/63fdbcc8-8c0a-4fbc-9385-aba60b541ce8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for allowing migrants to flood the city.
"We gonna talk about this budget, about the strange things that's happening, because again, your name was on this executive order of May 2023, this executive order for immigration, migrants and refugee rights," another "Chicago Flips Red" community member said. "You caused all this money to go to illegal immigrants."
* * *
**[Presented by Allegiance Gold](https://substack.com/redirect/b6542535-9176-4f3c-a9b4-d5a8a3164089?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
# Can Banks Really Take Your Money Without Your Consent?
_The Legal Loophole That Puts Your Savings at Risk_
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/b6542535-9176-4f3c-a9b4-d5a8a3164089?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Imagine waking up one day to find [your bank account drained](https://substack.com/redirect/b6542535-9176-4f3c-a9b4-d5a8a3164089?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)--not by scammers, but by the bank itself. It may sound like fiction, but under certain laws, financial institutions can legally seize your deposits.
In fact, two banks failed in 2024 and FDIC identified 63 banks with more than half a trillion dollars in unrealized losses.
As the economic landscape grows more unstable, banks are quietly preparing for the next wave of financial uncertainty, leaving your money vulnerable. _**[[Full Story]](https://substack.com/redirect/b6542535-9176-4f3c-a9b4-d5a8a3164089?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_
[ Protect your savings](https://substack.com/redirect/b6542535-9176-4f3c-a9b4-d5a8a3164089?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
# _**Resurfaced:**_**Vivek OUTSMARTS CNN hack who tries to make him trash-talk Trump**
Watch Vivek Ramaswamy completely turn the tables on a CNN talking head John Berman who trie to bait him into attacking Trump.
**[How he handles this is genius...](https://substack.com/redirect/c204ce95-98d0-43fe-b338-13555584ee6f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[](https://substack.com/redirect/c204ce95-98d0-43fe-b338-13555584ee6f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/c204ce95-98d0-43fe-b338-13555584ee6f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"You think Trump's social media posts are unifying?" Berman asked Vivek.
Ramaswamy refuses to engage with a judgement of Trump's social media personality, instead saying that social media by design is a divisive space.
Berman repeatedly sites examples he's hoping Ramaswamy admits constitute poor behavior on Trump's part, **[but Ramaswamy sees right through it.](https://substack.com/redirect/c204ce95-98d0-43fe-b338-13555584ee6f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
Trump's unfiltered social media posting style has ruffled feathers on the left and right, especially those who see themselves as the guardians of the establishment and the phony performative politics of the Uniparty, like CNN...

# **"Gays for Trump" YELLS AT Woke Protesters in EPIC Confrontation at NYC Rally**
**["Stop giving kids puberty blockers!!!"](https://substack.com/redirect/ba81098f-8ff4-464c-9a80-8a019f05611b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** one man holding a "Gay's for Trump" flag and wearing a MAGA hat shouted at a crowd of anti-Trump protesters outside of Madison Square Garden.
The scene outside Trump's rally that day was CHAOS as confrontations between Trump supporters and the counter protesters flared up.
**[Watch what happened next:](https://substack.com/redirect/ba81098f-8ff4-464c-9a80-8a019f05611b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**

Dec 18 | | | | | | | | | | | A Chicago man during an off-the-rails community meeting for giving millions in tax dollars to illegal migrants surging into the city. "Let me tell you another thing!" the man said, pointing right at Johnson. "All these illegals, they're not gonna have a merry Christmas, they're gonna have a merry DEPORTATION Christmas!!" Many community members wearing "Chicago Flips Red" shirts took the meeting by storm to give the disgraced mayor a piece of their mind, though still followed decorum. Some of the attendees called Johnson for allowing migrants to flood the city. "We gonna talk about this budget, about the strange things that's happening, because again, your name was on this executive order of May 2023, this executive order for immigration, migrants and refugee rights," another "Chicago Flips Red" community member said. "You caused all this money to go to illegal immigrants." Can Banks Really Take Your Money Without Your Consent? It may sound like fiction, but under certain laws, financial institutions can legally seize your deposits. In fact, two banks failed in 2024 and FDIC identified 63 banks with more than half a trillion dollars in unrealized losses. As the economic landscape grows more unstable, banks are quietly preparing for the next wave of financial uncertainty, leaving your money vulnerable. * * *
**The Looming Retirement Crisis** **Will Your Retirement Savings Survive the Next 10 Years?** For decades, we’ve been told to trust 401(k)s, pensions, and mutual funds to ensure a comfortable retirement. But today, this trust is being shattered. Cracks are forming in the very systems retirees have relied on for decades**.**
* **Inflation is quietly eating away at the value of every dollar you’ve saved.**
* **Market volatility can wipe out years of gains in mere weeks.**
* **Rising life expectancy is forcing many to stretch their savings far beyond what they anticipated.**

These aren’t hypothetical scenarios—they’re happening now in front of our very own eyes hiding in plain sight. Experts warn that millions of Americans are on track to outlive their retirement savings.**[What would that mean for your future? ](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?xtl=up49nlu9ojuqo8sjz1f7zdcp3ri3dcjuvlhc1vz68vl240hhganc86p9cwo2n9qqslqqxebwq27bblzlv7bwzrvkm2lfvwu0u3ieksy70wzhd1n61utia64uf76seyge34vcff8kbjj9dbumh5mrd3i881rk1nng2n6fheueb69jlp4wmac87nbfus5bzybuo93ri2i70f45msayhpqshd3lpt24241pee05fosp2l37jp249xix603fdtof003erglzpik6knq4dmkr1xsbnsckm2m1p91&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=soozt9&__onlt=h)** You don’t have to imagine it—it’s already happening. Retirees are being forced to return to work, cut back on essentials, or depend on family for financial support. This is not the retirement they envisioned, and it doesn’t have to be yours.

**You’ve probably read a thousand articles like this before, yet you’ve hesitated to act. Why?** Is it your inner voice that whispers, “Maybe the system will fix itself”? Or perhaps you’re relying on advice from a financial advisor who lives paycheck to paycheck, just like you. **The secret to wealth isn’t just about making money—[it’s about keeping it.](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?xtl=up49nlu9ojuqo8sjz1f7zdcp3ri3dcjuw2588xk8fgm49tj1xwpksjrlf7fjpzzvn2kndw4wqsoy9i7fl2yeaz7yacyjv4blhd3ddgmq50ttd0egeau4l5f8j4r1e9slna8t5wg437fhjqqb27t08hk2luna5bwnqz2885819ayi0mmzw7i6rq74l0gsdnl5sm5bw5fybjw1uti3ahcx6slymg00yr8vbj0tr091ess476nb5eh8dg69sw5em1a2g23t31bcmjb86ou4e04ntm1m9m0bwpq&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=soozt9&__onlt=h)**

The truth is, if you’re hoping things will magically change on their own, you’re wrong. Look at what America was built on:**decision-making, hard work, and the dream of owning your financial freedom.** So why aren’t you making the decision to invest in gold?
[](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?xtl=up49nlu9ojuqo8sjz1f7zdcp3ri3dcjuw4qcra9nr4x6qkk7oss6baubhhnes1ia56u8jnvwqgtufedaqjw0bghn3qm1uajl9qmcx7kx9sn3d0mvvgupm5tl11zydi36w7j7tor9stcu33n399zwczljcl7qm3eeckjywtj9g6lg17scfd24zsasrxv7h18ewn7l88d2r1ljcv3wuq2bt6h986jj6crbz20f0a1ctjf0slxm1lfipa8b5ykdw38p897me6t9zw0nxq1guqdjz3ny8tdpdtn&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=soozt9&__onlt=h) Let’s be honest—**gold and silver have been relied upon for thousands of years.** Maybe that’s not an accident. **God created gold and silver for a reason: He knew we would need something to depend on when everything else fails.** When nations crumble, when currencies lose their value, when markets collapse—[**gold and silver endure.**](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?xtl=up49nlu9ojuqo8sjz1f7zdcp3ri3dcjuw6a8ycwq0qi8wrlp3ouqkrxrkufzus5elm2632kwr8yrpbnuget8d2ulu1j5u95kz1tbqxyepi4bcle8n0uxx56b4ki7dubpedxjf40qfdz48e7tsng58s1eus34qu1m3mf0igyuqboe24yg3m82hv5di67kkcuraom8inau46rfkwn1niqfdici5vhfd1yhw714yngr7r5iceggk6evlun4gbdcg4ezysn4tn8f06nr0rxw8frveixk7bu1kx8&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=soozt9&__onlt=h) **How many times have you ignored this message? A thousand? More?** Think of this as your sign. Stop waiting, stop doubting, and take action to protect yourself and your loved ones.**Just as the government takes care of itself first, it’s your responsibility to do the same for your financial well-being.**

Governments, banks, and the wealthiest individuals in the world still rely on gold to balance and stabilize their financial positions. **Why are you ignoring the same solution they trust?.**

Look around you. Do you see signs that things are getting better—or worse? **The world is spiraling into uncertainty, and you’re running out of time to protect yourself.** Stop fighting your instincts. Stop convincing yourself that everything will magically improve. **Act for yourself, for your loved ones, and for the financial freedom you’ve always wanted but never achieved.** For thousands of years, [**gold and silver**](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?xtl=up49nlu9ojuqo8sjz1f7zdcp3ri3dcjuw8jcfehsxb7mbj0ug8wz76a616nuwgqjfpy38gpwrydnjxhpmzqsem6zibw9tfpk0aaa7lmlunkncl9j26ufi4hr8i4ed5nx1nma4hxw71vcqt3hzq0bc83z9ikgui9dryar97ncl7bc31ejofq13xz3ocic2re2epouwqxjfmhc6xuu5qck2yyv2ifcnog1to1s7lz3iiuf0y4rgpd7xopwvewc46ok0zqk6s0ooeyurt59l835kbim6j8c5bx&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=soozt9&__onlt=h) have safeguarded wealth through economic crises, currency collapses, and global uncertainty. They aren’t tied to market trends or political decisions—they are intrinsic, reliable, and proven.
* **A Hedge Against Inflation:** Gold holds its value even as paper currencies lose purchasing power.
* **Proven Stability:** When markets crash, gold and silver endure as safe havens.
* **Intrinsic Value:** Unlike paper assets, gold and silver have value that doesn’t depend on market performance.

This isn’t about abandoning traditional investments—it’s about protecting what you’ve worked so hard to build. Picture yourself 10 years from now. Will you feel relieved that you made the **[right choices to secure your wealth](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?xtl=up49nlu9ojuqo8sjz1f7zdcp3ri3dcjuwn790h6v6luohq1ax4yhrjci3ffpz8a2zt60qxews0i8tur7cunaftgonp7ptpxjqnhz1ol6yddjckdxfov274w5ofppcdje9glqsz6bwnsow609gs7m805u1pgwzmu8dkvfxw0lvc2a3kl0yovlna4qfnxt651biqqe8tvpurnyqybkkj32pou609dyha17qt1dfzreyphbmrq0cwbh76s08hpbq7j8qgudhwdhbqjxgualbyce4v6y64lqofq&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=soozt9&__onlt=h)** —or regret leaving it exposed to the same vulnerabilities millions are facing today? **The time to act is now.** You don’t need to overhaul your entire portfolio. Adding a layer of protection today could make all the difference tomorrow. That’s why we’ve created _[**The Gold & Silver Playbook: Building Wealth with Tangible Assets. **](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?xtl=up49nlu9ojuqo8sjz1f7zdcp3ri3dcjuwpsd7jtxe9fr0h2go0b3aafy6tn8byj7twbjwp7wsr151ql26p8igbu0c0gtsjfidl2xgczpd7xvck9mwuvmu48hscxkcqvluqa4eqdgjxokbgia1upgbe7oegcmdacc4mr7jic848ry4i53hhbjvcxc9im89gnp0rt1iwsf7vduyzjrerr6a2pejybvrl8pny23rn8tnh8xw8zxydauf0urjk6aa9tuf1yxwbvr218b9w8bs1qqmosk5oc2vjz&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=soozt9&__onlt=h)_

**Inside, you’ll discover:**
* **Why the traditional retirement system is failing to meet today’s challenges.**
* **How tangible assets like gold and silver can provide stability in an uncertain economy.**
* **Actionable steps to diversify your portfolio with confidence**.

As our thank-you for taking this important step, you’ll also receive a**FREE silver coin** with your first investment. **Protect Your Retirement Before It’s Too Late** **[Click Here to Download Your Guide](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?xtl=up49nlu9ojuqo8sjz1f7zdcp3ri3dcjuwrc9qleapw4t6o402idnjrio94f3e16ona9gc4ywsf61xnuiy864hj5b4atxsu1i5y9wa4nwhzr5cjclnavuf3jxwzgvc166ckoh46p0mh9whvf28wwr7w97wny0i2l7symym9rsacew5fn75qhhdf31csklpvx04svnwzq8ia7qgb4ixjdmke9rglzs0mrv8d2r0l161oxtg1j6ukz6qgwhz0lzkn1f78cr9gmkqzveaxer6s20s5dm4wscd1c&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=soozt9&__onlt=h)** **The Time to Act Is Now** The system isn’t going to fix itself. Inflation, market volatility, and rising costs are here to stay, and the challenges facing retirees are growing every day. **You owe it to yourself—and to your loved ones—to stop delaying, stop doubting, and start protecting your future. God has given you the tools to secure your financial freedom—it’s time to use them.** **[Click Here to Download Your Guide](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?xtl=up49nlu9ojuqo8sjz1f7zdcp3ri3dcjuwtldy23ckgrvnf55fefw66l2nemkgrrt5dfdhi1wt7mk582d233oj4fpvo4bs29hv9svttle038dcj8a2gvd43ynax34bzeplu1xrjk5a56718bsryclbon2netd0t7aek60yy4b995u6ctmqk1flhwp71zct8gz8txx8cnaxezn2coprs3r9u52eoxowxyb5i2cyyfgcfkq3h6dr5xg0azno3ez8oy3xrg8kl2td9gi3zo4igbyxl1y3e7qk5p&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=soozt9&__onlt=h)** [](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?xtl=up49nlu9ojuqo8sjz1f7zdcp3ri3dcjuww99f4qfw4cxtm6nwaheqk1eqrefifaxlhpb1zswtxrgb4yxtk0wkot1jldfrytgiizumhzl4v2pcicog0vlr3n1eunbbmqx81cndbvn1r2f6jxgyajw74oj39pt4hs65m1qkkfjfdus7zzpat7e7k1azyotwk4mouzgif94mj37mdvg8krvw80bbbv94ifh31328myvsnnmpasonowtyubd16xyuq6plyk2a3g13i5luahgz9p8denk2lk359u&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=soozt9&__onlt=h) [](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?xtl=1n4mo48ebpcaxivsdd85qpgsp6pa3xtkxwyrr6kep0d5fgb211igwekq6v6igne4vsuxjuc03xs82s4yrpyakkfbnmam4qtp5vczup1oa70kjq3af63pzn0bukbea4brsi9ju6ary0v333ox8j3v7qtsqq40ul1ovhgtgv0dlwf1a2w6gsd0j9kak9k19hdt8oc6j2hztugg18z5v2t7utlyq97xrcw8wtj8n337ljvi71hfngtlinuf5q2kw7gq2p1zvvgoetguqf11gkefph1w&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=soozt9&__onlt=h)

These aren’t hypothetical scenarios—they’re happening now in front of our very own eyes hiding in plain sight. Experts warn that millions of Americans are on track to outlive their retirement savings. You don’t have to imagine it—it’s already happening. Retirees are being forced to return to work, cut back on essentials, or depend on family for financial support. This is not the retirement they envisioned, and it doesn’t have to be yours. You’ve probably read a thousand articles like this before, yet you’ve hesitated to act. Why? Is it your inner voice that whispers, “Maybe the system will fix itself”? Or perhaps you’re relying on advice from a financial advisor who lives paycheck to paycheck, just like you.
