Look at what America was built on:decision-making, hard work, and the dream of owning your financial freedom. So why aren’t you making the decision to invest in gold? Let’s be honest—gold and silver have been relied upon for thousands of years. Maybe that’s not an accident. God created gold and silver for a reason: He knew we would need something to depend on when everything else fails. When nations crumble, when currencies lose their value, when markets collapse— How many times have you ignored this message? A thousand? More? Think of this as your sign. Stop waiting, stop doubting, and take action to protect yourself and your loved ones.Just as the government takes care of itself first, it’s your responsibility to do the same for your financial well-being. Governments, banks, and the wealthiest individuals in the world still rely on gold to balance and stabilize their financial positions. Why are you ignoring the same solution they trust?. Look around you. Do you see signs that things are getting better—or worse? The world is spiraling into uncertainty, and you’re running out of time to protect yourself. Stop fighting your instincts. Stop convincing yourself that everything will magically improve. Act for yourself, for your loved ones, and for the financial freedom you’ve always wanted but never achieved. For thousands of years, have safeguarded wealth through economic crises, currency collapses, and global uncertainty. They aren’t tied to market trends or political decisions—they are intrinsic, reliable, and proven. A Hedge Against Inflation: Gold holds its value even as paper currencies lose purchasing power. Proven Stability: When markets crash, gold and silver endure as safe havens. Intrinsic Value: Unlike paper assets, gold and silver have value that doesn’t depend on market performance. This isn’t about abandoning traditional investments—it’s about protecting what you’ve worked so hard to build. Picture yourself 10 years from now. Will you feel relieved that you made the —or regret leaving it exposed to the same vulnerabilities millions are facing today? The time to act is now. You don’t need to overhaul your entire portfolio. Adding a layer of protection today could make all the difference tomorrow. That’s why we’ve created Inside, you’ll discover: Why the traditional retirement system is failing to meet today’s challenges. How tangible assets like gold and silver can provide stability in an uncertain economy. Actionable steps to diversify your portfolio with confidence. As our thank-you for taking this important step, you’ll also receive aFREE silver coin with your first investment. Protect Your Retirement Before It’s Too Late The Time to Act Is Now The system isn’t going to fix itself. You owe it to yourself—and to your loved ones—to stop delaying, stop doubting, and start protecting your future. God has given you the tools to secure your financial freedom—it’s time to use them. Today I want to share an email I got from J, a 17 year old high school student just across the border from me in Kansas. Like me, his family struggled with medical bills when he was a kid -- and now, just like me, he struggles with the corruption in our system and what we can do to change it.
I really want to share J's message because so many people asked me about youth engagement and opinions during the campaign and his email is representative of many of the youth voices we engaged and encountered.
Before that, though, I want to add that his email, and the hundreds more emails and messages we get every week, are powerful reminders of how important this work is and how we can never give up. Even though I can't reply to or highlight every email or message I get, I do read them all and they help guide this content, so please keep sending them!
And if you choose to support this Substack as a paid subscriber, I do respond to every single person who submits a note with their subscription (which you can do [here](https://substack.com/redirect/f4ddcacd-ed57-4ecf-ac97-dbbc1f0a27d6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), to help us continue this effort!).
[Upgrade Subscription](https://substack.com/redirect/f4ddcacd-ed57-4ecf-ac97-dbbc1f0a27d6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Without further ado, J from Overland Park:
_Dear Lucas Kunce,_
_As a 17-year-old who can 't even vote and someone across state lines in Overland Park Kansas, on election night, It devastated me to see that you lost. I'm surrounded by both sides of politics, and I find my beliefs to be quite mixed and different from those in my family. Seeing your campaign ads on TV made me realize I wasn't the only person with those values._
_I was born a month premature and spent over 2 weeks in the NICU. The medical bills for my care were in the hundreds of thousands of dollars, and I was lucky my extended family was able to help chip in and pay for my surgery. Hearing your story and seeing how similar it is to mine was refreshing, knowing that there was someone in government who was rooting and working for those in similar situations. This year was the first year I cared about politics, and it was because of you. Every time I saw your ads on TV, I had a smile on my face, and while I know that not all the people of Missouri shared that smile, I wanted you to know that your campaign had an impact._
_After hearing about corporate PACs from your ads, I learned about them further in my AP Government class. It made me realize how much impact billionaires and CEOs have on elections. We had a debate on the Citizens United vs FEC Supreme Court decision in my class, and I made my stance very clear that I was against it. Seeing how greedy and corrupt politicians were allowed to spend millions of dollars on advertising against a political opponent, and lying straight to the faces of the working class to win their vote is disgusting. It 's even worse seeing the people closest to you be fooled by these blatant lies and vote against their interests. Seeing someone stand against corporate power and fight for the working class is truly inspirational._
_When I heard I had to do a project for my Government class where I got involved in politics, I knew the only politician I wanted to turn to was you. I want to know what I can do to stop corporate power and greed from influencing elections. How do we stop billionaires and lobbyists from pushing their agenda onto congressmen and instead work together between parties for the benefit of the American people?_
_You are an inspiration to the people, and I hope you never stop fighting for people like you and me. Please continue to run, I know you can win, I know you will win._
_Sincerely,_
_J._
_(P.S. I have no idea how you didn 't punch Josh Hawley in the face at the Missouri State Fair. Not only does he have the most punchable face in politics, but he's also an ass.)_
* * *
If you'd like to help us keep engaging across all generations, including young folks like J who are the future not just of politics and policy, but of our country (meaning we need them to be doing good things!), please continue to share this Substack with anyone you think might be interested.
[Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1867741&post_id=153287646&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUzMjg3NjQ2LCJpYXQiOjE3MzQ1MzA4MzYsImV4cCI6MTczNzEyMjgzNiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE4Njc3NDEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.FNhNXlC4ZtbhzhI3eoarb7r6uJ6Ko93hHkhXgusNe8o)
Also, in order to continue our youth outreach, for everyone who creates a paid subscription through this post, if you include an email address of someone under the age of 25 in a note with your subscription, I will send them a year long paid subscription free of charge!
[Upgrade Subscription](https://substack.com/redirect/f4ddcacd-ed57-4ecf-ac97-dbbc1f0a27d6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Let's do this.
-- Lucas

[](https://substack.com/redirect/44fd88b1-b2c8-41f3-9f3f-afb30705ba65?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)[](https://substack..nMdl6eWipPaqtpXsDk5I5ZGfY0eCCOzEYTHqFhV0KkY?)
clean_body: Today I want to share an email I got from J, a 17 year old high school student just across the border from me in Kansas. | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more | | Send the gift of Lucas's Substack this holiday season| | | ? | | | Dec 18 | | | | | | | | | | | | Today I want to share an email I got from J, a 17 year old high school student just across the border from me in Kansas. Like me, his family struggled with medical bills when he was a kid -- and now, just like me, he struggles with the corruption in our system and what we can do to change it. I really want to share J's message because so many people asked me about youth engagement and opinions during the campaign and his email is representative of many of the youth voices we engaged and encountered. Before that, though, I want to add that his email, and the hundreds more emails and messages we get every week, are powerful reminders of how important this work is and how we can never give up. Even though I can't reply to or highlight every email or message I get, I do read them all and they help guide this content, so please keep sending them! And if you choose to support this Substack as a paid subscriber, I do respond to every single person who submits a note with their subscription (which you can do , to help us continue this effort!). Without further ado, J from Overland Park: Dear Lucas Kunce, As a 17-year-old who can 't even vote and someone across state lines in Overland Park Kansas, on election night, It devastated me to see that you lost. I'm surrounded by both sides of politics, and I find my beliefs to be quite mixed and different from those in my family. Seeing your campaign ads on TV made me realize I wasn't the only person with those values. I was born a month premature and spent over 2 weeks in the NICU. The medical bills for my care were in the hundreds of thousands of dollars, and I was lucky my extended family was able to help chip in and pay for my surgery. Hearing your story and seeing how similar it is to mine was refreshing, knowing that there was someone in government who was rooting and working for those in similar situations. This year was the first year I cared about politics, and it was because of you. Every time I saw your ads on TV, I had a smile on my face, and while I know that not all the people of Missouri shared that smile, I wanted you to know that your campaign had an impact. After hearing about corporate PACs from your ads, I learned about them further in my AP Government class. It made me realize how much impact billionaires and CEOs have on elections. We had a debate on the Citizens United vs FEC Supreme Court decision in my class, and I made my stance very clear that I was against it. Seeing how greedy and corrupt politicians were allowed to spend millions of dollars on advertising against a political opponent, and lying straight to the faces of the working class to win their vote is disgusting. It 's even worse seeing the people closest to you be fooled by these blatant lies and vote against their interests. Seeing someone stand against corporate power and fight for the working class is truly inspirational. When I heard I had to do a project for my Government class where I got involved in politics, I knew the only politician I wanted to turn to was you. I want to know what I can do to stop corporate power and greed from influencing elections. How do we stop billionaires and lobbyists from pushing their agenda onto congressmen and instead work together between parties for the benefit of the American people? You are an inspiration to the people, and I hope you never stop fighting for people like you and me. Please continue to run, I know you can win, I know you will win. Sincerely, J. (P.S. I have no idea how you didn 't punch Josh Hawley in the face at the Missouri State Fair. Not only does he have the most punchable face in politics, but he's also an ass.) * If you'd like to help us keep engaging across all generations, including young folks like J who are the future not just of politics and policy, but of our country (meaning we need them to be doing good things!), please continue to share this Substack with anyone you think might be interested. Also, in order to continue our youth outreach, for everyone who creates a paid subscription through this post, if you include an email address of someone under the age of 25 in a note with your subscription, I will send them a year long paid subscription free of charge! Let's do this. -- Lucas You're currently a free subscriber to . For the full experience, | | | | | | | (C) 2024 Lucas Kunce P.O. Box 1240, Independence, MO 64050 ? ?

name: Jordan Zaslow
subject: is it 2003 again?

body:
We wanted to highlight some recent updates in the news: | | |
---
| | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98882977/518130945/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_241217news_N_JZ_90DO_8_G_testB_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImIxZWE4MDVjLTQ4YmQtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=C11abETmhRQkAxWqwPPLR6lXTLA-TdKIwZEFtAiyD9I=)
---
We’re concerned by some recent updates, Peter.

For the first time in two decades, NO women will lead any committees in the U.S. House of Representatives. According to _ABC News_ , effective Jan. 3rd, Republicans have **only chosen white men** to lead each of the 17 standing committees driving policy in our nation.

This is another troubling sign that women’s issues and women’s rights are in jeopardy. We need women in the rooms where decisions are being made – and we need to defend the hard-fought progress of the last century. **The best way to accomplish this is by supporting the women who will be running for office in the coming years and working to get them elected.** [**Pitch in $20.25 or more today →**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hbm-pac/?refcode=EM_F_241217news_N_JZ_90DO_8_G_testB_L1&amount=20.25)
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98882979/518130946/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_241217news_N_JZ_90DO_8_G_testB_P1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImIxZWE4MDVjLTQ4YmQtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=C11abETmhRQkAxWqwPPLR6lXTLA-TdKIwZEFtAiyD9I=)
---
Second, an extremist MAGA activist and commentator who raised the idea of **JAILING women for obtaining an abortion** has been appointed to a top policy job in the Trump administration. Ed Martin will serve as Chief of Staff at the Office of Management and Budget (OMB), which means he will play a key role in shaping the administration's economic and legislative agenda.

You read that right. Martin, the former chair of the Missouri Republican Party, who **has publicly advocated for a NATIONAL abortion ban with NO exceptions and imposing criminal penalties on women and doctors involved in abortions**, will play a key role in the Trump administration’s legislative agenda...

_We understand the impulse to look away from the news; to bury our heads in the sand and wait out these next four years. But here’s the thing, we owe it to our grandmothers, our mothers, our daughters, and our friends to stay as active as EVER and fight to defend the hard fought progress from the past century._

**That is why it we at Her Bold Move are working to put safeguards in place by electing pro-WOMEN women to office up and down the ballot.**

[**The news continues to spark understandable outrage, Peter. But there is hope: Please join us in our mission of getting pro-WOMEN women into the rooms where decisions about our bodies are being made by pitching in $20.25 or more today →**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hbm-pac/?refcode=EM_F_241217news_N_JZ_90DO_8_G_testB_L2&amount=20.25)

clean_body: We wanted to highlight some recent updates in the news: | | | | | = We’re concerned by some recent updates, Peter. For the first time in two decades, NO women will lead any committees in the U.S. House of Representatives. According to ABC News , effective Jan. 3rd, Republicans have only chosen white men to lead each of the 17 standing committees driving policy in our nation. This is another troubling sign that women’s issues and women’s rights are in jeopardy. We need women in the rooms where decisions are being made – and we need to defend the hard-fought progress of the last century. The best way to accomplish this is by supporting the women who will be running for office in the coming years and working to get them elected. = Second, an extremist MAGA activist and commentator who raised the idea of JAILING women for obtaining an abortion has been appointed to a top policy job in the Trump administration. Ed Martin will serve as Chief of Staff at the Office of Management and Budget (OMB), which means he will play a key role in shaping the administration's economic and legislative agenda. You read that right. Martin, the former chair of the Missouri Republican Party, who has publicly advocated for a NATIONAL abortion ban with NO exceptions and imposing criminal penalties on women and doctors involved in abortions, will play a key role in the Trump administration’s legislative agenda... We understand the impulse to look away from the news; to bury our heads in the sand and wait out these next four years. But here’s the thing, we owe it to our grandmothers, our mothers, our daughters, and our friends to stay as active as EVER and fight to defend the hard fought progress from the past century. That is why it we at Her Bold Move are working to put safeguards in place by electing pro-WOMEN women to office up and down the ballot. name: David Horowitz
subject: the enemy within
body:
I know if our country stands a chance, Americans must understand exactly how sinister and dangerous the new Democrat Party actually is.| |
---
| | Fellow Patriot, America is on the brink of destruction. I don’t say this to shock or scare you – I say it because it’s true. _What we see today didn’t happen overnight. It’s the result of a movement that began with the Communist revolution in Russia and has been 100 years in the making..._ **...and Barack Obama hit the accelerator button, fast tracking their agenda.** I’d know better than most. When I was a young man, I was one of the leaders of the movement destroying America today. 50 years ago, I was a Marxist revolutionary bent on bringing America as we know it to an end. I stood side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited _Ramparts_ – radical Left's largest magazine. I marched, wrote manifestos, and attacked America whenever and however I could. Then the Panthers murdered my friend, and the Left helped the Communists win the war in Vietnam. My eyes opened to the incredible destruction and evil my “comrades” made possible. So I left and never looked back. I cast my 1984 ballot for Ronald Reagan – then I started the David Horowitz Freedom Center to fight the Left and I’ve dedicated the last 40 years to exposing them. Why? Because I knew first-hand the threat our country was facing. I knew what was at stake and I knew if I didn’t tell the American people what I knew, we would lose our country forever. That’s why I spent 6 months writing** _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_** – and I want you to have your very own copy of it. **[So I’m asking you to stand with me and make a generous, tax-deductible donation of $35 or more to my Freedom Center. As a thank you, I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within.](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=421fe756ee20475e8ef23270c5ba1f3d&_e=ds1Ay7Y39F29S3VIUOxWKpCVN9Gfg-8OlLnHoZOlSitZZ4CFYbP_1Omjr8oYF45YNEeTGs8e0UjTz5w_xIvRGc8_MdiBjDUpQz3ZbMskF9pQRXvDYQuSnWp6TBC_UcqHku9CjEfn-TU_H4k0ayj_ezfFabatxlb97yWerinzfUrPNV2Uw_OVc0q2g-TO03L_uotyrFq2N7ge3YlUi6zLLgVaUanFrO24NCc_t-ZM4uUCO1A-fQNh-luoD2G8WWv4g8FgYc4saZaTNGEPHBSgpPuH4GaOO9fqNz64Dxje9xCUFyvtuLew6_SYcBR8EKb4MzkiVgz_vx1CFa5UAX40rP-R4H1e3P517-C5ypbMnvbiYtt3nTimVksRNZjFvfd120uXlWnVHGiT85sfIFsKNw%3D%3D)** When you think of “the enemy within” you may think of Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi or even Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez...and you wouldn’t be wrong. But make no mistake: **The real mastermind is Barack Obama.** Barack Obama laid the groundwork for everything we’ve seen since 2020 back in 2008. Barack Obama led the destruction of our cities, cozying up to Black Lives Matter radicals and siding with criminals over police upholding the rule of law. Barack Obama championed the castration of our military, making us a laughingstock on the world stage. And Barack Obama was the true architect behind the bogus Russian collusion witch hunt. The devastation and destruction we see today has been over a decade in the making – but most of the American people have no clue what we’re up against. **That’s why I wrote _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_ to explain how communist and fascist Leftists infiltrated and overtook the Democrat Party...** ...how it has become a party of racism and hatred attacking the very foundations of our country... ... and how their ultimate goal is to create a one-party state – and cancel, deplatform and silence every last one of their political opponents by slandering them as “white supremacists” and worse. The reviews speak for themselves... “A Great Book” – Dinesh D’Souza “ _The Enemy Within_ is a book for all patriots who understand that our country is in a fight for its life.” – Mark Levin “David Horowitz does it again in a must-read for any American concerned about where we are headed as a nation.” Laura Ingraham I wrote _The Enemy Within_ because... I know if our country stands a chance, Americans must understand exactly how sinister and dangerous the new Democrat Party actually is. I was the enemy within — and I know in my bones what it will take to defeat them. We’ve reached the point in our history that will decide our future – and we either win these political battles or lose everything that makes us prosperous and free. **[That’s why I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within when you donate $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and give us the ammunition we need to expose the Left’s evil agenda to every American patriot.](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=421fe756ee20475e8ef23270c5ba1f3d&_e=ds1Ay7Y39F29S3VIUOxWKpCVN9Gfg-8OlLnHoZOlSitZZ4CFYbP_1Omjr8oYF45YNEeTGs8e0UjTz5w_xIvRGc8_MdiBjDUpQz3ZbMskF9pQRXvDYQuSnWp6TBC_UcqHku9CjEfn-TU_H4k0ayj_ezfFabatxlb97yWerinzfUrPNV2Uw_OVc0q2g-TO03L_uotyrFq2N7ge3YlUi6zLLgVaUanFrO24NCc_t-ZM4uUCO1A-fQNh-luoD2G8WWv4qZ7wZSnrDcjpxAkKSXL5ytt1A1dfUMNM4b_AHtnRyTxM0bCf-hMHWMw8SQCfK3osOq9-ggNTjWEpl94mUa9g_jaP24WvoUqrilRSun_-AwXnwZxsWJC9E130Cgd9Xm69jUySnBVLBoST4BVYEGEnZw%3D%3D)** The Left is at war with America. They don’t simply disagree with us about how to make our country better – they want to destroy it to make way for their Marxist dystopia. Or in Obama’s own words “radically transform” America. **And they don’t care how much they have to lie, cheat or steal to achieve it.** So it’s up to patriots like you and me to expose the truth about the Left to our fellow Americans while we still can.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
---
David Horowitz
---
P.S. I know how we got to this point in our country, and I know how we get out. But the clock is ticking and our country is hanging by a thread. **[Please make a generous donation of $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and as a thank you, I’ll rush a complimentary copy of my book The Enemy Within to you.](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=421fe756ee20475e8ef23270c5ba1f3d&_e=ds1Ay7Y39F29S3VIUOxWKpCVN9Gfg-8OlLnHoZOlSitZZ4CFYbP_1Omjr8oYF45YNEeTGs8e0UjTz5w_xIvRGc8_MdiBjDUpQz3ZbMskF9pQRXvDYQuSnWp6TBC_UcqHku9CjEfn-TU_H4k0ayj_ezfFabatxlb97yWerinzfUrPNV2Uw_OVc0q2g-TO03L_uotyrFq2N7ge3YlUi6zLLgVaUanFrO24NCc_t-ZM4uUCO1A-fQNh-luoD2G8WWv4Qs5PXIbvyjkvU1_B3zvQ1WDl1LA0u97tSd8usy21qu6dM3mEWkAr5i63F1F0MzB9Yjco1NeqS-nT7tckg0QTRSN7ZMnluoK-MpUPXhIHhzqSgwZFOHNpzsmbH2TNFE2IWeoJGwWiCSsCtMvEZpYFXg%3D%3D)**
---
| | [](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=421fe756ee20475e8ef23270c5ba1f3d&_e=ds1Ay7Y39F29S3VIUOxWKpCVN9Gfg-8OlLnHoZOlSitZZ4CFYbP_1Omjr8oYF45YNEeTGs8e0UjTz5w_xIvRGc8_MdiBjDUpQz3ZbMskF9pQRXvDYQuSnWp6TBC_UcqHku9CjEfn-TU_H4k0ayj_ezfFabatxlb97yWerinzfUrPNV2Uw_OVc0q2g-TO03L_uotyrFq2N7ge3YlUi6zLLgVaUanFrO24NCc_t-ZM4uUCO1A-fQNh-luoD2G8WWv4leOisYzd2IBFFto6GB2FUFsz75lZpkSCf-sW6iwIPOwRzfQGk_lwdkwc4QPPtBSYDivQB5h6H1rsvYZoEkLNqDMF5cX-4f0Q6OWwFMlsAzgLF7yube51ALcv4Usyen3Gc_X3wRUk_1gajnlVGNLLeA%3D%3D)
---

body:
Virginia’s long, beautiful, and complicated history is still being written – and you can be one of its authors.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98885216/518138799/-793144256?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNjZlNmY5ZS00OWJkLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BO1ny-rOtpSoh0xGM3pu6jWjRZNsCfmHcQknGoGp-Qs=&emci=b855e323-86b9-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=f66e6f9e-49bd-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=15759664)
---
Hey Derek, It’s Kelsey. As the Communications Director for DPVA, my job is to tell our story – sharing our vision, amplifying our candidates, and making sure every voter knows what’s at stake in Virginia. But the story of our Commonwealth isn’t just something we get to tell. It’s something we can create. And the truth is, the best stories aren’t built on a whim – **they require a solid foundation, a clear plan, and a reliable team.** That’s why I’m asking you to join us as a recurring donor today. **[When you set up a monthly donation, you’re giving us the tools to plan ahead, stay consistent, and focus on what matters most: keeping Virginia blue and defending the rights of every Virginian. Can you commit to a monthly donation today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98885217/518138800/-807643367?recurring=auto&&&&refcode=E11773-20241218-Storytelling-SL-Other&&&&amount=25&refcode2=f66e6f9e-49bd-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNjZlNmY5ZS00OWJkLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BO1ny-rOtpSoh0xGM3pu6jWjRZNsCfmHcQknGoGp-Qs=)** I know you know the stakes but think about it from my perspective. Your $10 a month could mean:
* **More targeted outreach** so we can talk to voters where they are in ways that resonate.
* **Rapid response campaigns** to counter Republican extremism and misinformation in _real-time._
* **Sustained support** that empowers candidates and organizations to tell their stories effectively.

I believe in the power of storytelling – and I know that Virginia’s story can be one of progress, equality, and opportunity for all. **[By becoming a recurring donor, you’re writing yourself into that story as one of our heroes who made it all possible. Virginia’s long, beautiful, and complicated history is still being written – and you can be one of its authors. Will you join us by pledging a monthly donation today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98885218/518138801/-807643367?recurring=yes&&&&refcode=E11773-20241218-Storytelling-SL-Other&&&&amount=25&refcode2=f66e6f9e-49bd-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNjZlNmY5ZS00OWJkLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BO1ny-rOtpSoh0xGM3pu6jWjRZNsCfmHcQknGoGp-Qs=)** | **************[MAKE THE PLEDGE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98885219/518138802/-807643367?recurring=yes&&&&amount=25&refcode=E11773-20241218-Storytelling-SB-Other&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNjZlNmY5ZS00OWJkLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BO1ny-rOtpSoh0xGM3pu6jWjRZNsCfmHcQknGoGp-Qs=)**************

Together, we’re not just watching as history unfolds – **we’re reclaiming the narrative and making it one of progress, opportunity, and hope for all Virginians.**
With gratitude,
Kelsey Carolan

clean_body: Virginia’s long, beautiful, and complicated history is still being written – and you can be one of its authors. | Hey Derek, It’s Kelsey. As the Communications Director for DPVA, my job is to tell our story – sharing our vision, amplifying our candidates, and making sure every voter knows what’s at stake in Virginia. But the story of our Commonwealth isn’t just something we get to tell. It’s something we can create. And the truth is, the best stories aren’t built on a whim – they require a solid foundation, a clear plan, and a reliable team. That’s why I’m asking you to join us as a recurring donor today. = I know you know the stakes but think about it from my perspective. Your $10 a month could mean: More targeted outreach so we can talk to voters where they are in ways that resonate. Rapid response campaigns to counter Republican extremism and misinformation in real-time. Sustained support that empowers candidates and organizations to tell their stories effectively. I believe in the power of storytelling – and I know that Virginia’s story can be one of progress, equality, and opportunity for all. = | **********=********** Together, we’re not just watching as history unfolds – we’re reclaiming the narrative and making it one of progress, opportunity, and hope for all Virginians.** With gratitude, Kelsey Carolan Director of Communications Democratic Party of Virginia [content goes here] Democratic Party of Virginia PO Box 448 Richmond, VA 23218 United States Paid for by the Democratic Party of Virginia, www.vademocrats.org. USO Supporter,
Every year, the USO is there for our nation's more than 4 million service members and their families, helping them stay connected no matter where they serve. But during the holidays, these connections are even more essential.
This Christmas, instead of waking up in their own beds or sitting down to meals at their own kitchen tables, hundreds of thousands of our military heroes will be deployed around the globe. At the USO, our programs keep service members connected to home and to the people they love.
**With your help, we can provide services like internet connections and warm holiday meals to even more of our heroes in uniform this Christmas, so they can celebrate with their loved ones even while they 're far from home. **
**[And for a limited time, The Coca-Cola ® Company is matching all gifts, dollar for dollar, up to a total of $50,000, so your support will be worth TWICE AS MUCH for service members. Rush a gift of $29 now to support our heroes this holiday season and into the new year.](https://links.e.uso.)****
| [$37.50 CAN HELP
DELIVER 1 CHRISTMAS MEAL](https://links.e.uso.)
---

The holidays are a time for food, fun and relaxing with family. But for so many people in the military deployed far from home, making immense sacrifices to serve our country doesn't stop just because of the calendar. It's up to all of us to make sure they don't feel forgotten this year.
**[Don't miss this opportunity to have the value of your gift DOUBLED before our goal deadline at midnight tonight. Please rush your gift now to bring the joy of connection and warm meals to our military heroes this Christmas and into the new year.](https://links.e.uso.)**
[MATCH MY GIFT](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/rjbeH2Xj_bQR/QnY4TUZJNHcxWTk5ZzMwaGxzRVRyQW1Rd1dvOEtucG1ZZ1poS3FyRURoamlRNENZNjZEL2o3MXZqK3JTRm93cDFNVHUxcktIMGwxM053enUxbVZXZGpHU2JvblNnT2N1RmtRRWVkVFUzVnM9S0/MHZsalV1ZnVzY3BEem1Pd2svZDJpQ3N5cXgwc3pvSW4xWUJKZ1p6ZkhRYWswQzQyZUd6Z2ZGZ0pGYTA2Q3B3bC9SZDZzN2FPMFkwdmo4QzN6bE9uS1hNdWVVVWd6S21SS0)

name: THREE SPECIAL ELECTIONS [From House GOP]
subject: Of all the emails you’ve received today, this is BY FAR the most important
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
If we want to keep Christ in Christmas, defend American values, and keep our country safe, we need you to stay vigilant.
We have a RAZOR-THIN Majority in the House – so if we lose these Special Elections, Democrats could take control of the House.

| |
---
| | | Of all the emails you've received today, this is BY FAR the most important. Why? Because...

_We 're about to have a NEW Special Election in NY-21 for Elise Stefanik's seat, a NEW Special Election in FL-06 for Mike Waltz's seat, and a NEW Special Election in FL-01 for Matt Gaetz's seat!_

**Remember:** We have a RAZOR-THIN Majority in the House - so if we lose these Special Elections, Democrats could take control of the House.

**Remember:** If they take the House, they can stonewall EVERY America First Agenda item President Trump tries to pass through Congress.

**Remember:** If they jam up Trump's agenda, everything we fought so hard for this year will completely COLLAPSE.

name: Robert Antonellis
subject: PRESS RELEASE: STATE POLICE INVESTIGATE MURDER OF MARY JO KOPECHNE.
body:
PRESS RELEASE: STATE POLICE INVESTIGATE MURDER OF MARY JO KOPECHNE. | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/bobforma/press-release-state-police-investigate-murder-of-mary-jo-kopechne?e=eb86c99a95)
---
| | | |
---
|
# PRESS RELEASE:
# STATE POLICE INVESTIGATE MURDER OF MARY JO KOPECHNE
---
| **Medford, MA – For over 50 years, the American public was told that Senator Ted Kennedy's 'bad night' at Chappaquiddick resulted in the accidental death of Mary Jo Kopechne. But was that the whole story? New evidence, submitted by Robert Antonellis, including affidavits and detailed forensic timelines, suggests the official story was a controlled script — one designed to hide a pattern of murders spanning Massachusetts, Pennsylvania, to California.**
---
| **Since 1969, the public has grown to accept the troubling idea that Ted Kennedy left a woman to die to protect his presidential ambitions — there was no alternative narrative yet presented. But now, State Police in MA, PA and CA are reviewing evidence that points to something far more sinister. Antonellis’ review has uncovered numerous “Digital Fingerprints” — symbolic markers, deliberate patterns, and immutable clues pointing to deliberate orchestration.**
**A key example is Mary Jo Kopechne, age 28, born in Scranton-Wilkes-Barre, PA — 250 miles west of Chappaquiddick but on the exact same latitude. Antonellis discovered a chilling link to Joan Marie Dymond, a 14-year-old girl from Wilkes-Barre, who vanished 23 days before Mary Jo’s death. Her remains were found in 2012 about 12 miles from her Wilkes-Barre home.**
**Antonellis calls these “Mirror Image Murders” — east-west symmetry, mirrored ages (14 vs. 28), and mirrored names (Joan Marie vs. Mary Jo). But what caught his attention most was the timing: Mary Jo died two days after the Moon Launch and two days before the Moon Landing — dead center. Joan Marie vanished 21 days before that launch.**
**Antonellis saw traces of the Occult and demonstrates that Mary Jo’s death was a symbolic “Crucifixion at the Dawn of the Space Age” — a direct attack on Christianity, a mock crucifixion of Mary, the Blessed Mother of Jesus.**
**The more he searched, the more “Digital Fingerprints” appeared. The two “21-Gun Seig Heil Salutes” — symbolic timing marks on both Mary Jo’s and Joan Marie's deaths — revealed something much larger. If Joan Marie died on June 25, 1969, it was 21 days before the Moon Launch. Mary Jo’s death also connects to Charles Manson’s infamous Tate-LaBianca murders, which occurred exactly 21 days after Mary Jo’s death.**

---
| **State Police & California Investigations:**
**State Police from Massachusetts, Pennsylvania, and California are now actively engaged. In Massachusetts, Colonel Geoffrey Noble, Superintendent of the Massachusetts State Police, has tasked the Division of Investigative Services to determine if Mary Jo Kopechne’s death should be reclassified as a premeditated murder.**
**Meanwhile, in Pennsylvania, Captain Patrick Dougherty, Commanding Officer of Troop P, has prioritized a review of the case, assigning it to Trooper Andrew Morgantini and Corporal Phil Molecavag. Captain Dougherty stated that there is a “possibility of a double homicide” and confirmed that he will personally review the affidavit.**
**In California, the symbolic timing of the Tate-LaBianca murders orchestrated by Charles Manson draws further attention. These murders occurred exactly 21 days after Mary Jo’s death, matching the 21-day pattern seen with Joan Marie Dymond’s disappearance prior to the Apollo 11 Moon Launch. The “21-Gun Seig Heil Salute” is a repeating motif Antonellis identifies as part of the “Matrix of Murders” — a symbolic gesture tied to occult practices and covert coordination.**
**The Antonellis Affidavit is now under review by Commissioner Sean Duryee of the California Highway Patrol. This review highlights growing recognition of potential links between the Manson murders, Mary Jo Kopechne’s death, and the broader “Matrix of Murders” under investigation. New evidence reveals a chilling connection between the Crucifixion of Mary Jo and 21-days later, the bloody and cruel murders of Helter Skelter, on August 8, 1969, in what was then described as 'The End of Camelot.'**
**Discover More: Available on Amazon****For a deeper exploration of the connections uncovered in this investigation, readers can turn to Robert J. Antonellis's groundbreaking book, The Camelot Murders - The Crucifixion of Mary Jo, available now on Amazon. This comprehensive work reveals the hidden threads behind Mary Jo Kopechne’s death, Joan Marie Dymond’s disappearance, and the broader "Matrix of Murders" that spans across Massachusetts, Pennsylvania, and California. Visit Amazon to learn more.**
**Stay Informed: Get Updates on Case Progress****Stay up-to-date on the latest developments in these ongoing investigations. Visit our website and sign up for notifications to be the first to know when new evidence is revealed or when major breakthroughs occur.**
**Conclusion:****The Matrix of Murders isn't confined to the past but extends into the present. The same geographic symmetry that linked Chappaquiddick to Scranton-Wilkes-Barre extends further west — directly to Oil City, PA, home to the powerful Rosemont Farms, a Democrat stronghold sometimes referred to as the Kerry/Biden Family Farm. This alignment forms a clear line from Chappaquiddick to Scranton to Rosemont. The geographic pattern isn't the only clue — new forensic evidence suggests Butler, PA, was never just another town. Its role in the Matrix of Murders hints at something far more deliberate. As one investigator put it, “Some places are chosen, not by chance, but by design.” The fingerprints are there, and history narrowly avoided being rewritten once again.**
---

But was that the whole story? New evidence, submitted by Robert Antonellis, including affidavits and detailed forensic timelines, suggests the official story was a controlled script — one designed to hide a pattern of murders spanning Massachusetts, Pennsylvania, to California. | Since 1969, the public has grown to accept the troubling idea that Ted Kennedy left a woman to die to protect his presidential ambitions — there was no alternative narrative yet presented. But now, State Police in MA, PA and CA are reviewing evidence that points to something far more sinister. Antonellis’ review has uncovered numerous “Digital Fingerprints” — symbolic markers, deliberate patterns, and immutable clues pointing to deliberate orchestration. A key example is Mary Jo Kopechne, age 28, born in Scranton-Wilkes-Barre, PA — 250 miles west of Chappaquiddick but on the exact same latitude. Antonellis discovered a chilling link to Joan Marie Dymond, a 14-year-old girl from Wilkes-Barre, who vanished 23 days before Mary Jo’s death. Her remains were found in 2012 about 12 miles from her Wilkes-Barre home. Antonellis calls these “Mirror Image Murders” — east-west symmetry, mirrored ages (14 vs. 28), and mirrored names (Joan Marie vs. Mary Jo). But what caught his attention most was the timing: Mary Jo died two days after the Moon Launch and two days before the Moon Landing — dead center. Joan Marie vanished 21 days before that launch. Antonellis saw traces of the Occult and demonstrates that Mary Jo’s death was a symbolic “Crucifixion at the Dawn of the Space Age” — a direct attack on Christianity, a mock crucifixion of Mary, the Blessed Mother of Jesus. The News Media, Liberal Establishment, and Hollywood Elites have been all over TV spewing nonsense about what "the American People want." But I know it 's best to go straight to the source and ask you directly, Peter! "Will you take a few minutes out of your day to complete my Trump Agenda Survey and let me know what matters most to you? " | "Trump " Joe Biden sure made a mess of things. So we need to hit the ground running on day one. "I know this is a busy time of year, but it’s really important we complete this survey ASAP. Will you take a moment to answer these few short questions?" | | "TRUMP AGENDA SURVEY " Survey closes in | "Timer" Thank you for your time today, Speaker Johnson | | | Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. name: The Editors at Broad + Liberty
subject: You're invited to dinner at the Union League
body:
| | | |
---
| | |
---
| **Philly-area thinkers – you’re invited to dinner club.**
---
| If you’re ready to take your place alongside the nation’s leading conservative minds, don’t miss the chance to join Philadelphia’s exclusive cohort of the _National Review Institute_ ’s distinguished Burke-to-Buckley Fellowship Program.

Through engaging discussions over dinner and networking events at the renowned Union League of Philadelphia, those selected to become an NRI fellow will foster meaningful connections among like-minded peers. Together, you will explore how conservative principles apply to your industry and community while gaining fresh insights into their relevance to contemporary society.

_Broad + Liberty_ readers like you are encouraged to [learn more](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=af5261a645&e=b7b3eddce2) about the program, and have special access to an extended **application deadline of December 31st, 2024**.

name: Thulasi Seshan, Evergreen
subject: 📚 Book recommendations to inspire and uplift
body:
Compiled by Evergreen staff and delivered to your inbox
| | | | [](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3159160/87SdQ4wZ) |
---|---|---
---
| Hi there,

2024 has been a year of both progress and grief. Between the election, the climate crisis, and an ongoing genocide, we've weathered storms, both literal and figurative.

Here at Evergreen, so many of us have turned to books to help us stay strong, hold onto our wins, and dream of a better future. |
---
| | | [ ](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3159161/87SdQ4wZ)
---
We've also found joy in sharing our favorite reads with each other, particularly the stories that brought us comfort, knowledge, and hope.

**Because you're part of the Evergreen community too, I wanted to share a list of the books our team loved in 2024, with hopes you'll find something that speaks to you this holiday season:**
---
---
| 🫂 Books that brought us **comfort**
* ["The Unmaking of June Farrow"](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3159162/87SdQ4wZ) \- Adrienne Young
* ["Tell Me Everything"](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3159163/87SdQ4wZ) \- Elizabeth Strout
* ["We've Got People"](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3159164/87SdQ4wZ) \- Ryan Grim
* ["Red Rising"](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3159165/87SdQ4wZ) \- Pierce Brown
* ["What You Are Looking for Is in the Library"](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3159166/87SdQ4wZ) \- Michiko Aoyama
* ["We Will Not Cancel Us"](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3159167/87SdQ4wZ) \- Adrienne Marie Brown
* ["A Short Walk Through a Wide World"](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3159168/87SdQ4wZ) \- Douglas Westerbeke

|
---
| 🧠 Books that gave us **knowledge**
* ["They Can’t Kill Us Until They Kill Us"](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3159169/87SdQ4wZ) \- Hanif Abdurraqib
* ["Blood Over Bright Haven"](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3159170/87SdQ4wZ) \- M.L. Wang
* ["How I Became A Tree"](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3159171/87SdQ4wZ) \- Sumana Roy
* ["What If We Get It Right"](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3159172/87SdQ4wZ) \- Ayana Elizabeth Johnson
* ["The Age of Acrimony: How Americans Fought to Fix Their Democracy, 1865-1915"](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3159173/87SdQ4wZ) \- Jon Grinspan
* ["Revolutionary Power: An Activist's Guide to the Energy Transition"](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3159174/87SdQ4wZ) \- Shalanda Baker
* ["All About Love"](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3159175/87SdQ4wZ) \- bell hooks

|
---
| 🌈 Books that gave us **hope**
* ["How We Live Is How We Die"](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3159176/87SdQ4wZ) \- Pema Chödrön
* ["Project Hail Mary"](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3159177/87SdQ4wZ) \- Andy Weir
* ["The Sum of Us: What Racism Costs Everyone and How We Can Prosper Together"](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3159178/87SdQ4wZ) \- Heather McGhee
* ["This Is How You Lose The Time War"](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3159179/87SdQ4wZ) \- Amal El-Mohtar and Max Gladstone
* ["In the Lion's Mouth: Black Populism In The New South, 1886-1900"](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3159180/87SdQ4wZ) \- Omar H. Ali
* ["Monk and Robot" [series]](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3159181/87SdQ4wZ) \- Becky Chambers

|
---
| There's nothing quite like discovering the perfect book right when you need it the most—whether you need to escape reality or dive deeper into it, understand the world or feel understood, empathize with a stranger or better know yourself. **If there are any books that have brought you comfort, knowledge, or hope this past year,**[**let us know by replying to this email.**](mailto:hello@evergreenaction.com?subject=My book recommendations for Evergreen) We love hearing from you! |
---
| In community, |
---
| | |
---
### Thulasi Seshan
Research Lead
Evergreen Collaborative
---
---
| **P.S.** [You can read more about these books and why we loved them here on our blog!](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3159182/87SdQ4wZ) |
---
* * *
---
| _Evergreen is building the ambitious, actionable policy roadmap for an all-out mobilization to defeat climate change—and to create millions of jobs in a thriving, just, and inclusive clean energy future. None of this would be possible without your support._ |
---
[DONATE](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3159183/87SdQ4wZ)
---
---
---
| | [ ](https://evergreenaction.com/)
---
[ ](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3159184/87SdQ4wZ) | [](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3159185/87SdQ4wZ) | [](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3159186/87SdQ4wZ) | [](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3159187/87SdQ4wZ)
---|---|---|---
1250 Connecticut Ave NW, Suite 700, Washington DC 20036[Unsubscribe](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/page/unsubscribe?q=10843&p=797183&b=356444&hash=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC) | [Privacy Policy](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3159188/87SdQ4wZ) | [View in browser](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/page/email/message/view?ea.campaigner.email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&broadcastId=356444&templateId=354428)All content © 2024 Evergreen Collaborative. But we can fix this if you act now.| | | Friend, At the end of this month, we’ll be submitting something MAJOR: _our first public fundraising report since Jason announced he was running for re-election._ It’s not just about the number of dollars we raise. It’s about the number of donors we have. Every donor we list on our report shows the world:
* One more Virginian who is ready to fight for law & order in the Commonwealth.
* One more Virginian who refuses to let far-left activists seize the Attorney General’s office.
* **_And one more Virginian who is invested in re-electing Jason Miyares._**

Friend, giving ANY amount to Jason’s re-election campaign counts toward our overall donor count. name: Juliana at United We Dream Action
subject: Cruel and unconstitutional
body:
Trump is determined to rip families apart. | | | Peter — Donald Trump is one month away from taking office, and his administration is already planning on targeting immigrant families with the most extreme policies we’ve ever seen. One of his most recent plans is deporting families with mixed immigration status — this includes American citizens who have relatives without legal status. This isn’t just cruel; **it’s unconstitutional**. Trump and his anti-immigrant allies are determined to rip families apart and stoke fear in communities across the country. For us at United We Dream Action, this is deeply personal. We know what’s at stake — our friends, our neighbors, and our loved ones. Trump’s plan to target people because of their family ties is an attack on our fundamental rights and values as a nation. **But we will not stand by and let this happen.** At UWDA, we’re mobilizing immigrants and allies to fight back against Trump’s extreme agenda. Together, we’ll defend our communities, challenge these unconstitutional policies, and protect every family’s right to live with dignity. **[But we need your help to fuel this fight. Will you chip in $10 today to support our efforts and stand with immigrant families?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv6GKGRKiD2A9cpAeztYplr-B85eW5KR2i85l1zhyntpaPWhvSNKc7zMqSF25YK1ATyEJMaoiVdiMBirGUW89rYyETmYIEj-Vks1sMSne66bkKLSX_1onnyH1Wr4O42xKndGYcG2-FDrgkoNfh7oFeUexmHPmzDBYipItDGUNG5_xdu_NFP_pG0U_YrE_ZbM_In2aAC5eTuYi8leJtiJEO6qNm5hb29w1WQPmgK6HdDMzP9QfBeVbS01hs2oy8hF1DAkV7Fml6n8gcB7vmYgg2ztX7auIsvc0oIvsH7NlsH3P317-HTL-nSzDMjOt5LAB-8FNu8qCSbdHcx3hZpbnhz60slpYqkb5dScE5MbJTW9gnQ2A-Ot-2qbn86sA3PRRK0U2sXIuZO--K9OuPpxou1/4ce/lpIDvNuNTiSJkR2Ou8y-ww/h0/h001.GkkqePbAmLgplmdZZdKlhfsfjQg4SO4aUlYfCQKpnkE)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [express donate: $10](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv6GKGRKiD2A9cpAeztYplr-B85eW5KR2i85l1zhyntpaPWhvSNKc7zMqSF25YK1ATyEJMaoiVdiMBirGUW89rYyETmYIEj-Vks1sMSne66bgeZyboQzGuF9Lrw4TkXS3yRxPVZd3F3HjMmLXqfHdLtZHYaXvnbRL_oDWIQ0c3v9jUihanWqLi7NlTUrMnqEqhdu2jrj4bnEbsrSJ8ZhRHEbUodHpBnenDtPIoRa48IJGhnKqifg0Kip_Ss6cu59-ay34Dd19GQh197zuyrGaF9YSbB3aW2MHj5WaAobgSVMg4DwpRNIe-y198dfgLQgcgrVdnX4xcZdn3HtFrWxCdDIP0D7gNLmymIbA04B6pIQx9uHD-fJ-rzK10v3l2nA5xBUWdcZuk1vHENlWT7gnsb43d2C3BIprdwwtiz0X-22g/4ce/lpIDvNuNTiSJkR2Ou8y-ww/h1/h001.6r0x7riphOSyGnh0HCcbncjXt23S74wt3XtsyM9FRew)

clean_body: Trump is determined to rip families apart. | | | Peter — Donald Trump is one month away from taking office, and his administration is already planning on targeting immigrant families with the most extreme policies we’ve ever seen. One of his most recent plans is deporting families with mixed immigration status — this includes American citizens who have relatives without legal status. This isn’t just cruel; it’s unconstitutional. Trump and his anti-immigrant allies are determined to rip families apart and stoke fear in communities across the country. For us at United We Dream Action, this is deeply personal. We know what’s at stake — our friends, our neighbors, and our loved ones. Trump’s plan to target people because of their family ties is an attack on our fundamental rights and values as a nation. But we will not stand by and let this happen. At UWDA, we’re mobilizing immigrants and allies to fight back against Trump’s extreme agenda. Together, we’ll defend our communities, challenge these unconstitutional policies, and protect every family’s right to live with dignity. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | This fight is important, Peter. Families across the country are counting on us to hold the line against Trump’s dangerous policies and ensure that no one — regardless of their immigration status — is torn from their loved ones. name: Dan Carr
subject: The Importance of Local Elections:
body:
Why Grassroots Movements Are Crucial

| |
---|---|---
|
# The Importance of Local Elections:
### Why Grassroots Movements Are Crucial
| | | [Dan Carr](https://substack.com/@dancarr2014)
---
| Dec 18
---
| [](https://substack.com/@dancarr2014)
---
National elections often dominate the headlines, capturing the attention of millions with the drama of presidential debates, congressional races, and Supreme Court appointments. However, it is in local elections that citizens often wield the most significant influence over their daily lives. From school boards to city councils, local offices make decisions that directly affect communities, shaping education, infrastructure, public safety, and much more. Grassroots movements, therefore, play a pivotal role in ensuring these elections reflect the values and priorities of the community.

* **TOP NEWS**

"**Faraway agencies grant Harris County landlords millions in tax cuts,** " Houston Chronicle's **Yilun Cheng** -- "Three faraway Texas government agencies [have quietly erased](https://substack.com/redirect/877af030-4fce-4bd7-912d-49a4520661d1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) $635 million in property value from Harris County's tax rolls, resulting in over $10 million in lost revenues every year for services such as schools, police and hospitals.

Public facility corporations (PFCs) and housing finance corporations (HFCs) are two [once-obscure programs](https://substack.com/redirect/fd8fc215-7082-4c49-9e96-d4f7840468f6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) designed to spur affordable housing development. Empowered by state law, they allow apartment developers to get 100% property tax breaks in exchange for marking some units as "affordable" - a term so loosely defined that it often [results in no meaningful rent reductions](https://substack.com/redirect/c3551419-aee4-4dc0-8a40-7e988402ad4b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).

In recent years, shrewd operators have also found a way to profit from what many consider a program loophole. Since 2021, Cameron County, the city of Pleasanton and a tiny public agency in Austin called SH130 Municipal Management District have teamed up with real estate investors to make at least 17 Harris County properties tax-free.

Most of these deals were done in secret, without the knowledge or consent of local officials.

The government agencies that sponsor the tax breaks -- dubbed by some lawmakers as "traveling" PFCs and HFCs -- collect hefty fees of up to $1 million per project.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $7/mo](https://substack.com/redirect/cd1be822-10e4-4015-a865-7e0513c8a110?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Meanwhile, Houston-area taxing entities, including Harris County and the Houston Independent School District, stand to lose over $10 million in tax revenue every year for decades to come.

The Houston area is grappling with a severe affordable housing shortage, but these tax deals do little to address it, according to researchers, advocates and officials.

A Chronicle analysis found many participating landlords are on track to save tens of millions in property taxes while creating little to no affordable housing. In one instance, a Houston developer used the tax breaks to quickly increase the value of his apartment complexes, flipping them for a $100 million profit.

"There's no absolutely no political accountability for these projects," said **Heather Way** , a University of Texas law professor and affordable housing expert who has closely studied the programs. "It's a get-rich-quick scheme that's coming on the back of the taxpayers."
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $70/yr](https://substack.com/redirect/cd1be822-10e4-4015-a865-7e0513c8a110?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
In 2023, state legislators passed a law banning government agencies from carrying out PFC projects outside their boundaries. Several lawmakers have also vowed to push for similar restrictions on HFCs next year.

Still, these new laws will not undo existing deals that allowed companies to lock in decades-long tax exemptions for their apartments -- some lasting up to 99 years.

Harris County officials denounced this practice, especially as residents already face [growing tax burdens](https://substack.com/redirect/823bcc64-d0f9-4223-8d5d-4f8930f31582?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).

"These exemptions are designed to promote the development of affordable housing in our community," County Attorney **Christian Menefee** said. "However, if bad actors are found to be exploiting these exemptions, my office will not hesitate to investigate and take legal action if necessary."" [Houston Chronicle](https://substack.com/redirect/7f6f8a7a-af05-4820-b5c4-ac55b89424c0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) ($)

body:

| Peter, it’s official: The Cook Political Report is calling the Virginia Governor’s race next year a TOTAL TOSS-UP: [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9d9f26ca-f256-44a4-9777-c1f21d4a7aae/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

---
| | | We’ve been saying this for months now, but it’s true: the Virginia Governor’s race is set to be the most competitive statewide race in the country in 2025. We saw what happened here in Virginia and across the country on November 5 – Trump and Republicans made gains in places Democrats led in 2020. This race is going to draw national attention, and with that comes outside money. We know Republicans are going to pour millions of dollars into this race in order to keep the Governor’s seat red, but Abigail Spanberger knows how to win competitive and tough races, and we know she has what it takes to flip this seat blue. But we can’t be complacent – we need to build up our infrastructure and prepare now. [So, can we count on you to contribute to Abigail’s campaign and Blue Amp Action today to make sure she has what she needs to win this TOSS-UP seat?](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tbae0bea6-3d24-42f2-99c5-c41ccd614ee5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0b4f73db-abb6-44b6-b7e2-f7bddeefe46b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Steve Kerrigan
subject: See you TONIGHT at the MassDems Holiday Party!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Massachusetts Democratic State Committee
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93809/images/Logo.png]
Dear Peter-
I've been looking forward to the MassDems Holiday Party, and I'm very excited that we'll be able to come together as a Democratic community tonight ! I hope you'll join me, Governor Healey, and Lieutenant Governor Driscoll to enjoy cocktails, refreshments and the wonderful company of fellow MassDems.
The Holiday Party will be today, Wednesday, December 18th, at 5:30 PM at the Omni Parker House . During the festivities, we will honor the contributions and leadership of the legislators who will be leaving the Massachusetts State House and Senate. We'll reflect on their impact and thank them for their service as we prepare to continue building a brighter future together.
You can RSVP for the holiday party here [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mdp-holiday24] , and find more details on the invite below:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mdp-holiday24 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mdp-holiday24]
RSVP Here! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mdp-holiday24]
I look forward to seeing you this evening!
Warmly,
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93809/images/Steve%20K%27s%20Signature.png]
Steve Kerrigan
Chair, Massachusetts Democratic Party
https://www.facebook.com/massdems [https://www.facebook.com/massdems] https://twitter.com/massdems [https://twitter.com/massdems] https://instagram.com/massdems [https://instagram.com/massdems] https://www.tiktok.com/@massdems [https://www.tiktok.com/@massdems]

clean_body: [] Dear Peter- I've been looking forward to the MassDems Holiday Party, and I'm very excited that we'll be able to come together as a Democratic community tonight ! I hope you'll join me, Governor Healey, and Lieutenant Governor Driscoll to enjoy cocktails, refreshments and the wonderful company of fellow MassDems. The Holiday Party will be today, Wednesday, December 18th, at 5:30 PM at the Omni Parker House . During the festivities, we will honor the contributions and leadership of the legislators who will be leaving the Massachusetts State House and Senate. We'll reflect on their impact and thank them for their service as we prepare to continue building a brighter future together. You can RSVP for the holiday party here [] , and find more details on the invite below: [] RSVP Here! [] I look forward to seeing you this evening! Warmly, [] Steve Kerrigan Chair, Massachusetts Democratic Party [] [] [] [] Paid for by the Massachusetts Democratic State Committee Massachusetts Democratic Party 11 Beacon St Suite 410 Boston, MA 02108 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

name: Kevin D. Roberts
subject: Know Your Rights
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vs6suQeWNI

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/os6suQeWNI

Dear Fellow Patriot,

Since President Biden came into office
in 2021, government overreach has soared to new heights.

This brazen abuse of power is
unsettling and nauseating.

With today's polarized political
discourse in the public square, we find our conservative values
continually attacked by the increasingly radical elements of the
Left. You and I must band together and fight back to uphold our
shared American principles.

Our beacon in these uncertain times
remains the Constitution.

I know you love our country. And today,
I am reaching out to offer you complimentary access to The
Heritage Foundation's Digital Guide to the Constitution, a
comprehensive tool to help you articulate and defend your
conservative values amidst the political turbulence.

In this digital interactive guide,
you'll discover:

Detailed analysis of every clause
and amendment in the Constitution

Insights from over 100
constitutional scholars and legal experts, including former
Attorney General Ed Meese from President Reagan's tenure

A thorough review of what the
Constitution actually says and discussion of how it applies today

Copies of the Constitution and the
foundational documents that shaped it

You can get instant access to your FREE
guide now using this secure link:
https://secured.heritage.org/constitution

We find ourselves at a crossroads. The
nation is split on pivotal issues. The radical Left is rapidly
expanding the reaches of government into aspects of our lives
that we value as private and independent.

To counteract this shift, we must
enlighten as many conservatives as possible about the liberties
protected by our Constitution.

Understanding this document fully
empowers us to defend it passionately.

To join us in expanding your knowledge
of the Constitution today, please activate your complimentary
access by clicking the following link:
https://secured.heritage.org/constitution

This resource has received national
acclaim as an "excellent guide," and I sincerely believe it ranks
among the most powerful educational materials produced by the
Heritage Foundation. I know you'll find it enlightening and a
daily asset in reinforcing your principles.

Armed with this guide, you'll be
well-prepared to assertively champion the vision of our Founding
Fathers against the radical Left.

I invite you to use this link to get
your FREE Guide to the Constitution today!

Sincerely,

Kevin D. Roberts, Ph.D.

President, The Heritage Foundation

The Heritage Foundation | 214 Massachusetts Avenue, NE |
Washington, D.C. 20002

name: David Horowitz
subject: I’m not saying this to scare you
body:
I knew what was at stake and I knew if I didn’t tell the American people what I knew, we would lose our country forever.| |
---
| | Fellow Patriot, America is on the brink of destruction. I don’t say this to shock or scare you – I say it because it’s true. _What we see today didn’t happen overnight. It’s the result of a movement that began with the Communist revolution in Russia and has been 100 years in the making..._ **...and Barack Obama hit the accelerator button, fast tracking their agenda.** I’d know better than most. When I was a young man, I was one of the leaders of the movement destroying America today. 50 years ago, I was a Marxist revolutionary bent on bringing America as we know it to an end. I stood side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited _Ramparts_ – radical Left's largest magazine. I marched, wrote manifestos, and attacked America whenever and however I could. Then the Panthers murdered my friend, and the Left helped the Communists win the war in Vietnam. My eyes opened to the incredible destruction and evil my “comrades” made possible. So I left and never looked back. I cast my 1984 ballot for Ronald Reagan – then I started the David Horowitz Freedom Center to fight the Left and I’ve dedicated the last 40 years to exposing them. Why? Because I knew first-hand the threat our country was facing. I knew what was at stake and I knew if I didn’t tell the American people what I knew, we would lose our country forever. That’s why I spent 6 months writing** _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_** – and I want you to have your very own copy of it. **[So I’m asking you to stand with me and make a generous, tax-deductible donation of $35 or more to my Freedom Center. As a thank you, I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=02be088e80234379962b5183eb01d8eb&_e=YtXIgKhE1clLrc7A216tX050DNmoPlC-EwQpF41UDQsTbgb3irjsVcymFtqqrd83jlA6y1XzbxJ8pOGVrbHbxMoFBkzRsVDEmic-EIXXeQ1fRwhDzP-bQhJ0pW_3syoNcvKdzVbfWLtLwONjvV4MJB2zq_JPgfkllMx_rsecx4tmxQH1erwwP27b8YaGYA3z5vvxNtTZTMf6tC8zEnB7vQab94U7If1781ErzkLRz2g0ttNFhdOKJLZZB5M9TpawMRXLlZlm1I2iicpw1E2PU-A0KFTfXmA4ZIDzro0yt769DY0z42oDNQ9jloNKaXontLbJJZY8NO2RmC2kn08lwTkmj0Gwc8IwMNxN2zioHnszfrM8By8mLTlPpUybR3RVqI5m4qplFc_yf9OOJZUDBw%3D%3D)** When you think of “the enemy within” you may think of Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi or even Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez...and you wouldn’t be wrong. But make no mistake: **The real mastermind is Barack Obama.** Barack Obama laid the groundwork for everything we’ve seen since 2020 back in 2008. Barack Obama led the destruction of our cities, cozying up to Black Lives Matter radicals and siding with criminals over police upholding the rule of law. Barack Obama championed the castration of our military, making us a laughingstock on the world stage. And Barack Obama was the true architect behind the bogus Russian collusion witch hunt. The devastation and destruction we see today has been over a decade in the making – but most of the American people have no clue what we’re up against. **That’s why I wrote _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_ to explain how communist and fascist Leftists infiltrated and overtook the Democrat Party...** ...how it has become a party of racism and hatred attacking the very foundations of our country... ... and how their ultimate goal is to create a one-party state – and cancel, deplatform and silence every last one of their political opponents by slandering them as “white supremacists” and worse. The reviews speak for themselves... “A Great Book” – Dinesh D’Souza “ _The Enemy Within_ is a book for all patriots who understand that our country is in a fight for its life.” – Mark Levin “David Horowitz does it again in a must-read for any American concerned about where we are headed as a nation.” Laura Ingraham I wrote _The Enemy Within_ because... I know if our country stands a chance, Americans must understand exactly how sinister and dangerous the new Democrat Party actually is. I was the enemy within — and I know in my bones what it will take to defeat them. We’ve reached the point in our history that will decide our future – and we either win these political battles or lose everything that makes us prosperous and free. **[That’s why I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within when you donate $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and give us the ammunition we need to expose the Left’s evil agenda to every American patriot.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=02be088e80234379962b5183eb01d8eb&_e=YtXIgKhE1clLrc7A216tX050DNmoPlC-EwQpF41UDQsTbgb3irjsVcymFtqqrd83jlA6y1XzbxJ8pOGVrbHbxMoFBkzRsVDEmic-EIXXeQ1fRwhDzP-bQhJ0pW_3syoNcvKdzVbfWLtLwONjvV4MJB2zq_JPgfkllMx_rsecx4tmxQH1erwwP27b8YaGYA3z5vvxNtTZTMf6tC8zEnB7vQab94U7If1781ErzkLRz2g0ttNFhdOKJLZZB5M9TpawtSk8JYCTwaObq9AIu5ZWngzCgOADPybRg0q-E2rhoBWoxq1D8qGBqO-dae08gThM7GGM0ssnLIQw7YcFjRw0CAERc8cPIQIHezRLJ_TOYv-7sxCixAG48QvZpks7UDXSfBkx8FggtPBpVLtTW5LcWg%3D%3D)** The Left is at war with America. They don’t simply disagree with us about how to make our country better – they want to destroy it to make way for their Marxist dystopia. Or in Obama’s own words “radically transform” America. **And they don’t care how much they have to lie, cheat or steal to achieve it.** So it’s up to patriots like you and me to expose the truth about the Left to our fellow Americans while we still can.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
---
David Horowitz
---
P.S. I know how we got to this point in our country, and I know how we get out. But the clock is ticking and our country is hanging by a thread. **[Please make a generous donation of $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and as a thank you, I’ll rush a complimentary copy of my book The Enemy Within to you.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=02be088e80234379962b5183eb01d8eb&_e=YtXIgKhE1clLrc7A216tX050DNmoPlC-EwQpF41UDQsTbgb3irjsVcymFtqqrd83jlA6y1XzbxJ8pOGVrbHbxMoFBkzRsVDEmic-EIXXeQ1fRwhDzP-bQhJ0pW_3syoNcvKdzVbfWLtLwONjvV4MJB2zq_JPgfkllMx_rsecx4tmxQH1erwwP27b8YaGYA3z5vvxNtTZTMf6tC8zEnB7vQab94U7If1781ErzkLRz2g0ttNFhdOKJLZZB5M9Tpaw6qBAxIpUTKp_deaYlsVnInk3YnBMMFw8RZ0ZJ7h-UYv5FZ-Mk4Zbm-tC3602EeMaxFNqrMw098oszoprfrAGKW8hnu3X-CgGfNn4G02WQk5Pj-JK1n0zwZT72tbEvCsgsick1Xf7kt-GBv1W6vWN6A%3D%3D)**

Peter, the holiday season should be a joyful time to connect with loved ones, support local businesses, and give back to our communities – but for too many families, it's becoming a time of deceit.

**This shouldn't be what the holiday season is about.**
Scammers and greedy businesses see this season as an opportunity to prey on people just trying to shop for gifts, spend time with loved ones, and travel back home to see their families. And whether it's price gouging on essential goods or utilities during emergencies or cybercriminals targeting online shoppers, the results are the same: lives disrupted, holidays ruined, and safety compromised.
Letitia James is working tirelessly to protect New Yorkers from fraud and exploitation, especially during this time of year.
From illegal price gouging during snowstorms and dropping temperatures to exploiting holiday shoppers, scammers have decided that this is the time to ramp up their fraudulent efforts. **But what they don't know is that leaders like Letitia are ramping up _their _efforts to stop them.**
Having your support in this pursuit of justice is crucial if we're going to have the resources we need to investigate and shut down illegal activity, warn the public, and hold these bad actors accountable. **So let's make sure no family has to fall victim to holiday scams and illegal excessive charges. clean_body: Do you think the government should do more to protect consumers? | | | = | | Do you think the government should do more to protect consumers? | | | | Peter, the holiday season should be a joyful time to connect with loved ones, support local businesses, and give back to our communities – but for too many families, it's becoming a time of deceit. This shouldn't be what the holiday season is about. Scammers and greedy businesses see this season as an opportunity to prey on people just trying to shop for gifts, spend time with loved ones, and travel back home to see their families. And whether it's price gouging on essential goods or utilities during emergencies or cybercriminals targeting online shoppers, the results are the same: lives disrupted, holidays ruined, and safety compromised. Letitia James is working tirelessly to protect New Yorkers from fraud and exploitation, especially during this time of year. From illegal price gouging during snowstorms and dropping temperatures to exploiting holiday shoppers, scammers have decided that this is the time to ramp up their fraudulent efforts. But what they don't know is that leaders like Letitia are ramping up their efforts to stop them. Having your support in this pursuit of justice is crucial if we're going to have the resources we need to investigate and shut down illegal activity, warn the public, and hold these bad actors accountable. So let's make sure no family has to fall victim to holiday scams and illegal excessive charges. | | Do you think the government should do more to protect consumers? | | | | Thank you for standing with us. – Team James | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. James for NY 2026 PO Box 20656 Brooklyn, NY 11202 United States | | Paid for by James for NY 2026

name: DNC HQ
subject: Our records show you haven’t gotten your very own Democratic Member Card before. We’d love to change that this year:
body:
We’re gearing up to release our Official 2025 Democratic Member Card, but first, we need your input.
---
Derek, **We’re getting ready to release our Official 2025 Democratic Member Card, but first, we want to hear from you!** Our records show you haven’t had a chance to get a member card before, and we’d love to change that this year. But the first step is sharing your feedback. Here’s what we have on file for you: _**Democratic National Committee 2025 Member Card Record**_ **Name:** Derek
**Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**Previous Member Card Holder:** No ❌
**Suggested Action:** Share Your Input On This Year’s Designs
**[SHARE YOUR THOUGHTS](https://ak.democrats.org/signup/member-card-design-voter/?refcode=em_20241218_2425_so&t=1&akid=2425%2E22930333%2EEDXEMw)** As a key member of this grassroots team, your input is extremely valuable as we choose this year’s design. [**So we’re asking: Can you take a few seconds to tell us which member card design is your favorite? The sooner we hear from you, the sooner we’ll be able to get the winning design ready to print and ship:**](https://ak.democrats.org/signup/member-card-design-voter/?refcode=em_20241218_2425_so&t=2&akid=2425%2E22930333%2EEDXEMw) [](https://ak.democrats.org/signup/member-card-design-voter/?refcode=em_20241218_2425_so&t=3&akid=2425%2E22930333%2EEDXEMw)
[](https://ak.democrats.org/signup/member-card-design-voter/?refcode=em_20241218_2425_so&t=4&akid=2425%2E22930333%2EEDXEMw)
[](https://ak.democrats.org/signup/member-card-design-voter/?refcode=em_20241218_2425_so&t=5&akid=2425%2E22930333%2EEDXEMw)
[](https://ak.democrats.org/signup/member-card-design-voter/?refcode=em_20241218_2425_so&t=6&akid=2425%2E22930333%2EEDXEMw)
Thank you in advance for sharing your thoughts, and for everything you’re doing.
The Democrats
[**Don’t forget — after you cast your vote on your favorite member card design, make a $3 donation to reserve your card ahead of time.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-december-2024-reserve-member-card?refcode=em_20241218_2425_so&amount=3&refcode2=2425_22930333_EDXEMw&akid=2425%2E22930333%2EEDXEMw)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._
**[CONTRIBUTE $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-december-2024-reserve-member-card?amount=3&express_lane=true&refcode=em_20241218_2425_so&refcode2=2425_22930333_EDXEMw&akid=2425%2E22930333%2EEDXEMw)**

_If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support._
