name: No Dem Left Behind PAC
subject: Who's Really in Charge?
body:
Here is some valuable info we are using to fight dark money in politics.
| | | | | | [](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2vsbrd-owwc9o-kyd76rh6/)
---
# **So... Who's Really In Charge?**
---
| [](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2vsbrd-owwc9p-kyd76rh7/)
---
| | | | folks, Politicians promise change, but too often, the status quo remains. The real question is: who’s truly in control? Is it the voters, or is it the shadowy interest groups flooding our elections with unlimited, undisclosed money? Dark money is the secret weapon of the wealthy few, and it’s time we pay attention.
**What is Dark Money?** Dark money refers to political donations that hide their source. Unlike most donations, dark money flows from politically active nonprofits and LLCs, which are not required to disclose their donors. This means we have no way of knowing who’s really funding political campaigns, leaving voters in the dark about who’s pulling the strings.
**How Does Dark Money Work?** Dark money is funneled through nonprofits and LLCs, often in states with loose regulations. These funds are used to run ads and influence campaigns—without revealing who’s behind them. This creates a system where the public has no insight into who’s shaping our elections.
**Why Does Dark Money Matter?** Dark money is poisoning our democracy. It allows corporations and wealthy elites to influence elections without accountability. Voters deserve transparency, but as long as dark money thrives, our political system is hijacked by those who can afford to keep their identities hidden. History proves that secret donations are a formula for corruption.
**Who Benefits?** The ones defending dark money are the very ones benefiting from it—corporations and the ultra-wealthy. They argue for anonymity, but this only protects their ability to manipulate elections without consequence.
**What Can We Do?** While tracking dark money is difficult, watchdogs like AIPAC Tracker continue to expose the influence of these secret donations. We can push for transparency, but we also need to focus on local elections where we can make a real impact. Education is key—when we understand the corrupt systems in place, we can fight back. [**_It's time to reclaim our democracy. Let’s stand up to dark money and ensure that the voices of the many, not the few, are heard. Together, we can make a difference._**](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2vsbrd-owwc9q-kyd76rh8/)
---
| [Chip in $25](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2vsbrd-owwc9r-kyd76rh9/)

Thank you for your help on this pressing matter, -No Dem Left Behind Team

name: Andy Kim
subject: Restoring integrity to our politics
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andy Kim for New Jersey
body:
Americans deserve to have complete faith in the people who choose to serve in our government and the people they elect.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98909906/518216550/41798106?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNzI3MDFlNi02OWJkLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FbaG82JwPWnUxSjMJkzdYrpPmkX_trhbhji57F4gRc0=&emci=0b5772c2-57bd-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=f72701e6-69bd-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=26261389)
---

| | I ran on restoring integrity to our politics, and that's exactly what I plan to do in the Senate. **Americans deserve to have complete faith in the people who choose to serve in our government and the people they elect.** That means we need to know that politicians aren't profiting off their positions or blindly pursuing power at the expense of the people they serve. From the moment I decided to run for office in 2018, I've prioritized making our government more transparent and holding public officials accountable. But right now, we're entering a moment where corruption and greed are dominating our politics. Billionaires are bankrolling politicians, corporations and PACs are writing blank checks to candidates, and members of Congress are using their positions to get ahead in the stock market. **It's not right, and the American people deserve better than this.** I know for some, New Jersey politics — and politics in general — has a reputation for corruption. Many people and politicians brush it off, saying that's just Jersey. But we can do better in our government. I know New Jerseyans are fed up with dishonesty, greed, and politicians only looking out for themselves and their families. **Now more than ever, our country needs hardworking, trustworthy leaders focused on the common good, bringing integrity into our politics, and bringing people together.** Together, we can create an America where democracy, civility, trust, and respect flourish – and that's what I aim to do in the Senate. More soon, _Andy_ [Donate Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98909907/518216551/-1197072038?refcode=2024-12-18-integrity&recurring=&amount=13&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=f72701e6-69bd-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNzI3MDFlNi02OWJkLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FbaG82JwPWnUxSjMJkzdYrpPmkX_trhbhji57F4gRc0=) |

name: David Horowitz Freedom Center
subject: Who is the enemy within?
body:
The devastation and destruction we see today has been over a decade in the making – but most of the American people have no clue what we’re up against.| |
---
| | Fellow Patriot, America is on the brink of destruction. I don’t say this to shock or scare you – I say it because it’s true. _What we see today didn’t happen overnight. It’s the result of a movement that began with the Communist revolution in Russia and has been 100 years in the making..._ **...and Barack Obama hit the accelerator button, fast tracking their agenda.** I’d know better than most. When I was a young man, I was one of the leaders of the movement destroying America today. 50 years ago, I was a Marxist revolutionary bent on bringing America as we know it to an end. I stood side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited _Ramparts_ – radical Left's largest magazine. I marched, wrote manifestos, and attacked America whenever and however I could. Then the Panthers murdered my friend, and the Left helped the Communists win the war in Vietnam. My eyes opened to the incredible destruction and evil my “comrades” made possible. So I left and never looked back. I cast my 1984 ballot for Ronald Reagan – then I started the David Horowitz Freedom Center to fight the Left and I’ve dedicated the last 40 years to exposing them. Why? Because I knew first-hand the threat our country was facing. I knew what was at stake and I knew if I didn’t tell the American people what I knew, we would lose our country forever. That’s why I spent 6 months writing** _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_** – and I want you to have your very own copy of it. **[So I’m asking you to stand with me and make a generous, tax-deductible donation of $35 or more to my Freedom Center. As a thank you, I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=c870f124244f4c77895fd5d6b21b024c&_e=EhPIh-4lyGux4RK1hJcx-2DVyz0RmjtmD4U2oyO8RClYeUQqk2KPVmLAdTGkx0tnlXlgrFXgpSVWOJjeAX8_e2LztFMdNIHuFn45YtQQJlQomCl50cwGlfp13_QhwtNOox9a1Eus9mTggSHuRM7BIMDNKzik5jSPr5e0NZZS1JiF9jXau7emoeYFLkSp_nqKW2LeBU4Wbz6rLCrbdyI77-s0Y9VSTzc3E8ig9dmLV819lzfajDOEYFZNox1PkKWjBAV40QG76ZFTGGifoKkM8gH2ow0wdbsG8CP454AvTPloy0MLt5VycbmTk3CjYYUXDjnnfFr_FVcMXoolsBbSY7_ML_MFrdfg6gRYtP2MDPko4Z7ogUxUS6_TlcGkhUTyEyem-50Vap7_aymWT7uoDJ2jKRvkP56MK6egIX-C1TQ%3D)** When you think of “the enemy within” you may think of Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi or even Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez...and you wouldn’t be wrong. But make no mistake: **The real mastermind is Barack Obama.** Barack Obama laid the groundwork for everything we’ve seen since 2020 back in 2008. Barack Obama led the destruction of our cities, cozying up to Black Lives Matter radicals and siding with criminals over police upholding the rule of law. Barack Obama championed the castration of our military, making us a laughingstock on the world stage. And Barack Obama was the true architect behind the bogus Russian collusion witch hunt. The devastation and destruction we see today has been over a decade in the making – but most of the American people have no clue what we’re up against. **That’s why I wrote _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_ to explain how communist and fascist Leftists infiltrated and overtook the Democrat Party...** ...how it has become a party of racism and hatred attacking the very foundations of our country... ... and how their ultimate goal is to create a one-party state – and cancel, deplatform and silence every last one of their political opponents by slandering them as “white supremacists” and worse. The reviews speak for themselves... “A Great Book” – Dinesh D’Souza “ _The Enemy Within_ is a book for all patriots who understand that our country is in a fight for its life.” – Mark Levin “David Horowitz does it again in a must-read for any American concerned about where we are headed as a nation.” Laura Ingraham I wrote _The Enemy Within_ because... I know if our country stands a chance, Americans must understand exactly how sinister and dangerous the new Democrat Party actually is. I was the enemy within — and I know in my bones what it will take to defeat them. We’ve reached the point in our history that will decide our future – and we either win these political battles or lose everything that makes us prosperous and free. **[That’s why I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within when you donate $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and give us the ammunition we need to expose the Left’s evil agenda to every American patriot.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=c870f124244f4c77895fd5d6b21b024c&_e=EhPIh-4lyGux4RK1hJcx-2DVyz0RmjtmD4U2oyO8RClYeUQqk2KPVmLAdTGkx0tnlXlgrFXgpSVWOJjeAX8_e2LztFMdNIHuFn45YtQQJlQomCl50cwGlfp13_QhwtNOox9a1Eus9mTggSHuRM7BIMDNKzik5jSPr5e0NZZS1JiF9jXau7emoeYFLkSp_nqKW2LeBU4Wbz6rLCrbdyI77-s0Y9VSTzc3E8ig9dmLV819lzfajDOEYFZNox1PkKWjpLXwf6HK8o0bwopYLlOPCEAkAvN8ls338eD8xfYtCmHqj7ZWHvUsp3TtN6Rj0wixfZB23BHCVjEkeg1JagI5pZTpkfC90KjRBhwAKHWqBRq4elnT_yA7fDd1rP7KRiTpaLfVfV7uillSz5nO33OnXZn8yO-r9j6R1s5RBsSJlCQ%3D)** The Left is at war with America. Or in Obama’s own words “radically transform” America. **And they don’t care how much they have to lie, cheat or steal to achieve it.** So it’s up to patriots like you and me to expose the truth about the Left to our fellow Americans while we still can.

I’d know better than most. When I was a young man, I was one of the leaders of the movement destroying America today. 50 years ago, I was a Marxist revolutionary bent on bringing America as we know it to an end. I stood side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited Ramparts – radical Left's largest magazine. I marched, wrote manifestos, and attacked America whenever and however I could. Then the Panthers murdered my friend, and the Left helped the Communists win the war in Vietnam. My eyes opened to the incredible destruction and evil my “comrades” made possible. So I left and never looked back. I cast my 1984 ballot for Ronald Reagan – then I started the David Horowitz Freedom Center to fight the Left and I’ve dedicated the last 40 years to exposing them. Why? ---
Peter —
You’ve been part of an extraordinary movement to Make America Healthy Again — and we can’t thank you enough.
Together, we ignited a movement, inspired millions, and set the stage for real change. Because of your support, the mission to restore health to our children and end the chronic disease epidemic is now within reach.
With Robert F. Kennedy Jr. nominated to serve as Secretary of Health and Human Services, MAHA Action will carry the mission forward — engaging Americans to actively support the effort to Make America Healthy Again.
At the end of the year, **MAHA Action will take over select campaign assets, including our mailing lists**.
If you’d prefer to end your journey with us now, you can opt-out before the year’s end [using this link](https://www.mahanow.org/unsubscribe?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=opt_out_a1&n=2).
We hope, however, that you’ll choose to stay engaged in 2025 — what we hope will be the most transformative year in our nation’s health.
Thank you for being part of this incredible movement.
Team Kennedy
Disclaimer: Team Kennedy is not soliciting or directing funds raised outside of the Federal Election Campaign Act contribution limits, which can be used in connection with federal and nonfederal elections.

name: Defend Our Movement via Our Revolution
subject: Musk is taking direct aim at our fundraising
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20714?t=1011?refcode=email-20241218_v&akid=7411%2E5885482%2EjtRo69 ]Our Revolution logo

Peter Willis — Trump, Elon
Musk, and the MAGA extremists in Congress are targeting ActBlue — the
fundraising platform that powers our movement. And House Speaker Mike
Johnson said they’re “just getting started.”

Let’s be clear: this is a direct attack on our movement. It’s not enough
for Musk and rightwing billionaires to buy elections, now they’re aiming
to crush the grassroots and silence small-dollar donors and the
progressive campaigns we support.

This is the weaponization of government. Our entire movement, from Bernie
to progressive candidates, is reliant on ActBlue for grassroots donations.
If they’re successful, we simply won’t be able to fund our work to
organize and resist.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20714?t=1057?express_lane=true&amount=22&refcode=email-20241218nd&akid=7411%2E5885482%2EjtRo69 ]Can you chip in today to build up our resources and help us fight back
against these attacks? We rely 100% on grassroots, small-dollar donations
from our movement.

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation to Our Revolution will process immediately.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20714?t=1042?express_lane=true&amount=9&refcode=email-20241218nd&akid=7411%2E5885482%2EjtRo69 ]CHIP IN $9 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20714?t=1043?express_lane=true&amount=22&refcode=email-20241218nd&akid=7411%2E5885482%2EjtRo69 ]CHIP IN $22
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20714?t=1045?express_lane=true&amount=27&refcode=email-20241218nd&akid=7411%2E5885482%2EjtRo69 ]CHIP IN $27 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20714?t=1046?express_lane=true&amount=46&refcode=email-20241218nd&akid=7411%2E5885482%2EjtRo69 ]CHIP IN $46
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20714?t=1047?express_lane=true&amount=66&refcode=email-20241218nd&akid=7411%2E5885482%2EjtRo69 ]CHIP IN $66 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20714?t=1048?&amount=9&refcode=email-20241218nd&akid=7411%2E5885482%2EjtRo69 ]CHIP IN OTHER AMOUNT

Musk and Trump are not just taking aim at ActBlue, they’re on a crusade to
weaken unions, weaponize the FBI, and dismantle government guardrails so
the billionaire class can get richer. The GOP is pushing a bill that even
some corporate Democrats support that would allow Trump to revoke the
nonprofit status of any organization they disagree with.

We’re entering a phase of work where we will be attacked from every angle
by Musk, Trump and the far right. Over Palestinian rights. Over grassroots
fundraising. Over critical social safety net programs. Over worker’s
rights. Over the fight for health care justice. And so, so much more.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20714?t=1054?express_lane=true&amount=22&refcode=email-20241218nd&akid=7411%2E5885482%2EjtRo69 ]The only way we fight back is with grassroots strength. Musk and Trump
have billions — we have you. Can you make a donation today?

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20715?t=1060&akid=7411%2E5885482%2EjtRo69 ]DONATE TO DEFEND OUR MOVEMENT

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1001&akid=7411%2E5885482%2EjtRo69 ]Facebook | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10?t=1002&akid=7411%2E5885482%2EjtRo69 ]Twitter | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11?t=1003&akid=7411%2E5885482%2EjtRo69 ]Instagram | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2355?t=1004&akid=7411%2E5885482%2EjtRo69 ]Youtube | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2356?t=1005&akid=7411%2E5885482%2EjtRo69 ]Website |

Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive
group in America.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13135?t=1008&akid=7411%2E5885482%2EjtRo69 ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the
establishment by committing to be a 2024 Movement Builder with a

name: Sara Jacobs
subject: Before we close out the year, I want to hear from you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
Hi friends – I have a quick request for you.
Will you fill out this short survey about your priorities going into 2025? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/VlDusL6RsEWRaUk4jZ1vnQ2]
I started last year with a resolution to try something new with this email program – to bring you my authentic, personal thoughts, and to create dialogue with my supporters. I’m proud of the community we’ve built, and I want to renew my resolution in 2025 to make this space somewhere we all enjoy connecting.
All of that to say, I really want to make sure that I’m addressing your priorities when I send out emails!
I hope you’ll take just a few minutes to answer this survey and let me know what you’d like to hear about. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/VlDusL6RsEWRaUk4jZ1vnQ2]
TAKE THE SURVEY [https://secure.ngpvan.com/VlDusL6RsEWRaUk4jZ1vnQ2]
Thank you in advance!
-Sara

California’s 51st District

**Next month, we’ll face our first challenges of 2025 – three special elections for seats in the Virginia House and Senate.** | **State** | **Chamber** | **District**

name: Matt Diemer
subject: My friend needs our help
body:
| |
---
Peter, How have you been? It's nice to be in touch with you again. What have I been up to? I've been relaxing. I have been running for congress and involved in Democratic politics for 4 years straight so I know most people think I fell off the earth but I need a break. However, When duty calls I come out to support great Democrats. And my friend JR is the kind of leader who deserves a special shoutout and our support. JR is running for mayor in Calumet City in Illinois. He was a key member of my campaign and he's the exact kind of leader you would want. He's strong, wise, and trustworthy. [Check out his slate website here.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMZFObn8C71RK2BqzNep9Ar6i3YccW8tNpNmcwmM17CHUhzyT2aoRTFqf1piXy_o91a3TPb8zq_FgTryeS-3btQPmDGh2FUXn7rQbJLYX_N6dknZgrq0y-b1r0H58oeezHrQYbTBN3kvjSuCQGnQl2E2AJ53ezk00zLTbHTL4-pVYzIfengH7LGP3Qx6dtdK3gd-Vsx4WlS8uQvlr_gc7ZUAK-rx4odUyuv6I36ZqwL96/4ce/DoS1zHCRSn2_7U8dODdsKQ/h0/h001.bknBRFnQswJkoXNGY-7ZrtWZdYdPOXd7uK_YLqTD-24) Like our efforts to stop Donald Trump, JR is running to unseat a corrupt incumbent who uses the power of the government against his political enemies. JR needs our help funding his campaign. [Will you donate to help JR beat his corrupt opponent?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvIpPBcFVLPZD_Y_BFDYccXTEPBCWab_05leVzXt7c0KWu6mm7SpgIBYRsDxNHcTsKNbRdqUO9jnusVo8seeD-xZjyA0wcisVlrNgdFPCjB4l0jnsVorF4HqSn1muA8P96_tIcRv7-Md-r5mDdxb_mLeY0qmLlUvVVWQn3hLdVWy-m9WTsiNuHsbruMdwjdaGMjFsGjx4x0wGW0BeBAWhmCrh1R-i5Dpc8lssxiYAjf_kgtGlcySxgFt3JtXMMUB29UdRnuKUljTFsZWmUpVaVR09P5bmplqQ7ztMXyC25e9n2RAEDErlD9_1NvBOKFyt8/4ce/DoS1zHCRSn2_7U8dODdsKQ/h1/h001.8GJeZns0bqTowXxXIasuWoM_mB56qgr1aiQlb2p-kPc)

clean_body: | | Peter, How have you been? It's nice to be in touch with you again. What have I been up to? I've been relaxing. I have been running for congress and involved in Democratic politics for 4 years straight so I know most people think I fell off the earth but I need a break. However, When duty calls I come out to support great Democrats. And my friend JR is the kind of leader who deserves a special shoutout and our support. JR is running for mayor in Calumet City in Illinois. He was a key member of my campaign and he's the exact kind of leader you would want. He's strong, wise, and trustworthy. Like our efforts to stop Donald Trump, JR is running to unseat a corrupt incumbent who uses the power of the government against his political enemies. JR needs our help funding his campaign. They are pioneering **"Privatized Universal Basic Income"** powered by technology—not government. Their flagship product, EarnPhone, turns phones from an expense into an income stream, and they’ve already helped consumers earn & save $325M+.
Uber did it to taxis, Airbnb to hotels and now Mode Mobile is doing it to the $1 trillion smartphone industry. name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Direct
subject: Take the National Survey on Socialism
body:
A few years ago, New York magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?”

| | | | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=44447e75c2c24d1e9db7a0df44c561c5&_t=kju_tpwcWHdyFK6paxuHUBxSfNzOTWBExYZ_56R6h84XFJ7d05eEPkb9hMX78m47AYEtRVhZ46r2fTXq_10118ngx0TfO7n4IrAcdGXuaGCT_-SIZ9UtSbnMk0oVQtYU)_
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=44447e75c2c24d1e9db7a0df44c561c5&_e=VGkmvYyGLO15ks7yYK3jLVamBtA4PDx1ULAovHGr65TVZzk1aJAm6pU2BVtBAYrmWcsBkrPQBkdVjuOXJfoCCrsacuTJLn0IZ4rni1TSCbDZFFL9uDfhMxWs6ULboy6RpV08u4y_beZ1UW0nZG9c5hjJG6vTTXSimOMxZVjeDzkTxo5jP5JhqKqh9Uq691CE-lh7ZbTZIVOE2JtCAUpgpRC_VvYZHgku2c_2kLxg102i2lMRcrTgAViV67GidUDwgR1_COM0OEeJzz88JPII_ko4CB8ky1EszjHoTUzJcwD6p3lidW3pW1cruELahpp0n7H4Kr-uiq-tkmj1ez8mYmb1nxNSQYs7mzRMq3l-HREYS2uZMAN_aKgXEBHVoABC)
| |
Dear Fellow American, A few years ago, _New York _magazine posed the question: "When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?" This is, of course, an exaggeration. But it makes clear that the far-Left in America aims to bring about a "Great Reset" of our economy and our way of life. In a recent issue of _Imprimis_ --Hillsdale College's digest of liberty--author Michael Rectenwald described the economic goal of the Great Reset as "'capitalism with Chinese characteristics'--a two-tiered economy, with profitable monopolies and the state on top and socialism for the majority below." Today, as a supporter of liberty, you can help Hillsdale College understand the extent of support for--and opposition to--socialism. Your input will help us develop the most effective strategy to fight for the future of liberty in our country. **Will you please share your views on the political, social, and cultural forces promoting socialism in our country by completing your National Survey on Socialism using the secure link below?** **[https://info.hillsdale.edu/socialism-survey](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=44447e75c2c24d1e9db7a0df44c561c5&_e=VGkmvYyGLO15ks7yYK3jLVamBtA4PDx1ULAovHGr65TVZzk1aJAm6pU2BVtBAYrmWcsBkrPQBkdVjuOXJfoCCrsacuTJLn0IZ4rni1TSCbDZFFL9uDfhMxWs6ULboy6RpV08u4y_beZ1UW0nZG9c5hjJG6vTTXSimOMxZVjeDzkTxo5jP5JhqKqh9Uq691CE-lh7ZbTZIVOE2JtCAUpgpRC_VvYZHgku2c_2kLxg103hhcIwAizHZrMS9Hqnhe8at51JptydMF-X6D2Bh9oZ_D-1pzEQY52HiDJB5pGGn8a0edqXFJiYb4l6hu6NOPOrxZKID7PML8CO2BX0JSjSSftMNkWlKcNYvQtkTeN717NspjAXqtobZbatUzxBBP4Q)**
## Do you believe politicians who encourage young people to embrace socialism are doing a disservice to the country?
[YES](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=44447e75c2c24d1e9db7a0df44c561c5&_e=VGkmvYyGLO15ks7yYK3jLVamBtA4PDx1ULAovHGr65TVZzk1aJAm6pU2BVtBAYrmWcsBkrPQBkdVjuOXJfoCCrsacuTJLn0IZ4rni1TSCbDZFFL9uDfhMxWs6ULboy6RpV08u4y_beZ1UW0nZG9c5hjJG6vTTXSimOMxZVjeDzkTxo5jP5JhqKqh9Uq691CE-lh7ZbTZIVOE2JtCAUpgpRC_VvYZHgku2c_2kLxg100ypXyVGcsxR1TDCRUjvAcZJPgSa8svk0M40VYAx5RwnKmGSvcSnZXa0_nTNBwk4IKDFoBqB2TJmuY8lJmz8BNH4Et_5xSlCH9XMAvXAfrEzk0RKrCzujCJ0eeqLvwJtWYI_9PLRgdfG2nvGdfMnqZa) [NO](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=44447e75c2c24d1e9db7a0df44c561c5&_e=VGkmvYyGLO15ks7yYK3jLVamBtA4PDx1ULAovHGr65TVZzk1aJAm6pU2BVtBAYrmWcsBkrPQBkdVjuOXJfoCCrsacuTJLn0IZ4rni1TSCbDZFFL9uDfhMxWs6ULboy6RpV08u4y_beZ1UW0nZG9c5hjJG6vTTXSimOMxZVjeDzkTxo5jP5JhqKqh9Uq691CE-lh7ZbTZIVOE2JtCAUpgpRC_VvYZHgku2c_2kLxg103zYIU0Pl23TK5ppAybuTRZBCtZ-2CGmlMOx11V9FJpHLIGBCU8zDPpKjejGMFxwAgoL3-VRHcQFfh1XiK1ONTN6jR4WzEKEv4-AGz03gu8bwA9hLaZ6qA1ptGRwGh8PzxWYXMP0gD5dHREO3R-Rj4D) Sadly, socialism is becoming increasingly popular, especially among the young. You may be aware of a SHOCKING survey showing that... **. . . during the COVID-19 pandemic, support for socialism among those 16 to 23 years old jumped to 49 percent, and socialism also increased in popularity among all ages. ** **Why is this?** Draconian government lockdown measures destroyed businesses and eliminated competitors of corporate monopolists. These policies were a dream come true for corporate socialists. At the same time, too many young Americans have not been taught what socialism really means. Or the dismal history of its failures wherever it has been tried. This is a result of the far-Left's "long march through the institutions"--including colleges and universities, K-12 schools, and the media. Marxist-inspired critical race theory is a prime example. Once confined to the classrooms of far-Left professors, critical race theory has infiltrated every level of government, as well as school boards and even the military. But it is in our schools where the effects of critical race theory--which teaches young Americans to categorize their fellow citizens according to race--are most dangerous. You may recall that many young Americans with college degrees who championed socialist policies participated in the riots and violence we witnessed in the summer of 2020. In the face of well-financed and widespread efforts to destroy free markets and individual liberty, Hillsdale's work to **reach** and **teach** millions has never been more urgently needed. **That 's why I need your thoughts quickly. ** By responding to the **National Survey on Socialism **in the next five days**, **your honest opinions will help us understand the recent rise of socialism and develop our strategy to **reach** and **teach** increasing millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. We hope to hear from friends representing every part of the country. Education is the surest way to turn back this dangerous trend. And your partnership with Hillsdale College is critical. As Winston Churchill said, "Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy." If you agree, please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Socialism** today. **[https://info.hillsdale.edu/socialism-survey](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=44447e75c2c24d1e9db7a0df44c561c5&_e=VGkmvYyGLO15ks7yYK3jLVamBtA4PDx1ULAovHGr65TVZzk1aJAm6pU2BVtBAYrmWcsBkrPQBkdVjuOXJfoCCrsacuTJLn0IZ4rni1TSCbDZFFL9uDfhMxWs6ULboy6RpV08u4y_beZ1UW0nZG9c5hjJG6vTTXSimOMxZVjeDzkTxo5jP5JhqKqh9Uq691CE-lh7ZbTZIVOE2JtCAUpgpRC_VvYZHgku2c_2kLxg103XABTn9-eVAIod4eJ3WSMITs4D5FXIT2vvKltHsIk4ZVKzFmapwIfbBY9XDyMrPMUHzUHkaJmAK4tox58joJn2a9Us4kpHVp4QSUjE2muDjOLiJ4QWdEZDRX6i_Z0Im9Drq-w8Ulhk8PnpwDebx44h)** Despite the recent successes of the far-Left, we must remember--**it is NEVER too late to defend liberty through education**. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

That 's why I need your thoughts quickly. By responding to the National Survey on Socialism in the next five days, your honest opinions will help us understand the recent rise of socialism and develop our strategy to reach and teach increasing millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. We hope to hear from friends representing every part of the country. Education is the surest way to turn back this dangerous trend. And your partnership with Hillsdale College is critical. As Winston Churchill said, "Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy." If you agree, please represent your state and take the National Survey on Socialism today. Despite the recent successes of the far-Left, we must remember--it is NEVER too late to defend liberty through education. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 .

### The response to my viral article yesterday has been outrage, appreciation, and a bizarre demonization of Islam and Muslims -- here's what's wrong with that picture
| | [Qasim Rashid, Esq.](https://substack.com/@qasimrashid)
---
| Dec 18
---
| [](https://substack.com/@qasimrashid)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=153319699&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUzMzE5Njk5LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTczNDU0ODQ2MCwiZXhwIjoxNzM3MTQwNDYwLCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMjU1MDIyMyIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.hu7WJjjd8nNVqA-Fjqed-_-6I8ZjtXRqTTF10Lg8Mlw&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=153319699&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUzMzE5Njk5LCJpYXQiOjE3MzQ1NDg0NjAsImV4cCI6MTczNzE0MDQ2MCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI1NTAyMjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.x1AmUQu2bYT5gj7hGkGnp-WixUsjJiLfrlq8dQLC3y4&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=153319699&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUzMzE5Njk5LCJpYXQiOjE3MzQ1NDg0NjAsImV4cCI6MTczNzE0MDQ2MCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI1NTAyMjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.x1AmUQu2bYT5gj7hGkGnp-WixUsjJiLfrlq8dQLC3y4)

---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/qasimrashid/p/place-blame-for-maga-abortion-bans?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

My article yesterday on [South Carolina MAGA extremists introducing a bill to execute women who receive an abortion](https://substack.com/redirect/720ca237-a595-47bb-b4d0-d81b68b8a21f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), has already been read by more than 50,000 people, with praise from [MSNBC's Joy-Ann Reid](https://substack.com/redirect/b39ad476-0d06-46bd-bdc2-0e6a8b9cc865?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), and re-posted thousands of times across the Internet.
And in response, I've received dozens of comments and messages appreciating the insight and the calls to action. And, I've received responses to the effect of, "_What is this Shariah law_?" or "_What 's next? Burkas_?" or "_Might as well live in Afghanistan_." Here's the thing. Demonizing Islam and Muslims is not the answer to the crisis we face, both because it ignores the root of this crisis, and because it further demonizes an already marginalized community in the United States. **Let 's Address This.**
As Legacy media continues to fail to hold the powerful accountable, your support of _Let 's Address This_ remains more critical than ever. **Please become an active member of this community and subscribe.**
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack..m06wT6rl12koTr2wsw8T9VtzWKM1FuqHgphDkHPBN80?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=153319699)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/30f7b416-12b7-4f99-bea5-dda0d209001a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
It is critical we understand that the right wing extremism we are seeing in the United States is home grown. It is not due to any 'outside' faith, religion, or nationality. These MAGA abortion bans calling to kill women who get an abortion are 100% "Christian" nationalism. (I put the word Christian in quotation marks to ensure I distinguish from the compassionate teachings of Christ vs the right wing theocratic extremists we're witnessing in political power). Any attempt to allege that right wing 'Christian' extremists hijacking Christianity to Christianize America and demand Christian theocracy is anything _but_ homegrown extremism is both false, and dangerously misses how to address this crisis.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/ce932cd3-38bf-4c18-bf7b-5f35ef2e32ce?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
A snapshot of the responses I've received to my article about MAGA extremists introducing a bill to kill women who receive an abortion.
Likewise, please understand that it is incredibly racist to see something xenophobic, misogynist, or unjust done by American citizens (who, again, claim they are Christian no less) and respond with "What are we a bunch of Muslims?" Such a response divests us as Americans of responsibility, accountability, or influence to counter these acts of extremism. We can rectify them, but it will require recognizing them for what they are, not by fabricating a charicature in our minds that does not exist in reality.
Finally, for those actually interested on what Islam has to say on the issue of abortion, Islam takes a very similar approach to Judaism in prioritizing the life of the mother. So, as your friendly local American Muslim and lawyer, I'm here to remind you Islamic Sharia permits abortion generally up to 120 days, and also for rape/incest, when the fetus is non-viable, to save the mother's life--and most importantly--as a decision between a woman and her physician.
So my gentle ask is--stop using our faith as your punchline. MAGA abortion bans are 100% 'Christian' nationalism, and it is critical we stand united across all faiths and no faith against this extremism. Because in doing so, not only do we prevent xenophobia and misinformation from spreading, but just as if not more importantly, we stand the best possible chance of ensuring we are blocking bad legislation, and advancing meaningful legislation to protect women's healthcare.
**Quick Ask!** I am doing everything in my power over the next four years to stave off fascism in the United States, and I need your support.**Subscribe and join the movement.**
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack..m06wT6rl12koTr2wsw8T9VtzWKM1FuqHgphDkHPBN80?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=153319699)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/a61e56e5-c88d-4e06-9892-ca8cc5503ab7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|

name: JanePAC
subject: $219 million
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
Chevron, Exxon, and their allies are buying political power.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98914681/518232268/1328794144?refcode=ea.111dea16-72bd-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ms=ea.111dea16-72bd-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjExMWRlYTE2LTcyYmQtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=N4nofnULJyMPtDGENfxaXufXcl1azk46HO7nePoyXEM=&emci=081dea16-72bd-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=111dea16-72bd-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=4823105)
---
**_$219 million_.** That’s how much the oil and gas industry spent on federal politics during the 2023–2024 election cycle. **That’s a staggering _$84 million more_ than the industry spent to influence the 2022 elections.** Big Oil sees their contributions as just a drop in the bucket compared to what they stand to gain with a pro-oil Congress and a Trump administration in power. Expanded drilling, rolled-back protections, and billions in new subsidies would send their profits soaring — at the cost of our climate and our communities. **[So, what’s it worth to you to stop them? Chip in now to support bold climate leaders who will fight back against Big Oil’s money and power at every level of government.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98914683/518232270/2105508926?refcode=ea.111dea16-72bd-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ms=ea.111dea16-72bd-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjExMWRlYTE2LTcyYmQtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=N4nofnULJyMPtDGENfxaXufXcl1azk46HO7nePoyXEM=)** | [**DONATE**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98914685/518232272/2105508926?refcode=ea.111dea16-72bd-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ms=ea.111dea16-72bd-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjExMWRlYTE2LTcyYmQtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=N4nofnULJyMPtDGENfxaXufXcl1azk46HO7nePoyXEM=)
---
The fossil fuel giants may have the money, but we have something even more powerful. We have _you._
In November, grassroots supporters like you made it possible for us to **elect nearly 100 climate champions across the country in high-stakes races.** These leaders will be the firewall we need in 2025 to stop Trump and his dangerous national agenda in its tracks.
The fossil fuel industry has billions of dollars to spend. But they can’t buy the dedication, and passion of a movement fueled by people like you.
Together, we can build a future where communities, not corporations, set the rules. But that future depends on what we do today. **[Will you chip in now to fight back against Big Oil?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98914687/518232274/2105508926?refcode=ea.111dea16-72bd-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ms=ea.111dea16-72bd-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjExMWRlYTE2LTcyYmQtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=N4nofnULJyMPtDGENfxaXufXcl1azk46HO7nePoyXEM=)**

clean_body: Chevron, Exxon, and their allies are buying political power. | $219 million. That’s how much the oil and gas industry spent on federal politics during the 2023–2024 election cycle. That’s a staggering $84 million more than the industry spent to influence the 2022 elections. Big Oil sees their contributions as just a drop in the bucket compared to what they stand to gain with a pro-oil Congress and a Trump administration in power. Expanded drilling, rolled-back protections, and billions in new subsidies would send their profits soaring — at the cost of our climate and our communities. = | = The fossil fuel giants may have the money, but we have something even more powerful. We have you. In November, grassroots supporters like you made it possible for us to elect nearly 100 climate champions across the country in high-stakes races. These leaders will be the firewall we need in 2025 to stop Trump and his dangerous national agenda in its tracks. The fossil fuel industry has billions of dollars to spend. But they can’t buy the dedication, and passion of a movement fueled by people like you. Together, we can build a future where communities, not corporations, set the rules. But that future depends on what we do today. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Onward, Jane Fonda Climate PAC | = | = = Follow along: | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. body:
Voter Action Project Logo [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=121824_1&amount=25]
@RecorderDannyO: **Important** It is with great disappointment that I share that the Veteran Photo-ID Cards issued by Ohio County Recorders’ Offices appear to no longer be considered eligible forms of voter ID. This change is part of the new voter ID law, HB 458, signed into law on 1/6/23. [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA007/1/89215/images/Ohio_VeteransID.png]
Ohio counties are grappling with the impact of their voter suppression law that enacts stringent voter identification laws.
Franklin County, home to the state capitol of Columbus and more than a million Ohioans, is among the counties that has announced that they're no longer able to accept veterans photo ID cards issued by the county as proof for voting because of Ohio's law.
Team: We're looking to hear from our supporters about this issue. Will you take our one-question poll right away?
Should states with voter ID requirements expand or further restrict the types of IDs they accept?
By clicking a response below your answer will be automatically recorded:

Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.

Well, this is rich. MSNBC’s Stephanie Ruhle—yes, that Stephanie Ruhle, ever the defender of Vice President Kamala Harris—is now openly praising President-elect Donald Trump for his accessibility. If you’re scratching your head wondering how a staunch liberal commentator ended up complimenting Trump, of all people, don’t worry; you’re not alone. But let’s take a closer [...]

subject: Social Security benefits are at risk
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE
body:
While Washington remains gridlocked, Dr. Raul Ruiz is committed to serving and helping constituents with the problems they have with the federal government and cutting red tape. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/dAfRehWDrkq5GdVTndjWgA2?unsubscribedata=9G5v%2FcUCKrCLINu9TRtvzmZOhCVwwn6lIhRGHMbOZrJs%2BBDNsgrVA42kqdj67drPrRVQ30Fm0SEgUKTir2aBl0emJGa7%2FHzORbeNREsARfGjMXiB0UUe6ZuCP4M78nU37ai2%2F4UeQd%2FahswZXzaoWBkf8iDB32EZjeUGB4wTV8mZ4l8p6Hgq0UEhLvC%2BhM4mKYehvptqxtjXVV7942Rdp%2FVO0bYlacx0TxJB8Ur3NdTWM2yOaOtQyqu68RS49dvvSi2hmoE1UI8qviZcTEGIwcgxODcrmUY1MWzC%2BMJSw9yhHMrwOePa34B8llMdjPWU55ACvJABPkEukA8RT7pfLzf77BZJ5Vfm5yHy9RcDCuKfO4JYnO9z8GVTnSDL23ZAHf%2Bz7S5VUkFbdKw0q02EfV9mMyN2BQomVtPjVfxyCV7hybwdMd4Uquqphlf03AQ8)
---
| |
---
In Congress, I’ve made it a top priority of mine to protect and expand Social Security benefits and ensure that no Californian is left behind. That’s why I was proud to vote in favor of protecting Social Security to ensure that our seniors continue getting the benefits they deserve. But with Republican control in Congress and the White House, MAGA extremists have more opportunities than ever to make good on their promise to slash Social Security — _**and we have to respond.**_ [Will you join me in calling on all Republicans in Washington to protect Social Security and our seniors?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98915519/518234771/-500338443?source=SBD_EM_ENG_30DO_121824_1_1_SocialSecurity_RE&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDc4NzAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTk1OThjODEtNzRiZC1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAwZDNhOWQ1ODQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=jsH-1ndr7R77Ygn-LWfZJ138BCXsuJwSGtIpqwxbSo0=&emci=57598c81-74bd-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=59598c81-74bd-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=4131986) | | **[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98915520/518234772/-500338443?source=SBD_EM_ENG_30DO_121824_1_1_SocialSecurity_RE&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDc4NzAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTk1OThjODEtNzRiZC1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAwZDNhOWQ1ODQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=jsH-1ndr7R77Ygn-LWfZJ138BCXsuJwSGtIpqwxbSo0=&emci=57598c81-74bd-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=59598c81-74bd-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=4131986)**
---
In moments like this, it’s more important than ever that we stand united in defense of the millions of Americans who rely on these lifeline programs.
We need 10,000 signatures before the end of the week if we want to send a powerful message — and I’m counting on your help to do it.
[That’s why I’m asking: Will you take just a moment of your time to stand with me and other House Democrats who are fighting to preserve Social Security?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98915522/518234773/-500338443?source=SBD_EM_ENG_30DO_121824_1_1_SocialSecurity_RE&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDc4NzAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTk1OThjODEtNzRiZC1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAwZDNhOWQ1ODQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=jsH-1ndr7R77Ygn-LWfZJ138BCXsuJwSGtIpqwxbSo0=&emci=57598c81-74bd-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=59598c81-74bd-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=4131986)

clean_body: Your impact inside | = Peter, Our 2025 Early Bird Membership Drive is here! To start the new year strong, we've set a goal of gaining 10,000 new members before midnight tonight. As you know, more EMILYs List members means more support for our candidates, so this is an all-hands-on-deck effort. As I'm planning for the new year, I thought I would take a look at this year's membership records to get a baseline for the level of support we can expect. Here's what I found for you, Peter: EMILYs LIST 2024 MEMBERSHIP RECORD Prepared for: dpwillis67@gmail.com Donor Status: You are not yet an EMILYs List donor. 2024 Membership Status: Our records show that you are NOT currently an EMILYs List member. But don't worry, we can change that! = | = It's time to think about all we can achieve in 2025. There is a lot of work to do and a lot at stake. That's exactly why we need 10,000 new members before this drive is over. Hitting that goal means we can plan on far-reaching candidate recruitment, the best training and political advising in the business, and supporting a robust pipeline of successful EMILYs List women all year long. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you, Callie Fines (she/her/hers) Chief Financial Officer, EMILYs List If you've donated recently, with a different email address, or offline, thank you! Patriot,

The National Security Council (NSC) is one scary outfit.

It exists to advise the President on matters of national security. It is authorized to identify threats, including United States citizens, who are threats to our country and place them on a “kill list.”

While no public records exist of anyone targeted on the kill list, the decisions of the NSC funnel down into the Obama-created "Disposition Matrix," and whichever unlucky soul ends up as a record on that database typically ends up being **wiped from the face of the earth.**

[](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw80c1unDAQwPGnGW4gPGM-9sBhN2jVQyP1K1XbS-TYY9YNBgSGDW8fgdBef_rL49EoP7TOrhUUF0C8OTMBItAZEOdAv9XLy_O4xuvlHt8JeWPAp6Nc8NF2Wp0vy_z1z6__08e5__l3-e4X8ajDOvCjPUYm7JVrNy3qyFQSlbA64koUJLMsRaLoVkkjjDpZElyUJes8wzIlWwiypDMsTpGrMEUpUJTiRKmQSaZkkUmJtqQstWUJMt0HJXZkDjfXvfNolGvXRPc-aqtbCMO0f-wKeJ1YzyMnqmPTh60AvPbvzJY9G6easZ-HjXwTd5OO_Vvce6DrHPxr4NED1TYYAZhvMvXzqBmoPvKDt5dmv_MhWvlBuaYDqv0bYK58P3cBqMYMMH_tWmeA6uyp-ZfP3_LLlx33W1H9_IM0i48xGisz3F3buikvQKbNvvS241LhZwAAAP__DQOWUg)
With such an intense job, I was shocked when one of our undercover investigative journalists was able to sit down with a top advisor at the NSC and listen as he gushed about his job.

Our journalist’s date was Henry Appel, a member of the National Security Council who was quick to establish his importance, including his heavy involvement in the Ukraine War.

**[Watch here and help fund our undercover journalists.](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw80b2OozAQwPGnGTqQPbaBFBTJoVS3xX1sdFetvPYQfMGAjCHL259AKO1Pf3k8Gu3HzjVrBcUFEFtnJ0AEcQbEOYqbfn9_C2u6Xp7pUyBtDPjtKBd8tb3R58syf__z-9_0dR5-_V1--IW_6riO9GqPkRl57bpNizqxlUTNG5NQxQshlWIoRNJWJIxhuTWsLBmeJCdTFJwsR2NzRSeVuAoZSo685CfBuMyUloWSEptSKNaUJUi2D8qaQBRb1z8oWO26NTODT7qqjXGc9o9dAa8TmTlQpnuyQ9wKwOvwIGrIk3X6HoZ53Mjf034yqf9MBw_iOkf_ESl4EHUTLQfMN5mGORgCUR_5wdtLs9_5EKP9qN29B1H7T8Bc-2HuI4gaFWD-0XfOgqgft_WkbHlr9Y77rUT99lMY4l8hCZUdn67r3JQXINl9X3rbcanwfwAAAP__hHGXEw)**

Henry has a flair for "oversharing," and before his date with our journalist, he texted, "I have a lot of tea to spill." During the date, he said, "Here's some tea. **Joe Biden is, like, dead**. Not literally. Like, he can't say a sentence."

**You can’t make this s**t up!**

**[Watch here for the rest of our undercover report.](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw80c2OmzAQwPGnGW5BeMZ87IFDUpRT99B2s-qeVgaPE3cxIGNI6NOvQCjXn_7yeDTKDa01Swn5CRBvVo-ACHQExCnQu7pcXv1yWE73w52QVwb8sZczPtuuUcfTPP38-_ZvfBz7Px_zLzeLZx2WgZ_tPjJmp2y7al5FupSohGkiLkVOMk0TJIpuZVEw11lKKuWaRCG1pNq8FLnOMdOGdGRLTFAKFIV4oUTIOFUyT6VEU1CamKIAmWyDYuOZw812X-y1su0SN72L2vIWwjBuHzsDnkduJs-x6lj3YS0Az_0Xs2HH2qqr76dhJXc9dGNzcPWhd0DnKbjPwN4BVSZoAZitMvaTbxio2vOd15cmt_EujXKDstcOqHI1YKZcP3UBqMIUMPvsWquBqv-X-uNx5Lf3-4bbrah6_U0Ni4ePfKmHu21bO2Y5yOS6Lb3uOJf4HQAA___pZ5e8)**

2024 has been a banner year for O'Keefe Media Group. Investigations like this one are ONLY possible with your support, and as we continue to grow, so do our expenses. **[After you watch, help us meet our funding goals by donating as much as you can now.](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw80buOpDoQgOGnKTIQVJlbQNB9EDrBTrCXWe1EIzcuN57BwBpDD2-_AqFOP_1yuVTSTr3RWwX5FRA7o2ZABLoA4uLpt3x9fXFbuF0f4YOQdwb87yxXfLZDKy_Xdfn259fH_HUZf76t3-2aPGu_Tfxsz5ERW2n6XfM6UJVAmeg24CrJSaRpjERBV-lbTlzeWpRSFbLMdCEyyhHLOM_KOC0DU2GMIsGkSEqKExGlUuSpEKgLSmNdFCDiY1CkHbPvzPDJTknTb1E72qCvOu-n-fhYA9jM3C6OIzmwGv1eADbjJ7Nmy8rIuxuXaSd7D4e5De0tHC1Qs3j77tlZoFp7lQBmu8zj4loGqs_85P2lxR58SivtJM19AKrtDTCTdlwGD1RjCpi9D71RQPV1eOua_y_px98Dj1tR_fKDWk6-XOAqNT1M35s5y0HE92Ppfce1wn8BAAD__zE6lrU)**

subject: We can’t retreat into our homes
body:
God made man and God made woman. The attempts to deny those basic truths, are attempts to deny the truth of God. | |

| | Dear Fellow Conservative,
---
| | I'm writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.Actually, in my case, it's a slippery _slide_. My name is Riley Gaines and I'm the University of Kentucky swimmer who had to compete against a fully intact 6'4" _male_ swimmer dressed in a women's bathing suit.And after he stole the victory I had worked for my entire life, I had to go back to the women's locker room and undress out of my wet bathing suit while he did the same next to me.
---
| [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=4a12ec56937d42a2b09d8fc08a04a004&_e=SRYLwxbXbx0DJwHe_Bu59tE58hESOwjVqj0fVfLX3S2IpRr_JQhVoxRzd0rd63-FWaBSgddNMjf0NJf_W1zYcxAV3gplwI4hk_-LN-xM0mD4kwqvEBdhvg6as66SDh4dDvrETXYV5kspdy2paI_oL78E5rM3n25hunsXpKkPXT-tBASqy5sh11hOEReggyXtoU69NOZQ8idIuouuTG7cgDlrd9wXf2hFnxTJbVNMVPZ015UpMxGzUw8UMf6tVNX5MQfhEeLLwftGpJJ-a1DAC_YGBX3ilHp38OBQBkEOzj-3A-It-qjBZztP3OBo9z6mr0-D11OXIfx_-exmsk9Fgfd4j3osCoxNk0tLv3zi69ioW6WExoH_PPxGj9LX15dkON5c_nIMqpL2NcKYeS7Kvg%3D%3D)
---
| | I know the images I'm bringing up are horrible. But please don't stop reading -- because God-fearing, faith-filled people like you and me have a job to do today. We can't retreat into our homes and hope our government's evil culture just passes us by. **[That's why I'm asking you to stand with me today -- before it's too late.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=4a12ec56937d42a2b09d8fc08a04a004&_e=SRYLwxbXbx0DJwHe_Bu59tE58hESOwjVqj0fVfLX3S2IpRr_JQhVoxRzd0rd63-FWaBSgddNMjf0NJf_W1zYcxAV3gplwI4hk_-LN-xM0mD4kwqvEBdhvg6as66SDh4dDvrETXYV5kspdy2paI_oL78E5rM3n25hunsXpKkPXT-tBASqy5sh11hOEReggyXtoU69NOZQ8idIuouuTG7cgDlrd9wXf2hFnxTJbVNMVPYzR869XoKafDXAVIZcF_jB9ttDR6cMQOIJWC3o8NiSlTMVtjW0sedM9TZ2uSGHy59lm3cgIGdiRLfKCO5DBeR-524r-m9wO9TloNmVdNUI1ZLEXLx96q0-T_pYqhIIlaH5hzPtzqUWdpj0VWaievRBnc3Gwy88Ctb5P7GoloToOg%3D%3D)** My fellow conservative, you know this slippery slide.It's the same one you got pushed down when the Left told you abortion was going to be "safe, legal, and rare."_Now abortion is a "right" and "women’s healthcare." And if you don’t support it up until the moment of birth, you must "hate women."_ It's the same slippery slide you got pushed down when the Left told you limiting gay couples to civil unions was "mean." You were told, "They just want to use the word "marriage" like everyone else. It's just a word."_Now if you don't fully embrace a homosexual lifestyle by displaying rainbows and celebrating gay pride, you're a "hate-filled bigot."_ Enough with their lies. We have Truth on our side. And we need to start acting like it.**God created man. And God created woman. It isn't any more complicated than that.** Letting men believe they are women... letting girls believe they are boys... is a bold-faced rejection of God’s truth. And if we give this deranged movement one more inch, a year from now when you're forced by law to call boys "she"... when it becomes normal for kids to be taken away from parents who oppose this evil... I don't want you looking back with regret wishing you had done something when you still had a chance.**Your chance is right now -- and right by my side.** **[Please stand with me against the radical transgender movement by making an urgent tax-deductible donation today -- before it's too late.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=4a12ec56937d42a2b09d8fc08a04a004&_e=SRYLwxbXbx0DJwHe_Bu59tE58hESOwjVqj0fVfLX3S2IpRr_JQhVoxRzd0rd63-FWaBSgddNMjf0NJf_W1zYcxAV3gplwI4hk_-LN-xM0mD4kwqvEBdhvg6as66SDh4dDvrETXYV5kspdy2paI_oL78E5rM3n25hunsXpKkPXT-tBASqy5sh11hOEReggyXtoU69NOZQ8idIuouuTG7cgDlrd9wXf2hFnxTJbVNMVPZW_3aJCg4VqD2_prPtjw_0DMSVy-IaUSxVW3qeFHkFK46XXFv2rzuHKc3-3Q4ILOCQWGF4CljaBAuz_WnIh8rHuHCZJp8yUD3miwlX7ys4pcrIDZGMcbCU8NCqq37Zmg-imS65KUW0gRTKLIkcVLFsFa8BYsszYFAY8RKZZJXSKg%3D%3D) ** Maybe you're thinking like so many, "Riley, adults are free to do whatever they want. And children should be kept away from this evil by their parents."I agree this problem would have less traction if parents just said, "No."
---
>> But parents in MD had their child taken away because they refused to let their son transition to a "girl." >> Parents in Vermont are seeing their foster care licenses revoked because they admit they would not help a child who may be assigned to their home get puberty blockers or have sex change surgery.>> Parents in California got themselves elected to the school board, passed guidelines to protect their children from the transgender movement, and now the state of California is suing them. >> And Illinois is considering a bill that would change the definition of "child abuse" to include parents who oppose puberty blocking drugs and sex change operations.
---
The radical transgender movement has parents backed into a corner. But when I'm speaking around the country, I meet so many seniors who say, "I wish someone had told me about this sooner." The good news is that right now, you still have a chance to help me stop the radical transgender movement before they push us down their slippery slide.And today I'm writing you on behalf of a group that is doing more work to block the transgender movement than anyone I know. **It's the legal non-profit the Center for American Liberty.** **[And your tax-deductible gift today is going straight to help them.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=4a12ec56937d42a2b09d8fc08a04a004&_e=SRYLwxbXbx0DJwHe_Bu59tE58hESOwjVqj0fVfLX3S2IpRr_JQhVoxRzd0rd63-FWaBSgddNMjf0NJf_W1zYcxAV3gplwI4hk_-LN-xM0mD4kwqvEBdhvg6as66SDh4dDvrETXYV5kspdy2paI_oL78E5rM3n25hunsXpKkPXT-tBASqy5sh11hOEReggyXtoU69NOZQ8idIuouuTG7cgDlrd9wXf2hFnxTJbVNMVPae0FW4ArFVToJYwu2V7wxu-dRTkD2wr1qvJwrJ0Q86Ak8C7CiF05W0ZgQtOEDsysaiR9v_Qv3UH11IUqJr7iTYrcCJSNCLXxIpdGBYMrXZF71Vw91oI0p4MUcYz0C06rfIzBiu0dV5fMRVKbD9HyxCHLPx2zpQNze4XQZFSHII0g%3D%3D)** With the help of patriots like you, the _Center for American Liberty_ fights the transgender movement _in the courts_ because that’s the only way to stop them. And the _Center for American Liberty_ is attacking this evil from all sides with their comprehensive three-pronged approach.
---
**#1. They're fighting radical schools**.
---
I know it may sound crazy to you but in today's taxpayer-funded schools, teachers and counselors _encourage_ young children to socially "transition" at school and then facilitate the "transition" by giving children new names and even giving them new clothes so they can dress as the opposite sex.And they keep it all a secret from parents! The _Center for American Liberty_ is taking these radicals to court in multiple cases. And they already have one major win! **[When you make your tax-deductible gift today](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=4a12ec56937d42a2b09d8fc08a04a004&_e=SRYLwxbXbx0DJwHe_Bu59tE58hESOwjVqj0fVfLX3S2IpRr_JQhVoxRzd0rd63-FWaBSgddNMjf0NJf_W1zYcxAV3gplwI4hk_-LN-xM0mD4kwqvEBdhvg6as66SDh4dDvrETXYV5kspdy2paI_oL78E5rM3n25hunsXpKkPXT-tBASqy5sh11hOEReggyXtoU69NOZQ8idIuouuTG7cgDlrd9wXf2hFnxTJbVNMVPapcO8_nB2lYy6vPjiEZeuGlYEhxeQ3KRTq1BkpobydLsMhXhrInMG1VuxzKf8aWCCRxuoq9I7J9xf72QfU65-wxETkwWNxgrmq8_hqda7oGZeSGrNTMbN6nTUlkSB9a_rtPDn9DSRRbFtcRyLwDZprmPA8LiP6Ti5JzqtfPG1Sgw%3D%3D), **you're making sure PARENTS have the final word in guiding their children -- not school radicals!
---
**#2. They're fighting radical doctors.**
---
There are doctors who mutilate children for profit in the name of transgender "care." They use their "expertise" to convince _even_ _conservative_ _parents_ that if they oppose "transition," their child will commit suicide.Then these doctors pump children full of dangerous puberty blockers and perform gruesome surgeries to remove children's healthy breasts and other parts. Maybe you've seen a girl named Chloe Cole on Fox News. In a landmark case, the _Center for American Liberty_ is helping her sue the radical doctors and hospital that gave her a double mastectomy at age 15. **[**When you make your tax-deductible gift today**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=4a12ec56937d42a2b09d8fc08a04a004&_e=SRYLwxbXbx0DJwHe_Bu59tE58hESOwjVqj0fVfLX3S2IpRr_JQhVoxRzd0rd63-FWaBSgddNMjf0NJf_W1zYcxAV3gplwI4hk_-LN-xM0mD4kwqvEBdhvg6as66SDh4dDvrETXYV5kspdy2paI_oL78E5rM3n25hunsXpKkPXT-tBASqy5sh11hOEReggyXtoU69NOZQ8idIuouuTG7cgDlrd9wXf2hFnxTJbVNMVPZzN4gHR_kt4vTMgEuU-OnNfZLVAm4qclfXxH8BT6xGbR8HU1U1_b1ZsbuoO2rEMMejEx5aQ9d4-PL_l4eAYSuQMzLzauNWVg-qBaIHhec7PUSmf0Uh9oHLpnFbLPwRLqnCyYh6aswpPHwHHI-qWmnp_P0TnYKCfXS1lTdi48O5Ow%3D%3D)** , you're helping Chloe and the _Center for American Liberty_ make sure this never happens to another child!
---
**#3. They're fighting for _your_ right to speak out against this evil.**
---
Fighting for Freedom of Speech is one of the _Center for American Liberty's_ specialties and they've notched plenty of victories in this space. Their next one is going to be fighting for an 82-year-old grandmother who got banned for life from the YMCA.This grandma raised the alarm that a grown man dressed in a women's bathing suit was in the women's locker room "helping" two little girls get ready to use the bathroom.And she was the one punished!**[**When you make your tax-deductible gift today**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=4a12ec56937d42a2b09d8fc08a04a004&_e=SRYLwxbXbx0DJwHe_Bu59tE58hESOwjVqj0fVfLX3S2IpRr_JQhVoxRzd0rd63-FWaBSgddNMjf0NJf_W1zYcxAV3gplwI4hk_-LN-xM0mD4kwqvEBdhvg6as66SDh4dDvrETXYV5kspdy2paI_oL78E5rM3n25hunsXpKkPXT-tBASqy5sh11hOEReggyXtoU69NOZQ8idIuouuTG7cgDlrd9wXf2hFnxTJbVNMVPacNZSi-NFsVeBlAv8AhqYotrjZGPtCH69CZn7o862cLbhj-r8gkZeVhHNQKbFMXKrugV1tbirc9L1JRmE7Zd87MZI-jPEJBfDelKda0EhlgYA586h5wMzr3Uvj6lp-90GJq8hdnKJOCAUW3vx6TRMfzljo_8_b5MXvp98Xw6ej6g%3D%3D)** , you're helping the _Center for American Liberty_ protect every American's right to speak out against this evil! I know you'd probably love to fund an entire court case on your own after all I've told you.**[But all I'm asking you to do is make a tax-deductible gift of $30, $50, $75, $100 or even $250 or more today -- before it's too late.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=4a12ec56937d42a2b09d8fc08a04a004&_e=SRYLwxbXbx0DJwHe_Bu59tE58hESOwjVqj0fVfLX3S2IpRr_JQhVoxRzd0rd63-FWaBSgddNMjf0NJf_W1zYcxAV3gplwI4hk_-LN-xM0mD4kwqvEBdhvg6as66SDh4dDvrETXYV5kspdy2paI_oL78E5rM3n25hunsXpKkPXT-tBASqy5sh11hOEReggyXtoU69NOZQ8idIuouuTG7cgDlrd9wXf2hFnxTJbVNMVPYQ2qx961M7l-gPjrryEHK3LIYj_JHYDSx1j-hZ0WyD9GkyHgLzLie8dQL2HGSblyTE6lnGh8tb1Tv1-CZ__ZFVI9W7LYdENwT7LrJM1VVK6W0l2XI7Uh8aywLz8gOoDOkC4p93mjQ1upKK25HyLOiyTwYplGaJhN4rP7zJt1E3Jw%3D%3D)** Please donate whatever amount is right for you whether it's smaller or larger. _The Center for American Liberty_ needs and appreciates every dollar that comes in.And because I believe so strongly in the work they're doing -- and because they are one of the few groups who've stood shoulder-to-shoulder with me in this fight... I**t will be my honor to send you my new book _Swimming Against the Current: Fighting for Common Sense in a World That's Lost Its Mind_ as my free gift** **[**when you donate $100 or more to the Center for American Liberty.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=4a12ec56937d42a2b09d8fc08a04a004&_e=SRYLwxbXbx0DJwHe_Bu59tE58hESOwjVqj0fVfLX3S2IpRr_JQhVoxRzd0rd63-FWaBSgddNMjf0NJf_W1zYcxAV3gplwI4hk_-LN-xM0mD4kwqvEBdhvg6as66SDh4dDvrETXYV5kspdy2paI_oL78E5rM3n25hunsXpKkPXT-tBASqy5sh11hOEReggyXtoU69NOZQ8idIuouuTG7cgDlrd9wXf2hFnxTJbVNMVPYYZn-jpHESwP7EMk0iVo4A66ATYZ37kehBGooEqU3HOD_mCRtPIOqF2h0ID7zzfTqDJ38tLQIerRw8FfnVfVvJq3nUajAr-qI_sKCR7FIBwJnq6EOgy0Bq6_KJylmAx-ZP438E3bWZ_l3TUeZT7X3QXpQ_MdDXR1NDBEqBVT14Gw%3D%3D)** Before I go, please let me share one last thought with you.Every morning as a competitive swimmer, I would get up and think of this verse: _For I consider that the sufferings of the present time are not worthy to be compared to the glory that is about to be revealed to us. Romans 8:18_ I applied it to my swimming: work hard now and wins come later. But now I see that God has a much bigger plan for my life just as He does for yours.Thank you for reading my letter all the way to the end. I'm praying for you, and I hope you'll pray for me too.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Riley Gaines

clean_body: God made man and God made woman. The attempts to deny those basic truths, are attempts to deny the truth of God. | | | | I’m writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope. | | | | | | Dear Fellow Conservative, | | I'm writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.Actually, in my case, it's a slippery slide. My name is Riley Gaines and I'm the University of Kentucky swimmer who had to compete against a fully intact 6'4" male swimmer dressed in a women's bathing suit.And after he stole the victory I had worked for my entire life, I had to go back to the women's locker room and undress out of my wet bathing suit while he did the same next to me. | | | I know the images I'm bringing up are horrible. But please don't stop reading -- because God-fearing, faith-filled people like you and me have a job to do today. We can't retreat into our homes and hope our government's evil culture just passes us by. My fellow conservative, you know this slippery slide.It's the same one you got pushed down when the Left told you abortion was going to be "safe, legal, and rare."Now abortion is a "right" and "women’s healthcare." And if you don’t support it up until the moment of birth, you must "hate women." It's the same slippery slide you got pushed down when the Left told you limiting gay couples to civil unions was "mean." You were told, "They just want to use the word "marriage" like everyone else. It's just a word."Now if you don't fully embrace a homosexual lifestyle by displaying rainbows and celebrating gay pride, you're a "hate-filled bigot." Enough with their lies. We have Truth on our side. And we need to start acting like it.God created man. And God created woman. It isn't any more complicated than that. Letting men believe they are women... letting girls believe they are boys... is a bold-faced rejection of God’s truth. And if we give this deranged movement one more inch, a year from now when you're forced by law to call boys "she"... when it becomes normal for kids to be taken away from parents who oppose this evil... I don't want you looking back with regret wishing you had done something when you still had a chance.Your chance is right now -- and right by my side. Maybe you're thinking like so many, "Riley, adults are free to do whatever they want. And children should be kept away from this evil by their parents."I agree this problem would have less traction if parents just said, "No." > But parents in MD had their child taken away because they refused to let their son transition to a "girl." >> Parents in Vermont are seeing their foster care licenses revoked because they admit they would not help a child who may be assigned to their home get puberty blockers or have sex change surgery.>> Parents in California got themselves elected to the school board, passed guidelines to protect their children from the transgender movement, and now the state of California is suing them. >> And Illinois is considering a bill that would change the definition of "child abuse" to include parents who oppose puberty blocking drugs and sex change operations. The radical transgender movement has parents backed into a corner. But when I'm speaking around the country, I meet so many seniors who say, "I wish someone had told me about this sooner." The good news is that right now, you still have a chance to help me stop the radical transgender movement before they push us down their slippery slide.And today I'm writing you on behalf of a group that is doing more work to block the transgender movement than anyone I know. It's the legal non-profit the Center for American Liberty. With the help of patriots like you, the Center for American Liberty fights the transgender movement in the courts because that’s the only way to stop them. And the Center for American Liberty is attacking this evil from all sides with their comprehensive three-pronged approach. #1. They're fighting radical schools. I know it may sound crazy to you but in today's taxpayer-funded schools, teachers and counselors encourage young children to socially "transition" at school and then facilitate the "transition" by giving children new names and even giving them new clothes so they can dress as the opposite sex.And they keep it all a secret from parents! The Center for American Liberty is taking these radicals to court in multiple cases. And they already have one major win! , you're making sure PARENTS have the final word in guiding their children -- not school radicals! #2. They're fighting radical doctors. There are doctors who mutilate children for profit in the name of transgender "care." They use their "expertise" to convince even conservative parents that if they oppose "transition," their child will commit suicide.Then these doctors pump children full of dangerous puberty blockers and perform gruesome surgeries to remove children's healthy breasts and other parts. Maybe you've seen a girl named Chloe Cole on Fox News. In a landmark case, the Center for American Liberty is helping her sue the radical doctors and hospital that gave her a double mastectomy at age 15. , you're helping Chloe and the Center for American Liberty make sure this never happens to another child! #3. They're fighting for your right to speak out against this evil. Fighting for Freedom of Speech is one of the Center for American Liberty's specialties and they've notched plenty of victories in this space. Their next one is going to be fighting for an 82-year-old grandmother who got banned for life from the YMCA.This grandma raised the alarm that a grown man dressed in a women's bathing suit was in the women's locker room "helping" two little girls get ready to use the bathroom.And she was the one punished! , you're helping the Center for American Liberty protect every American's right to speak out against this evil! I know you'd probably love to fund an entire court case on your own after all I've told you. Please donate whatever amount is right for you whether it's smaller or larger. The Center for American Liberty needs and appreciates every dollar that comes in.And because I believe so strongly in the work they're doing -- and because they are one of the few groups who've stood shoulder-to-shoulder with me in this fight... It will be my honor to send you my new book Swimming Against the Current: Fighting for Common Sense in a World That's Lost Its Mind as my free gift Before I go, please let me share one last thought with you.Every morning as a competitive swimmer, I would get up and think of this verse: For I consider that the sufferings of the present time are not worthy to be compared to the glory that is about to be revealed to us. Romans 8:18 I applied it to my swimming: work hard now and wins come later. But now I see that God has a much bigger plan for my life just as He does for yours.Thank you for reading my letter all the way to the end. I'm praying for you, and I hope you'll pray for me too. Sincerely, | | Riley Gaines | | | P.S. God made man and God made woman. The attempts to deny those basic truths, are attempts to deny the truth of God. Your help is so critical to the Center for American Liberty's work, Please hurry. It's getting hard to hold back this evil without you. I don't want you to look back a year from now and say, "I wish I had done something when I had the chance." | | | | | | | ---|---|--- The Center For American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization fighting against growing anti-free speech and anti-civil liberties trends. © The Center for American Liberty | PO Box 200942, Pittsburgh, PA 15251

name: Democrats.org
subject: We need 52 supporters from Cresco
body:
Trump and his allies are hoping you won't have the energy to take a stand and fight back.
---
Derek — As we reflect on this election cycle and take stock of where we fell short, we know that Republicans did not secure a mandate in this election. Trump and Republicans had some of the narrowest wins EVER recorded. Trump himself won less than 50% of the popular vote. That is hardly a mandate. But now Trump and his allies are hoping all of us won't have the energy to take a stand and fight back. The truth is MILLIONS of Americans voted against Donald Trump and his extreme allies in Congress. And if every Democrat reading this pitched in $3, we’d be in the best position to win local and statewide races in 2025, take back Congress in 2026, and the White House in 2028. | | Did you see these recent headlines? Over the past few months, alarming reports have highlighted flaws and errors in Oregon’s election process.

---
| | From outdated voter rolls to the DMV registering voters without proof of citizenship, to ballot boxes on fire, these issues cast doubt on the integrity of our elections. Nationally, we secured a _**Red Wave**_ – but here in Oregon, it didn’t materialize down the ballot - we’ve been pushed back into the super minority. _**Was this truly the will of the people, or a result of election interference?**_ We cannot allow these questions to go unanswered. Every single vote must be counted fairly, and every Oregonian must have confidence in the electoral process. _Can we count on you to help in this critical fight?_ [**_Join us in the fight for election integrity in Oregon by donating any amount today. >>>_**](https://links.infooregongop.com/els/v2/exLpSgDWwbCr/cllnQ3RWYi9qODhvaWt2UG9PVlh1d2QycmdXSFRYOElFcUZnT0xrblJDVW9YRW5abkMzZHVuQmxocHhoU2RrZjc1L3QxQnFaQ0o4OWVDVTMvbDV0blBOOXNGSkJidGhaWm1wMndYamVZcEU9S0/)

clean_body: Protect our elections! | | | | | | Friend. | | Did you see these recent headlines? Over the past few months, alarming reports have highlighted flaws and errors in Oregon’s election process. | | | | From outdated voter rolls to the DMV registering voters without proof of citizenship, to ballot boxes on fire, these issues cast doubt on the integrity of our elections. Nationally, we secured a Red Wave – but here in Oregon, it didn’t materialize down the ballot - we’ve been pushed back into the super minority. Was this truly the will of the people, or a result of election interference? We cannot allow these questions to go unanswered. Every single vote must be counted fairly, and every Oregonian must have confidence in the electoral process. Can we count on you to help in this critical fight? | | | | | Together, we can: • Demand accountability for those who meddled in the elections. • Push for common-sense election laws that protect every vote. • Ensure every vote is cast and counted fairly in future elections. This fight is critical, but we can’t do it without you. Your support will help us protect democracy and restore trust in Oregon’s elections. Every dollar you give helps us take action. | | | | | Thank you for standing with us in this critical fight. Together, we must ensure Oregon’s elections are safe, secure, and fair. Oregon Republican Party P.S. The stakes couldn’t be higher. If we don’t act now, we risk losing our voice in future elections.** | | | | | Welcome to Oregon's frontlines! Thank you for being part of our mission to help save Oregon. Our goal is to improve Oregon’s way of life by helping elect common-sense Republican leaders who will fight for YOU. | | | | | | | | The Democrats have had control of Oregon for far too long, it’s time for a change - but we can’t do it without you. Help us make a better tomorrow here in Oregon for you and your family by getting involved below: | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Make sure you’re following us on socials to stay up to date on all things Oregon GOP! ⬇ CONTRIBUTE BY CHECK ⬇Oregon Republican PartyPO Box 1586Lake Oswego, OR 97035 | | | | |

The GOP is playing games with our livelihoods

|
---

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98916352/518237389/-1715683569?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_Shutdown_241218_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhY2U3OTZjOS03OGJkLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Q1kubtzHoOX0eZmxZvx5Cbk3to00Y9fGH5nJgS375Go=) Here we go again, Derek.

**[DONATE OTHER](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98916359/518237399/-1715683569?express_lane_other=true&refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_Shutdown_241218_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhY2U3OTZjOS03OGJkLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Q1kubtzHoOX0eZmxZvx5Cbk3to00Y9fGH5nJgS375Go=)** A government shutdown would be a disaster for the American people. Seniors would worry about getting their Social Security checks. Military families wouldn’t receive their benefits. In Virginia, we’d feel the impact even more because of the high concentration of military and government workers we have here.

Not to mention the many Virginians that are still recovering from Hurricane Helene. Hundreds of businesses have been approved for small business loans after this disaster. You’re telling me Republicans are going to allow that money to run out when they need it most?

clean_body: The GOP is playing games with our livelihoods | | | = Here we go again, Derek. Thanks to incessant Republican obstruction, we’re days away from a government shutdown. Why are they threatening yet another shutdown? Republicans are playing games with Americans’ livelihoods in the name of party loyalty. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately: = = = = = = A government shutdown would be a disaster for the American people. Seniors would worry about getting their Social Security checks. Military families wouldn’t receive their benefits. In Virginia, we’d feel the impact even more because of the high concentration of military and government workers we have here. Not to mention the many Virginians that are still recovering from Hurricane Helene. Hundreds of businesses have been approved for small business loans after this disaster. You’re telling me Republicans are going to allow that money to run out when they need it most? Ridiculous. = Thank you, Mark Warner **= | | Friends of Mark Warner 1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213 Williamsburg, VA 23185 United States | Click here to . | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner

Team –
Earlier this month, the Department of Justice announced that a dentist from Tampa, Florida, was found guilty of threatening public figures, including Jena. The threats were violent, racist, and misogynistic.
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ejgaLTLd8rw [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ejgaLTLd8rw]
Since the 2020 election, Jena and some other election officials across the country have received threats from extremists. These threats to try to intimidate election officials are unacceptable. Jena will not be intimidated. We are thankful that the Justice Department, FBI, and law enforcement take these threats seriously.
Jena will remain committed to Coloradans and our democracy.
– Team Jena
