body:
thousands of federal workers are under threat

|
---
_**BREAKING:**__****_ Donald Trump said he wants to privatize the U.S. Postal Service!?! [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98917263/518240547/1909711989?refcode=DOTL_20241218_EMPET_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzk0MjI1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhhYTc3OTVjLTdiYmQtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=c902OROnEuBELe-pV8LqDMJLKYTmFBf1v3xptMA19Sg=&emci=4ef83696-62bd-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=8aa7795c-7bbd-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=14887570) | [1,000 SIGNATURES FROM PA NEEDED: SAY NO TO THE PRIVATIZATION OF THE U.S. POSTAL SERVICE »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98917264/518240575/1909711989?refcode=DOTL_20241218_EMPET_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzk0MjI1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhhYTc3OTVjLTdiYmQtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=c902OROnEuBELe-pV8LqDMJLKYTmFBf1v3xptMA19Sg=&emci=4ef83696-62bd-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=8aa7795c-7bbd-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=14887570)
---
The privatization of the U.S. Postal Service would be _**AWFUL**_

➡ It would shake up consumer shipping and business supply chains

➡ It could prevent Americans from receiving life-saving medication or crucial Social Security payments

subject: Sign our petition to stop subsidizing Planned Parenthood
body:
Every 80 seconds, a preborn child loses its life at the hands of Planned Parenthood

| | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.redconservatives.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_s=0a0b79cec04b499da127305fae53b776&_t=sIXZA-5-Wkl14w_jNlsAU_kDKW54g6ZfPnNJzWkwaH7ojfzIS8g0Fv76epDAs8n1v7N0q7thLzRlJE4i1YeC2c1uJ65xq8C3oSDSox2F_a_JQlfP7UbidIndgNhyyrjF)_

#
Dear Friend,

Every 80 seconds, a preborn child loses its life at the hands of Planned Parenthood. This means that by the time you finish reading this email, another innocent life will be gone.

Despite the Supreme Court ruling in the overturning of _Roe v. Wade_ , Planned Parenthood continues to receive taxpayer funding, effectively subsidizing the intentional killing of preborn children. Since 2000, nearly $10.7 billion of taxpayers' money has funded their life-ending work.

Contrast this with the nearly 3,000 Pro-life pregnancy centers nationwide dedicated to supporting expectant mothers. Planned Parenthood only operates about 600 facilities and primarily offers one service: abortion. Alarmingly, they perform 62 abortions for every prenatal care service they provide, and prenatal care services are down 80% since 2010.

As a pro-life individual, I know you don't want your hard-earned tax dollars to support an organization that prioritizes abortion.

That's why I'm urging you to join us to demand an end to this taxpayer-funded ongoing tragedy. A new Congress and president will be chosen this November, and they need to hear from us _now_ that America does NOT support funding Planned Parenthood.

Make your voice heard. Sign our petition before midnight to demand an end to this grave misuse of your taxes. **[https://www.liveaction.org/defund-planned-parenthood-petition/](http://links.redconservatives.com/u/click?_t=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_m=0a0b79cec04b499da127305fae53b776&_e=h03rENsWLOLuJiD9-bWNzIliflC5gn0nwWKilEjsTKadcvtJRgFLbpZA7sJRiixvf7qUSjRTRUs5N0z_FmsGTzu61zq8MsQDGeYkapygHZO86KQvXCIJKLe0P3qZyuNYETN2yjoH_OLhlzM87OVTF3facQv9K_hSE7XVYL8c5Pra4Fp-ZXNScWBpbS9mfV6YHkK1cnYJZfuxflQrU18CTJZ4xolWxM2_F10zver4VwPntWHmm3wtCQ_vLkWNKq7JWtia5Tu-TIaWQ8x17y1X5bmv3t9uPE_atbfNmibDeL1Syr0lf55P9zWSsT8HKxYGTm2ElUq15CFzqvkOqTzAi1kycas6PkXcbk2VEWtX6Ay8EfYmmHFNXvZ8iv9b2ai_6i3dU03RnzNd0K-v2sqasg%3D%3D)**

Thank you for standing with us for the protection of future generations!

For Life,

Lila Rose
**President and Founder**

[](http://links.redconservatives.com/u/click?_t=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_m=0a0b79cec04b499da127305fae53b776&_e=h03rENsWLOLuJiD9-bWNzIliflC5gn0nwWKilEjsTKadcvtJRgFLbpZA7sJRiixvf7qUSjRTRUs5N0z_FmsGTzu61zq8MsQDGeYkapygHZO86KQvXCIJKLe0P3qZyuNYETN2yjoH_OLhlzM87OVTF3facQv9K_hSE7XVYL8c5Pra4Fp-ZXNScWBpbS9mfV6YHkK1cnYJZfuxflQrU18CTJZ4xolWxM2_F10zver4VwPfIWybfNTs4efDqlQqxDyfiaFrp1BIwr5053c-xRo4a9UTZiemM9GBHE2kuoaQXSI41gw6-WgzfpALJ7PjwHlzeSNfBsRjQhDndXJaTtaFI9TjiXY1cyHnFHYrdCmXiqWh0T3lXic0d6PmOl65t4KquTFYsyX0tx1DwMGWxKy0ew%3D%3D)

2200 Wilson Blvd, Suite 102, PMB 111 Arlington, VA 22201

If we want to keep Christ in Christmas, defend American values, and keep our country safe, we need you to stay vigilant.
We have a RAZOR-THIN Majority in the House – so if we lose these Special Elections, Democrats could take control of the House.

| | | Of all the emails you've received today, this is BY FAR the most important. Why? Because...

_We 're about to have a NEW Special Election in NY-21 for Elise Stefanik's seat, a NEW Special Election in FL-06 for Mike Waltz's seat, and a NEW Special Election in FL-01 for Matt Gaetz's seat!_

**Remember:** We have a RAZOR-THIN Majority in the House - so if we lose these Special Elections, Democrats could take control of the House.

**Remember:** If they take the House, they can stonewall EVERY America First Agenda item President Trump tries to pass through Congress.

**Remember:** If they jam up Trump's agenda, everything we fought so hard for this year will completely COLLAPSE.

**_[Friend- we need AT LEAST 20,000 contributions before the end of the year to maximize the chances of Republicans winning all three and stop the Democrats from taking control of our House Majority. ](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=44aae87dc93742bd9fa2d13a602d3974&_e=cR8KZpefa78yikJOaOLQVDZUW9trfIVw-OJYeqByIagALEDYoqzcW-iQMz1HodrcUQ1c68DD-lcFtN4XekVYBGlJ6LIirX9wjbkgLlNW56TMOsXybylOYHFMcZ2LmrYFCeusUZWtD_9fr7Ce5QIbNTcevFnEYsuNS4uCQaLmSk9XCPYuUgfVIFn6d_nVJu_N7DtVIdufQjV2PjO6J0nuhEjzyMPNjpkQmH3xVombPF_mXLBmu0NGUzY0maZiY_z5uNJt7PnFQXZqa8Pjd6MjIpI8g5H53b9ZJ1hekNhqfGUZxlxYJ9QBgAGJueft871b0CgTyaojx4Qsv6qy56JKA4kewY1_a4PsplMMHVdlP-hnIMb5Bmzuqjwv8TM8cFjBabbubj5umoYngTqMN_fZoDX6Abb5o7ioD4u7VyszQdo%3D "Friend – we’re racing to maximize the chances of Republicans winning all three. I'm humbled to announce that I am your new House Majority Leader. My first order of business is checking in with our best supporters, so I just launched my new** MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY** for that specific reason.

We have a RAZOR-THIN Majority in the House – so if we lose these Special Elections, Democrats could take control of the House. | | | | | Of all the emails you've received today, this is BY FAR the most important. Why? Because... We 're about to have a NEW Special Election in NY-21 for Elise Stefanik's seat, a NEW Special Election in FL-06 for Mike Waltz's seat, and a NEW Special Election in FL-01 for Matt Gaetz's seat! Remember: We have a RAZOR-THIN Majority in the House - so if we lose these Special Elections, Democrats could take control of the House. Remember: If they take the House, they can stonewall EVERY America First Agenda item President Trump tries to pass through Congress. Remember: If they jam up Trump's agenda, everything we fought so hard for this year will completely COLLAPSE. "Friend – we’re racing to maximize the chances of Republicans winning all three. name: Marsha Blackburn
subject: I’m nervous
body: ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ Well, Peter, I’ll admit it… Things have really taken a turn since Election Day. I thought our fundraising and enthusiasm for Republicans would be at an all-time high, but that couldn’t be further from the truth! Fundraising has PLUMMETED, and now I’m starting to get nervous that we may come up short of our final goal of the year. I really hate that I’m having to bother you with this, but you’ve been such an important supporter of my campaign that I wanted you to hear the truth directly from me. I hate even more to put you on the spot, but without your help, I’m worried my fellow Republicans and I may fail to reach our final goal of 2024. This would be a MAJOR setback for our new Republican Senate Majority. So, let me cut to the chase. I could really use your support right here and now before the New Year. https://click.updates.marshablackburn.com/?qs=4852ed26c47b70344f2278ab6119620fb51cdbffa21b2b68c1802515a2f3e12b9e6c83d7839a0e3021853853c81ea658c90e0bf4e0b7269f962715ad641c07a3 I’m personally asking you to consider donating just $5, $10, or $15 to help chip away at my end of year goal. I wish so badly I didn’t have to ask you this. I promise you that. name: LCV Membership Team
subject: Peter — following up — Trump’s budget nominee promises “trauma” for EPA
body:
To view this mail in a browser, copy https://links.messages.lcv.org/servlet/MailView?ms=MTE5MDM4NDIS1&r=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&j=MjEwMDcxMjQxMAS2&mt=1&rt=0 into your browser.
Peter — last week, we wrote to you about Russell Vought, one of the key
authors of the radical Project 2025 agenda, who Trump has picked to lead the
federal budget and regulatory office. Vought and his pro-polluter allies will be ready on Day One to gut environmental
protections, slash clean energy investments, and approve massive new drilling operations that put our climate and communities at risk. We need your help to respond. We hope you’ll read our message below, and then renew your 2025 LCV membership today. $5 is all it takes. Please, help us reach our $25,000 goal before December 31 >> https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/VXb6sXrkaNH_ Onward, LCV Membership Team DEVELOPING — Donald Trump has just picked Russell Vought, an anti-environmental
extremist, to lead the federal budget office. As head of the Office of
Management and Budget, Vought would be positioned to drastically cut environmental enforcement and clean energy. In a leaked speech delivered to far-right political donors, Vought said that he wants employees tasked with protecting our environment to
“feel trauma” and has called for their funding to be “shut down.” LCV’s teams are ready to fight Trump’s agenda in Congress, in the states, and in
the streets — but the truth is that we rely on support from our members to make our work possible. That’s why we’re aiming to raise $25,000 from LCV members before December 31. Please, renew your LCV membership for 2025 today — $5 is all it takes. Each gift helps us fight back against Trump’s disastrous anti-environmental agenda >> https://links.messages.lcv. RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP FOR $5 >> https://links.messages.lcv. As you’re reading this email, Donald Trump is assembling the most dangerous anti-environmental administration
in history.In addition to Vought, Trump plans to nominate Chris Wright — a Big Oil CEO — to
lead the Department of Energy. Wright is a science denier who has said “there is no climate crisis.” Their views may sound unbelievable, but make no mistake: Trump’s extreme nominees will be ready on Day One to do polluters’ bidding and
attack our environment and our democracy. At LCV, we’ve fought Trump’s dirty agenda before, and we’re ready to do it
again. We’re working with allies, elected leaders, and supporters across the
country to limit or block the damage a second Trump administration can do. But we rely on support from LCV members to make our campaigns work. So, we’re asking: Can you renew your LCV membership for 2025 today? Right now, $5 is all it takes. We need EVERYONE’s support to stand up to Trump and his anti-environmental cronies — please don’t wait >> https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/NvbyBGpjr- Thanks for standing with us, Peter. Supporters like you inspire us
every day to fight for people and our planet. Onward, Gene Karpinski
President

Thanks for your support.

name: INDems
subject: 2024 in review
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party, www
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP03/1/67635/images/IDP%20logo.jpg]
Peter,

For Democrats across the country, this year was disappointing. There’s no way around that fact.

However, even in the face of a tough national environment, our party stood strong and re-elected all 30 Democratic members of the State House, including at least three of whom serve in districts won by Donald Trump. Many other states can’t say the same.

On the local level, our new mayors are making a huge impact in their communities. In Michigan City, Mayor Angie Nelson-Deuitch is leading her city into the future with new housing and park projects around the South Shore double track project.

Mayor Treva Hodges is helping revitalize Charlestown for now and the future by investing in youth and recreation. In Gary, Mayor Eddie Melton is crafting partnerships to kickstart the city’s comeback. Mayor Sharon Tucker is making history and welcoming new investment to build on Mayor Tom Henry's positive legacy in Fort Wayne.

In Terre Haute, Brandon Sakbun is working across the aisle and with state and federal partners to invest in parts of the city which have been left behind for generations. In South Bend, the momentum is continuing with new housing and infrastructure under Mayor James Mueller.

Mayor Stephanie Terry is helping small businesses succeed in Evansville, and our new council majority in Valparaiso is creating a cleaner and greener city.

In 2025, we can continue to lift up the amazing work local Democrats are doing in their communities, and show how one-party control at the Statehouse is preventing progress for too many.

Please consider chipping into our grassroots fund today to help us rebuild in 2025. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/indems]

Thanks,
INDems

name: Democrats.org
subject: Your support makes all the difference
body:
We’re running out of time before a Republican-controlled Congress will be sworn in and before Trump becomes president.
---
Derek — We know you probably didn’t wake up this morning thinking about making a contribution to the Democratic National Committee today. Maybe you’re exhausted, burnt out, and downright disappointed every time you see another headline about Trump’s presidency. But if we’re being honest, today is the day we _need_ Democrats to step up and chip in if you're in a place to do so. Let us explain why: We’re running out of time before a Republican-controlled Congress will be sworn in and before Trump becomes president. From threatening to cut Social Security and Medicare to reorganizing our entire federal government in service of a MAGA agenda, we’re already seeing how disastrous Trump’s second term will be. [**We need to fight back, Derek, and that starts with strengthening the Democratic Party so we can stand our ground, defend our democracy, and protect our freedoms. Will you chip in $3 today to help us build the resources we’ll need to do just that?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-december-2024?amount=3&refcode=em_20241218_2434_fr&refcode2=2434_22930333_vIT4ed&akid=2434%2E22930333%2EvIT4ed) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-december-2024?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em_20241218_2434_fr&refcode2=2434_22930333_vIT4ed&akid=2434%2E22930333%2EvIT4ed)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-december-2024?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em_20241218_2434_fr&refcode2=2434_22930333_vIT4ed&akid=2434%2E22930333%2EvIT4ed)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-december-2024?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em_20241218_2434_fr&refcode2=2434_22930333_vIT4ed&akid=2434%2E22930333%2EvIT4ed)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-december-2024?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em_20241218_2434_fr&refcode2=2434_22930333_vIT4ed&akid=2434%2E22930333%2EvIT4ed)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-december-2024?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=em_20241218_2434_fr&refcode2=2434_22930333_vIT4ed&akid=2434%2E22930333%2EvIT4ed)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-december-2024?refcode=em_20241218_2434_fr&refcode2=2434_22930333_vIT4ed&akid=2434%2E22930333%2EvIT4ed)**
---
****
In the weeks and months ahead, we’ll need to mobilize Democrats and hold Trump accountable at every step — which is why we’re coming to you. So we’re asking:
[**Will you make a contribution to the Democratic Party today? It can be $5, $50, or whatever you can afford. Your donation will make all the difference in stopping the far-right Trump agenda.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-december-2024?amount=3&refcode=em_20241218_2434_fr&refcode2=2434_22930333_vIT4ed&akid=2434%2E22930333%2EvIT4ed)
Thank you,
The Democrats

_If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support._

name: George Whitesides HQ
subject: The Guardian: Trump eyes privatizing USPS
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98919386/518248066/2104826962?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OWFkZTM1OC04NGJkLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FS70jedHuqM439VktQED1fDwcW0_PEFIJgv7ps5Wcl4=)
Did you catch this news, Peter?
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98919387/518248068/2068551778?refcode=em-12.18.24-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OWFkZTM1OC04NGJkLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FS70jedHuqM439VktQED1fDwcW0_PEFIJgv7ps5Wcl4=&emci=92ade358-84bd-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=99ade358-84bd-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=36198509)
This would be a disaster for CA-27 and millions across the country who depend on trusted mail service to receive medications, vote by mail, and operate their small businesses.

The USPS is one of our most reliable and well-liked institutions, and privatizing it would dramatically reshape the agency, and potentially make it costlier and less efficient.

**[That’s why we’re reaching out with a petition today: Will you sign on to stand with keeping the USPS public?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98919388/518248069/2068551778?refcode=em-12.18.24-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OWFkZTM1OC04NGJkLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FS70jedHuqM439VktQED1fDwcW0_PEFIJgv7ps5Wcl4=&emci=92ade358-84bd-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=99ade358-84bd-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=36198509)**

When I won my first race in 2018, we shocked a lot of people

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98919421/518248211/-240735101?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYzgyMTU2Yy04NGJkLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6s4H3J422gfiyMpR5ZTlOENhbYINbHQvTiBmGh27CKM=) Hey, I hope you’re having a good week before the holidays. I’m reaching out because our final fundraising deadline of the year is rapidly approaching, and the truth is, we’ve got some ground to make up following this year’s tough, expensive re-election campaign. [_**If you could pitch in today to help us make up the gap, I’d be extremely grateful.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98919426/518248244/1105044312?refcode=email_121824_Committed&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYzgyMTU2Yy04NGJkLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6s4H3J422gfiyMpR5ZTlOENhbYINbHQvTiBmGh27CKM=) But because I’m sending you this email asking for money, I want to share a bit about why, exactly, I’m asking you to invest in this team. When I won my first race in 2018, we shocked a lot of people not only in Kansas, but across the country. Some pundits thought _no Democrat_ had a shot at winning here — especially not an LGBTQ, Native American, former MMA fighter who was raised by a single mom. My background gives me a unique voice in Washington — and I’ve used that voice to deliver real progress for thousands of Kansans. **I’m proud to have helped create over 20,000 clean-energy jobs in our district, lower costs for seniors on insulin, and kickstart over 300 construction projects across the state.** As we begin the transition to a Republican-led government, I want you to know that I’m more committed than ever to making progress on the issues that matter most to Kansas families, like lowering costs and creating good-paying jobs. And yes, that means finding bipartisan solutions whenever possible because the mission of making life better for Kansans can’t wait. **But make no mistake: I will never concede my values.** I will continue to serve as a voice to protect abortion rights, defend the LGBTQ+ community, and safeguard Social Security and our democracy. These are the principles that unite us — and I’ll fight tooth and nail against any agenda that infringes upon those values. [_**If that’s the kind of leadership you want to see in Washington, I’d appreciate any help you can provide. If everyone reading this email pitched in just $5, it’d put our team in a strong position to take on the big challenges ahead of us.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98919430/518248250/1105044312?refcode=email_121824_Committed&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYzgyMTU2Yy04NGJkLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6s4H3J422gfiyMpR5ZTlOENhbYINbHQvTiBmGh27CKM=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | | [Donate $5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98919431/518248251/1105044312?refcode=email_121824_Committed&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&amount=5&express_lane=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYzgyMTU2Yy04NGJkLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6s4H3J422gfiyMpR5ZTlOENhbYINbHQvTiBmGh27CKM=)

subject: Looking for recs
body:

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98919621/518248900/-1463099547?refcode=-header-&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTk3NjUzMjItODViZC1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAwZDNhOWQ1ODQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Gwfg0ClhK9etOaf_v6FWLZBSYSYKH1n0sgqmrrJ0iRc=) | Hey Peter, Pam and I are doing some Christmas shopping this weekend and we want to get the girls some new books. I thought it might be fun to ask you all for your favorite children's books - Karina is 9 months and Lillian is 2.5 years. **[If you have ideas we’d love to collect your suggestions for favorite children’s books! Here’s a quick survey link.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98919622/518248901/-29940144?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTk3NjUzMjItODViZC1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAwZDNhOWQ1ODQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Gwfg0ClhK9etOaf_v6FWLZBSYSYKH1n0sgqmrrJ0iRc=&emci=52dba018-74b9-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=a9765322-85bd-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=6455652)** Shhhh.... Don’t tell them it’s from us. It’s from Santa 🎅 \- Josh

clean_body: Best children’s books? | = | Hey Peter, Pam and I are doing some Christmas shopping this weekend and we want to get the girls some new books. I thought it might be fun to ask you all for your favorite children's books - Karina is 9 months and Lillian is 2.5 years. Shhhh.... Don’t tell them it’s from us. It’s from Santa 🎅 \- Josh *

| ["They are girls, not mothers" UN Cases Could Change the Future of Sexual and Reproductive Health and Rights (SRHR)](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98919767/518249311/-1335915815?sourceid=1150208&utm_campaign=25emgfl-1201aaa-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=frontlines&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlN2MxNDExYy04NmJkLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ft6qk5em07FdzFzKKFj_ISuN_wbL2D-323JE6fEGIbY=&emci=cc063416-86bd-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=e7c1411c-86bd-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=954237)

The Center for Reproductive Rights and our partners are awaiting a landmark decision from the United Nations Human Rights Committee. These cases, filed on behalf of four young survivors from Ecuador, Guatemala, and Nicaragua, demand justice and accountability. Here’s what you need to know:
* **The Issue:** Four girls, Norma, Fátima, Lucía, and Susana, all under 14 years old, were denied access to abortion and reproductive health care after surviving sexual violence. They were forced to carry unwanted pregnancies.
* **The Goal:** Establish global standards to protect survivors' rights and ensure access to essential healthcare.
* **The Impact:** A favorable ruling could:
* Strengthen SRHR protections across Latin America and globally
* Set a historic precedent for international human rights law by stopping once and for all forced motherhood
* Address systemic violations and promote justice for survivors
* **Why It Matters:** Millions in Latin America face restrictive abortion laws that perpetuate inequality, forcing many survivors into unwanted pregnancies.

🔗 [**See more about "Son niñas, no madres" UN cases**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98919768/518249312/-1335915815?sourceid=1150208&utm_campaign=25emgfl-1201aaa-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=frontlines&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlN2MxNDExYy04NmJkLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ft6qk5em07FdzFzKKFj_ISuN_wbL2D-323JE6fEGIbY=&emci=cc063416-86bd-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=e7c1411c-86bd-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=954237)

| [Center Advocates for Global Reproductive Rights at UN General Assembly](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98919771/518249315/423869356?sourceid=1150208&utm_campaign=25emgfl-1201aaa-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=frontlines&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlN2MxNDExYy04NmJkLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ft6qk5em07FdzFzKKFj_ISuN_wbL2D-323JE6fEGIbY=&emci=cc063416-86bd-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=e7c1411c-86bd-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=954237)

In September, the Center for Reproductive Rights participated in the **79th United Nations General Assembly (UNGA),** engaging global leaders on critical sexual and reproductive health and rights (SRHR) issues. Here's what we accomplished:
* Provided input on the _Pact for the Future,_ a global framework supporting universal access to SRHR and gender equality
* Met with government and UN officials to address:
* Universal health care and SRHR accountability
* The global impacts of U.S. abortion policies
* Strategies to combat anti-rights movements

**Catalina Martínez Coral,** Senior Regional Director for Latin America and the Caribbean, participated in a UN Women panel, _"Toward an Equal, Just, and Secure World,"_ where she discussed the importance of feminist foreign policy, accountability for SRHR violations, and advancing equity in regions affected by restrictive abortion laws.

Our advocacy at UNGA highlights the global urgency to ensure reproductive rights are upheld and prioritized.

Two and a half years after the U.S. Supreme Court's ruling overturning _Roe v. Wade,_ access to reproductive health care in the U.S. is more unequal than ever.

The [**Center for Reproductive Rights' 2024 State Legislative Wrap-Up**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98919776/518249320/-1555878526?sourceid=1150208&utm_campaign=25emgfl-1201aaa-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=frontlines&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlN2MxNDExYy04NmJkLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ft6qk5em07FdzFzKKFj_ISuN_wbL2D-323JE6fEGIbY=&emci=cc063416-86bd-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=e7c1411c-86bd-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=954237) reviews nearly 2,000 bills introduced across all 50 states and Washington, D.C., uncovering key trends. Anti-abortion lawmakers have intensified efforts to restrict care, even targeting out-of-state abortion seekers and their supporters. Meanwhile, eleven states have enshrined abortion protections in their constitutions, and interstate shield laws are evolving to protect providers and patients.

Voter support for reproductive freedom remains steadfast, with 14 of 17 states approving abortion rights measures since 2022. However, federal threats loom as the 2024 election results could pave the way for a national abortion ban, potentially overriding state protections.

🔗 [**Read the 2024 State Legislative Wrap-up**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98919777/518249327/-1555878526?sourceid=1150208&utm_campaign=25emgfl-1201aaa-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=frontlines&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlN2MxNDExYy04NmJkLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ft6qk5em07FdzFzKKFj_ISuN_wbL2D-323JE6fEGIbY=&emci=cc063416-86bd-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=e7c1411c-86bd-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=954237)

On November 12th, 2024, an Idaho state court began hearing testimony in _Adkins v. State of Idaho,_ the Center for Reproductive Rights’ case challenging the state’s restrictive abortion bans. The court concluded hearing testimony on November 21st, 2024, and a decision is expected in early 2025.

The Center brought this case on behalf of four Idaho women denied abortions, two Idaho physicians, and an organization of Idaho family physicians to challenge the unclear and overly narrow medical exceptions in the state's abortion bans. In challenging the medical exceptions, the Center aims to empower Idaho doctors to provide time-sensitive and health-preserving abortion care to their Idaho patients without delay.

🔗 [**Learn more about landmark trial:_Adkins v. State of Idaho_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98919781/518249352/-539803957?sourceid=1150208&utm_campaign=25emgfl-1201aaa-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=frontlines&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlN2MxNDExYy04NmJkLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ft6qk5em07FdzFzKKFj_ISuN_wbL2D-323JE6fEGIbY=&emci=cc063416-86bd-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=e7c1411c-86bd-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=954237)

clean_body: December Front Lines newsletter | | ---|--- | | | | | At the Center for Reproductive Rights, we're fighting to protect and advance reproductive freedoms worldwide. From confronting restrictive abortion policies to championing equity on the global stage, we are dedicated to creating a future where everyone has access to the health care they deserve. Here's a snapshot of our most recent efforts: | Global | | Photo credit: ©Stephanie Noritz / Getty Images | The Center for Reproductive Rights and our partners are awaiting a landmark decision from the United Nations Human Rights Committee. These cases, filed on behalf of four young survivors from Ecuador, Guatemala, and Nicaragua, demand justice and accountability. Here’s what you need to know: The Issue: Four girls, Norma, Fátima, Lucía, and Susana, all under 14 years old, were denied access to abortion and reproductive health care after surviving sexual violence. They were forced to carry unwanted pregnancies. The Goal: Establish global standards to protect survivors' rights and ensure access to essential healthcare. The Impact: A favorable ruling could: Strengthen SRHR protections across Latin America and globally Set a historic precedent for international human rights law by stopping once and for all forced motherhood Address systemic violations and promote justice for survivors Why It Matters: Millions in Latin America face restrictive abortion laws that perpetuate inequality, forcing many survivors into unwanted pregnancies. 🔗 | | | | In September, the Center for Reproductive Rights participated in the 79th United Nations General Assembly (UNGA), engaging global leaders on critical sexual and reproductive health and rights (SRHR) issues. Here's what we accomplished: Provided input on the Pact for the Future, a global framework supporting universal access to SRHR and gender equality Met with government and UN officials to address: Universal health care and SRHR accountability The global impacts of U.S. abortion policies Strategies to combat anti-rights movements Catalina Martínez Coral, Senior Regional Director for Latin America and the Caribbean, participated in a UN Women panel, "Toward an Equal, Just, and Secure World," where she discussed the importance of feminist foreign policy, accountability for SRHR violations, and advancing equity in regions affected by restrictive abortion laws. Our advocacy at UNGA highlights the global urgency to ensure reproductive rights are upheld and prioritized. 🔗 | | United States | | | Two and a half years after the U.S. Supreme Court's ruling overturning Roe v. Wade, access to reproductive health care in the U.S. is more unequal than ever. The reviews nearly 2,000 bills introduced across all 50 states and Washington, D.C., uncovering key trends. Anti-abortion lawmakers have intensified efforts to restrict care, even targeting out-of-state abortion seekers and their supporters. Meanwhile, eleven states have enshrined abortion protections in their constitutions, and interstate shield laws are evolving to protect providers and patients. Voter support for reproductive freedom remains steadfast, with 14 of 17 states approving abortion rights measures since 2022. However, federal threats loom as the 2024 election results could pave the way for a national abortion ban, potentially overriding state protections. 🔗 | | | Photo credit: © Center for Reproductive Rights | On November 12th, 2024, an Idaho state court began hearing testimony in Adkins v. State of Idaho, the Center for Reproductive Rights’ case challenging the state’s restrictive abortion bans. The court concluded hearing testimony on November 21st, 2024, and a decision is expected in early 2025. The Center brought this case on behalf of four Idaho women denied abortions, two Idaho physicians, and an organization of Idaho family physicians to challenge the unclear and overly narrow medical exceptions in the state's abortion bans. In challenging the medical exceptions, the Center aims to empower Idaho doctors to provide time-sensitive and health-preserving abortion care to their Idaho patients without delay. 🔗 | | | "Instead of grieving the loss of our baby with family and friends, we were forced to scramble and travel to find the care I needed... So we grieved the loss of our daughter alone, and had to leave the medical team that we had grown to love and trust through our previous pregnancy." —Jennifer Adkins, lead plaintiff in Adkins v. State of Idaho Front Lines is dedicated to keeping you informed about the global fight for reproductive rights. 🌍💬 | | | | | ---|---|---|--- The Center for Reproductive Rights uses the power of law to advance reproductive rights as fundamental human rights around the world. © Center for Reproductive Rights Center for Reproductive Rights 199 Water St. New York, NY 10038 United States

**WE KNOW** that the Electoral College benefits REPUBLICANS! It has handed them the presidency despite losing the popular vote **MULTIPLE TIMES.**

**SO WE KNOW** that we have to fight with everything we have to stand with Senate Democrats and abolish the undemocratic Electoral College!

**THAT’S WHY** we’re launching this urgent petition to pass this bill and abolish the Electoral College! [**We need 25,000 signatures before it closes at midnight. Sign on NOW »**](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/abolish_ec_dec24/?source=FFR_20241218_EMPET_E2_T0_AC&t=8&akid=22651%2E4449941%2EAxnFVx)

body:

---

In this upcoming term, we will have _94_ congresswomen in the House of Representatives, with many EMILYs List women in leadership roles. That is almost **half of the entire House Democratic caucus.**

The secret to our success? Sustained commitment from pro-choice voters and activists like _you_ , Peter. [**Don't wait! Donate before our MIDNIGHT deadline to become a card-carrying EMILYs List member next year — and be a huge part of groundbreaking wins for Democratic pro-choice women starting on DAY ONE of 2025.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98920036/518250319/2025016054?refcode=WTEFEX38_20241218_YouDidThat_ALL_v1s4&sourceid=1055508&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNDFkYjM1OS04N2JkLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RDZ_Z3GeFzPxLVQj33MRLUhKhNDFQffjMvzUwLe6Qcc=) | [BECOME A 2025 EMILYs LIST MEMBER](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98920037/518250320/2025016054?refcode=WTEFEX38_20241218_YouDidThat_ALL_v1s4&sourceid=1055508&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNDFkYjM1OS04N2JkLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RDZ_Z3GeFzPxLVQj33MRLUhKhNDFQffjMvzUwLe6Qcc=)
---
EMILYs List was founded on the mission of electing Democratic pro-choice women to office. Our founder, Ellen Malcolm, built a millions-strong community of individuals who pledged to support our candidates _all cycle long_. Because of their long-term investment, EMILYs List members have been central to the success of Democratic pro-choice women in tough races up and down the ballot.

name: Team Fetterman HQ
subject: Big fights ahead
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
We can’t afford to waste any time feeling sorry for ourselves.
#
**It's official, Derek: The Electoral College met yesterday, and Donald Trump is going to be president again.**
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20241218?refcode=em20241218-9702&refcode2=9702_434096_SDJ29B&akid=9702%2E434096%2ESDJ29B)
Look, the outcome of this election really, really sucks. But we can’t afford to waste any time feeling sorry for ourselves.
When Trump takes office, we’ve gotta hit the ground running and do what we can to stop the worst of all the crazy sh*t 💩 he tries to do.
That means **putting working people first,** fighting like hell to **defend LGBTQ+ rights and abortion rights,** and doing everything in our power to stop them from repealing the **Affordable Care Act.**
There are a lot of big fights ahead, and John’s counting on yinz to have his back as he stands up for what’s best for PA.
[**Derek, will you show your support by helping us reach our end-of-year fundraising goal? With your help we can start Trump’s next term as strong as possible.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20241218?refcode=em20241218-9702&refcode2=9702_434096_SDJ29B&akid=9702%2E434096%2ESDJ29B)
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20241218?amount=5&refcode=em20241218-9702&refcode2=9702_434096_SDJ29B&akid=9702%2E434096%2ESDJ29B)**
— Team Fetterman HQ 💛

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20241218-9702-footer&t=1&refcode2=9702_434096_SDJ29B&akid=9702%2E434096%2ESDJ29B)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=2&akid=9702%2E434096%2ESDJ29B)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=9702%2E434096%2ESDJ29B)

name: Team Jayapal
subject: Why we have to get Big Money OUT of politics
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Pramila is calling on the next DNC chair to make structural reforms to stop the influence of Big Money and dark money in Democratic primaries.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20241218-4600-footer&t=1&akid=4600%2E420207%2Ezoz1Kh)
Peter, the harsh reality is that our government will never truly prioritize the needs of working people until we get Big Money OUT of politics.
Not while any corporate special interest group with a Super PAC can credibly threaten to spend tens of millions of dollars to unseat any politician who takes an action they disagree with.
**And certainly not when billionaires like Elon Musk can single-handedly spend over a quarter billion dollars to affect the outcome of an election:**
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20241218?refcode=em20241218-4600&amount=3&refcode2=4600_420207_zoz1Kh&akid=4600%2E420207%2Ezoz1Kh)
**[Pitch in $3 to fight back](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20241218?amount=3&refcode=em20241218-4600&refcode2=4600_420207_zoz1Kh&akid=4600%2E420207%2Ezoz1Kh)**
And Democrats can’t just talk the talk — we have to walk the walk, or else voters won’t trust that we’ll actually take action when we’re in power again.
That’s why Pramila is calling on the next DNC chair to make structural reforms to stop the influence of Big Money and dark money in Democratic primaries.
That includes **reinstating the 2008 DNC ban on corporate PAC donations** _in addition to_ **banning all Super PAC spending in Democratic primaries.**
In 2024, there were more than **7 million** grassroots donors like you who contributed to Democratic campaigns. We need to restructure and reform the party’s fundraising approach to prioritize the grassroots, because that’s the only way we’re going to build a lasting coalition that can win.
This won’t be an easy fight, Peter, but with your support, **we can win.** Pramila was one of the first Members of Congress to refuse corporate PAC money, so we know it can be done if we work hard enough.
[**If you’re ready to finally get Big Money out of politics and organize the Democratic Party around a bold, populist, working class agenda, will you pitch in $3 to power Pramila’s campaign today?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20241218?refcode=em20241218-4600&amount=3&refcode2=4600_420207_zoz1Kh&akid=4600%2E420207%2Ezoz1Kh)
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20241218?amount=3&refcode=em20241218-4600&refcode2=4600_420207_zoz1Kh&akid=4600%2E420207%2Ezoz1Kh)**
Together,
Team Jayapal
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20241218-4600-footer&t=2&refcode2=4600_420207_zoz1Kh&akid=4600%2E420207%2Ezoz1Kh)**

name: DrKimSchrier.com
subject: Dangerous Republicans are trying to tell women what to do with their bodies…again.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
This time, Speaker Mike Johnson has made it clear: [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98920855/518253250/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMjBjNGU2Yi04YmJkLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8GwrRbVFpRvdD-ZYxiiOsI2z9NeMZ5r1Bk7I4aMcD64=&emci=7862789c-55bd-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=c20c4e6b-8bbd-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=15820338)
---
Peter,

Once again, the GOP is showing their true colors when it comes to reproductive freedom.

This time, Speaker Mike Johnson has made it clear: **He intends to defund Planned Parenthood and attack access to essential healthcare for millions of women across the country.**

On _Fox News,_ he openly declared his plan to strip away funding from this vital organization, making it harder for people to get the care they need, including life-saving cancer screenings, birth control, STI testing, and so much more.

Peter, cutting funding for Planned Parenthood wouldn’t just impact abortion services, _it would also limit access to these essential services for millions who rely on them,_ including low-income communities who would otherwise not have access to crucial reproductive and family planning care.

This isn’t just about one organization – it's about Republicans’ relentless attempts to roll back reproductive rights, block access to birth control, and limit women's ability to make decisions about their own bodies. Let’s be clear: **This is a fight we simply cannot afford to let them win.** But standing up to this kind of dangerous agenda requires all of us to take action, so we’re asking:

[**Can we count on you to chip in $5, $10, or anything you can, to help fight back and ensure that women’s healthcare remains accessible to all? clean_body: This time, Speaker Mike Johnson has made it clear: Peter, Once again, the GOP is showing their true colors when it comes to reproductive freedom. This time, Speaker Mike Johnson has made it clear: He intends to defund Planned Parenthood and attack access to essential healthcare for millions of women across the country. On Fox News, he openly declared his plan to strip away funding from this vital organization, making it harder for people to get the care they need, including life-saving cancer screenings, birth control, STI testing, and so much more. Peter, cutting funding for Planned Parenthood wouldn’t just impact abortion services, it would also limit access to these essential services for millions who rely on them, including low-income communities who would otherwise not have access to crucial reproductive and family planning care. This isn’t just about one organization – it's about Republicans’ relentless attempts to roll back reproductive rights, block access to birth control, and limit women's ability to make decisions about their own bodies. Let’s be clear: This is a fight we simply cannot afford to let them win. body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/9?t=1&akid=39353%2E3422442%2ExHs-Vp)
[ ](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/ttp_em20241218_congress_ban_stocks/?source=em20241218-39353&akid=39353%2E3422442%2ExHs-Vp)
Yesterday, President Biden made news by sharing his support for a ban on Members of Congress trading stocks.
Katie has been fighting to ban congressional stock trading since getting to Washington, but passing this legislation into law has faced steep hurdles, as Members on both sides of the aisle trade stocks each year.
But when Members of Congress trade stocks, it erodes trust in our elected officials, and rightly so. Democrats should lead the way and help ban congressional stock trading for good.
With President Biden coming out in support of banning Members of Congress from trading stocks, momentum is on our side, will you help Katie continue the fight?
**[Please add your name now to say that you believe Members of Congress should NOT be allowed to trade stocks.](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/ttp_em20241218_congress_ban_stocks/?source=em20241218-39353&akid=39353%2E3422442%2ExHs-Vp)**

---

Republican Senator Eric Schmitt **[put ABC hack George Stephanopoulos in his place](https://substack.com/redirect/2417d10f-6701-41c0-90eb-8cbcd88e8744?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for trying to smear Donald Trump cabinet picks, Kash Patel and Tulsi Gabbard.
Stephanopoulos is on a downward spiral, **[watch his clash with Schmitt below:](https://substack.com/redirect/2417d10f-6701-41c0-90eb-8cbcd88e8744?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[](https://substack.com/redirect/2417d10f-6701-41c0-90eb-8cbcd88e8744?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[ Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/2417d10f-6701-41c0-90eb-8cbcd88e8744?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Stephanopoulos first took aim at Gabbard, questioning whether she may have allegiances beyond the U.S. based on comments she made in the past about the Assad regime.
"She met with Assad. She has said supportive things about him and said he wasn't an enemy of the U.S.,... Does that give you any concerns as she faces confirmation for director of National Intelligence?" Stephanopoulos asked.
**[Schmitt fired back,](https://substack.com/redirect/2417d10f-6701-41c0-90eb-8cbcd88e8744?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** "I know Tulsi Gabbard. She's a patriot. She served our country honorably. She, I think, fits the reform agenda,... I think this smearing her as some sort of foreign asset is a slur against her and I look forward to her opportunity to answer these questions in these Senate confirmation hearings."
Stephanopoulos tried to pull the same thing against Kash Patel, questioning if Patel is meant primarily to seek vengeance via lawfare on Trump's political opponents.
"That agency is in desperate need of reform. KashPatel is very qualified and I think he's going to get the support in the Senate," Schmitt added.
* * *
# **Piers Morgan TAKES DOWN woke weenie for lying about Trump "rape" allegations**
Piers Morgan **[gave woke streamer Destiny a much-needed reality check](https://substack.com/redirect/97ab142f-cf6d-4d34-833d-f5d00aa3c1ed?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** when he defended George Stephanopoulos' FALSE claim that Trump was found "liable for rape," which resulted in a $15 million payout to Trump in a defamation case.
"Why do you always do this,...**[just admit you're wrong!!" ](https://substack.com/redirect/97ab142f-cf6d-4d34-833d-f5d00aa3c1ed?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[](https://substack.com/redirect/97ab142f-cf6d-4d34-833d-f5d00aa3c1ed?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

# Can Banks Really Take Your Money Without Your Consent?
_The Legal Loophole That Puts Your Savings at Risk_
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/8c7049b6-f834-4532-b739-c0b1bdccc6a0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Imagine waking up one day to find [your bank account drained](https://substack.com/redirect/8c7049b6-f834-4532-b739-c0b1bdccc6a0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)--not by scammers, but by the bank itself. It may sound like fiction, but under certain laws, financial institutions can legally seize your deposits.
In fact, two banks failed in 2024 and FDIC identified 63 banks with more than half a trillion dollars in unrealized losses.
As the economic landscape grows more unstable, banks are quietly preparing for the next wave of financial uncertainty, leaving your money vulnerable. _**[[Full Story]](https://substack.com/redirect/8c7049b6-f834-4532-b739-c0b1bdccc6a0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_

body:

MERRY CHRISTMAS _From Kari, Jeff, Ruby, and Leo_
---
| | From the Desk of
---
# **[Kari Lake](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=05ed01891fe64b03bee78674197e79b7&_e=JmhcFP8GMc__LDnUvcp_yMRkHlSjrrGokPQ8xqQ-teYkaU4IyISekFAhKnL_A3tTeqyWMa78MoDNkvUObx6d_QHv0xJZUkorFbf_NJ5hiUW4l7c4Ubrckf9q44cAWtPEl6hrZBB9h85MFkFdMlzjsfm9dHy1pM5vvvP6fOPG9DSqG8MHfNEpHGD_yofi_nSZr7cbAXlVBMm43tDm_YEIEbIkrWOs-nlOk7PMWpvTchrZ1-18VgWtN13YWQFrWqW_6mG-UVeACWCvJlSjS6chvg13ihp1bp-elqAxlScZWjH94YXU79vdx1f1crP8VHO3zzD741urccW9xmtWpSB6JnQSXm8qvuhw5VnXJcU9qsZtU7RatdwKPhWkum6s6pO6lfoBQ8S6h0pxQq7OokUgnbejA1mQwqMZoQdVkSmyq80%3D)**
---
|
---
Dear Peter,I wanted to send you this _Christmas Card_ to wish you and your family a Merry and Blessed Christmas. I’m looking forward to spending time with my family and celebrating the birth of our Lord and Savior.But Peter, I’ve got to be honest with you. There’s a dark cloud hanging over my family right now.You know that the Left is trying to use “lawfare” to financially destroy my family. When an Arizona Election official went on the record promising to _“Make life hell”_ for me, I could have never imagined it would have been this bad...I incurred hundreds of thousands of dollars in expenses to defend myself. And I’m afraid this battle is only getting started.So Peter, I don’t get to take a break for Christmas this year. I have legal bills piling up that I need to pay soon.That’s why I’m hoping – praying – you’ll read this today and consider **[generously helping me this Christmas.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=05ed01891fe64b03bee78674197e79b7&_e=JmhcFP8GMc__LDnUvcp_yMRkHlSjrrGokPQ8xqQ-teYkaU4IyISekFAhKnL_A3tTeqyWMa78MoDNkvUObx6d_QHv0xJZUkorFbf_NJ5hiUW4l7c4Ubrckf9q44cAWtPEl6hrZBB9h85MFkFdMlzjsfm9dHy1pM5vvvP6fOPG9DSqG8MHfNEpHGD_yofi_nSZr7cbAXlVBMm43tDm_YEIEbIkrWOs-nlOk7PMWpvTchrZ1-18VgWtN13YWQFrWqW_6mG-UVeACWCvJlSjS6chvhxRMAq2v8JBlNF5wR0WhIpg2dfyIFW_9WA1-ruqiIhipdkwlXEGl_Db8X7mN46NWLkTyHsSAjYlXEiMd2vIIpwfEGMzk7spUPjpzJUcKF4f68K-ftrWlz7MeqdRGKf8U2VcGjXz-pRykax-chX2Cgc%3D)** Everything I’ve done has been for election integrity. Watching Arizona botch yet another election, while silencing my legitimate questions about fraud, is a slap in the face to every Arizona voter and conservative American.It’s a national embarrassment. We have to change it.But if standing up and demanding change means you’re going to be personally and financially destroyed, we are never going to fix our elections. That’s what happened to me.As Christmas approaches, I’ve been reflecting on the state of our country.I’ve been thinking a lot about what the left has done to President Donald Trump.Radical Never-Trump prosecutors and judges threatened to take everything away from him – his businesses, his buildings, his homes, and even his freedom.Yet he fights on.He’s truly unstoppable.I thank God the American people realized this too.Peter, I’m sure you’ve felt the shift over the past few weeks. America is hungry for change, and the energy is absolutely incredible. To be candid with you, it makes facing this lawfare even more frustrating.The left lost, but they refuse to understand why. And in retaliation, they’re doubling down on their worst schemes to destroy conservatives. Including their lawfare.That leaves me with hundreds of thousands of dollars in legal expenses to pay for legitimately questioning an election we all know was crooked to the bones.
---
Peter, I’m **not** giving up.I’m in this fight for my kids, Ruby and Leo, and my husband, Jeff.And I’m in this fight for you.
---
You’ve had my back from day one when no one else did. I can’t thank you enough for that. To me, facing these attacks unafraid was worth the millions of dollars it could have cost. Because nothing in this world can come between me, my family, and my country.
---
_Not_ the Left’s lawfare._Not_ power-drunk liberal prosecutors._Not_ litigious, partisan hacks who hate the truth.
---
[Will you help me defeat the left’s lawfare by rushing back a generous contribution to my “**First Amendment Fund** ”?](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=05ed01891fe64b03bee78674197e79b7&_e=JmhcFP8GMc__LDnUvcp_yMRkHlSjrrGokPQ8xqQ-teYkaU4IyISekFAhKnL_A3tTeqyWMa78MoDNkvUObx6d_QHv0xJZUkorFbf_NJ5hiUW4l7c4Ubrckf9q44cAWtPEl6hrZBB9h85MFkFdMlzjsfm9dHy1pM5vvvP6fOPG9DSqG8MHfNEpHGD_yofi_nSZr7cbAXlVBMm43tDm_YEIEbIkrWOs-nlOk7PMWpvTchrZ1-18VgWtN13YWQFrWqW_6mG-UVeACWCvJlSjS6chvpc_2g6wgwwxDVsEiq9RXCLF-2bfjVvKjkiXgxq_PbM7XMIDPLBlbJ0yyvNo_CRbAyoNyJGykEPNkS6EDJYXGtHg2UWO3M0wHnQcjAOB7Z_34vSJ6aCzZ9OWBHTuyqCF6B5cnfXfpzokbI_j734Boiw%3D)Your generous support will help me cover the outstanding court fees, lawyers, expert witnesses, counsel, and more. The Left wanted this case to destroy my name and credibility.They also wanted to force me and my family into bankruptcy.Peter, it’s scary to think about what this Christmas might look like if the Left had won... Thanks to generous supporters like you, I’m spending this holiday with my family. But these legal bills are looming over our heads. I would be so thankful if you could help out.Your donation will get me one step closer to paying off these legal bills. But if you’re in the position to send more, I want you to know personally how much it means to me and how large of an impact it will have. Every dollar given will help me finish this fight... without financially destroying my family.[All I ask is that rush your “**First Amendment Fund” Emergency Contribution** before midnight, if you can.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=05ed01891fe64b03bee78674197e79b7&_e=JmhcFP8GMc__LDnUvcp_yMRkHlSjrrGokPQ8xqQ-teYkaU4IyISekFAhKnL_A3tTeqyWMa78MoDNkvUObx6d_QHv0xJZUkorFbf_NJ5hiUW4l7c4Ubrckf9q44cAWtPEl6hrZBB9h85MFkFdMlzjsfm9dHy1pM5vvvP6fOPG9DSqG8MHfNEpHGD_yofi_nSZr7cbAXlVBMm43tDm_YEIEbIkrWOs-nlOk7PMWpvTchrZ1-18VgWtN13YWQFrWqW_6mG-UVeACWCvJlSjS6chvhK_vuk7Cl5HJLys1TCqR8MSio9DUKefKJGM2MBc8bi3EbD-v4v3ObvzKfNyTptf1w3eK-ZBQKWtNexNusHS9iy2ybceA6rdu3vVdRbZhUnjdkIOvSql4jcbN0EjYKcuaiAnlwwYT2yHzQn9s3Jc5Bg%3D)

---
Thank you for always being there for me, especially during this holiday season. Please know that I’m still fighting because I want _you_ to live in a free and prosperous America.Merry Christmas,
---
| |
---
---
Kari Lake

Kari Lake
---
| | P.S. Christmas is coming up fast, so I hope my message doesn’t get lost in the shuffle. I need your help. The left’s lawfare has put hundreds of thousands of dollars in legal fees on my lap. A generous group has stepped up and offered to help me pay off these outstanding bills, but they can’t do it without your generous support. clean_body: As Christmas approaches, I’ve been reflecting on the state of our country. | | | | | | | MERRY CHRISTMAS From Kari, Jeff, Ruby, and Leo | | From the Desk of | Dear Peter,I wanted to send you this Christmas Card to wish you and your family a Merry and Blessed Christmas. I’m looking forward to spending time with my family and celebrating the birth of our Lord and Savior.But Peter, I’ve got to be honest with you. There’s a dark cloud hanging over my family right now.You know that the Left is trying to use “lawfare” to financially destroy my family. When an Arizona Election official went on the record promising to “Make life hell” for me, I could have never imagined it would have been this bad...I incurred hundreds of thousands of dollars in expenses to defend myself. And I’m afraid this battle is only getting started.So Peter, I don’t get to take a break for Christmas this year. I have legal bills piling up that I need to pay soon.That’s why I’m hoping – praying – you’ll read this today and consider Everything I’ve done has been for election integrity. Watching Arizona botch yet another election, while silencing my legitimate questions about fraud, is a slap in the face to every Arizona voter and conservative American.It’s a national embarrassment. We have to change it.But if standing up and demanding change means you’re going to be personally and financially destroyed, we are never going to fix our elections. That’s what happened to me.As Christmas approaches, I’ve been reflecting on the state of our country.I’ve been thinking a lot about what the left has done to President Donald Trump.Radical Never-Trump prosecutors and judges threatened to take everything away from him – his businesses, his buildings, his homes, and even his freedom.Yet he fights on.He’s truly unstoppable.I thank God the American people realized this too.Peter, I’m sure you’ve felt the shift over the past few weeks. America is hungry for change, and the energy is absolutely incredible. To be candid with you, it makes facing this lawfare even more frustrating.The left lost, but they refuse to understand why. And in retaliation, they’re doubling down on their worst schemes to destroy conservatives. Including their lawfare.That leaves me with hundreds of thousands of dollars in legal expenses to pay for legitimately questioning an election we all know was crooked to the bones. Peter, I’m not giving up.I’m in this fight for my kids, Ruby and Leo, and my husband, Jeff.And I’m in this fight for you. You’ve had my back from day one when no one else did. I can’t thank you enough for that. To me, facing these attacks unafraid was worth the millions of dollars it could have cost. Because nothing in this world can come between me, my family, and my country. Not the Left’s lawfare.Not power-drunk liberal prosecutors.Not litigious, partisan hacks who hate the truth. generous support will help me cover the outstanding court fees, lawyers, expert witnesses, counsel, and more. The Left wanted this case to destroy my name and credibility.They also wanted to force me and my family into bankruptcy.Peter, it’s scary to think about what this Christmas might look like if the Left had won... Thanks to generous supporters like you, I’m spending this holiday with my family. But these legal bills are looming over our heads. I would be so thankful if you could help out.Your donation will get me one step closer to paying off these legal bills. But if you’re in the position to send more, I want you to know personally how much it means to me and how large of an impact it will have. Every dollar given will help me finish this fight... without financially destroying my family. Thank you for always being there for me, especially during this holiday season. Please know that I’m still fighting because I want you to live in a free and prosperous America.Merry Christmas, | | Kari Lake | | | Kari Lake | | P.S. Christmas is coming up fast, so I hope my message doesn’t get lost in the shuffle. I need your help. The left’s lawfare has put hundreds of thousands of dollars in legal fees on my lap. We are so grateful to all the care workers and caregivers in our lives for doing the essential work that makes everything else possible.
****We’re ready to continue the fight for the care agenda in 2025, but right now, it’s important to rest and recharge after a long year.****
For those of you who are working over the holidays, or caring for family or friends, we are sending you extra thanks and support.
Have a restful holiday season,

name: Royce White
subject: A hungry pack of wolves that’s never full
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROYCE WHITE FOR SENATE
body:
This is the way forward
| [ ](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=9221ca0159404ce0a3ea699a3b444f7c&_e=vpe0UNqQg6rKpLZ9jyDkE4uX6oRkicyw6P_FTZMLdJEPjQxCTfrwhYEeqli4i7WEjp2F_-Knr5SwOM243vnQ0JzAAh6xd3Gh8g9tyzrEdMPaI6O_yNgLNa5uOTlhEgdNdmeZJgvJbD3WBMzeingkp1AKf1YGGVUE1057z6YVwkzuDb8NQuhZhHjY0OHz5HpNmBlD6aS0lpGlsrhylNylDdxcSFOQMBv5mZDnQ64LBm_9E80Dk8luATkYTwa6SGNsTxVjeKLR-ZCkaHGpWb1KFwM3fCpAiTcpmDZvf2CUxyIeX4f7YKCQcJSILuGRrIPYUdn9vCiP8J1lwy64emhd0w%3D%3D)
---

Peter,

**There is not a moment to spare.** [**Can you chip in just $10 to help me hit my midnight deadline?**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=9221ca0159404ce0a3ea699a3b444f7c&_e=vpe0UNqQg6rKpLZ9jyDkE4uX6oRkicyw6P_FTZMLdJEPjQxCTfrwhYEeqli4i7WEjp2F_-Knr5SwOM243vnQ0JzAAh6xd3Gh8g9tyzrEdMPaI6O_yNgLNa5uOTlhEgdNdmeZJgvJbD3WBMzeingkp1AKf1YGGVUE1057z6YVwkzuDb8NQuhZhHjY0OHz5HpNmFSgeBS5efSnNbWeIC0ri7QeLOtBQGgb9xTKjx88ix_LXUKQjvsNDu4qxMpy1XQ3th1_Yf0RK2TXyh-udKcuLEYM3ndQdWcn0PPhwKA2FZfRg6M30E5WdlelcJppivTTniAw1wJ7l8mzP49Ii7T1MA%3D%3D)

My campaign for Senate is like a hungry pack of wolves that's never satisfied, whose bellies are never full.

This is the way forward for America... Relentless... Pressure! Relentless in our efforts. I'm running for United States Senate in Minnesota in 2026. What can they say now?

I know what they'll say. They'll say the same things they've been saying about me for YEARS.

**They want me to be a slave and servant to their Radical Left politics just because I am Black.

I'll NEVER abandon my morals and principles. I'll NEVER stop thinking for myself.**

I'm a Black Republican who's HELL BENT on becoming Minnesota's FIRST Black Republican Senator.

[**I need your help. Can you rush $10 before midnight?**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=9221ca0159404ce0a3ea699a3b444f7c&_e=vpe0UNqQg6rKpLZ9jyDkE4uX6oRkicyw6P_FTZMLdJEPjQxCTfrwhYEeqli4i7WEjp2F_-Knr5SwOM243vnQ0JzAAh6xd3Gh8g9tyzrEdMPaI6O_yNgLNa5uOTlhEgdNdmeZJgvJbD3WBMzeingkp1AKf1YGGVUE1057z6YVwkzuDb8NQuhZhHjY0OHz5HpNL2Pp9EiwW20i5h0_tmmlOLyWNlpjUUK7f3ZF3TvqSNRTSymn6Vc4f7FAowxTdk8qhAZBrZg6Wn3Zv6KLABfWxivhp5QRGd0qIcYOeW0yv3J2T_RY8cr7EMCWVI2Ny62jkrSDnBquF25-YblQNqIpLA%3D%3D)

My Radical Left Opponent, Tina Smith, already has an election war-chest of MILLIONS OF DOLLARS to spend against me, and the Radical Left will continue to pour more money into her campaign.

I'm just one guy going up against the Radical Left Machine. I need your help if I'm going to take down this Radical Leftist and give President Trump one more MAGA Senator to support his America-First Agenda.

| [ **THE PEOPLE ARE COMING!** ](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=9221ca0159404ce0a3ea699a3b444f7c&_e=vpe0UNqQg6rKpLZ9jyDkE4uX6oRkicyw6P_FTZMLdJEPjQxCTfrwhYEeqli4i7WEjp2F_-Knr5SwOM243vnQ0JzAAh6xd3Gh8g9tyzrEdMPaI6O_yNgLNa5uOTlhEgdNdmeZJgvJbD3WBMzeingkp1AKf1YGGVUE1057z6YVwkzuDb8NQuhZhHjY0OHz5HpNx_NOYBaqBmHsK5w3sM-TT0TUs9FCjZ3q49P3s4Jw57XdhbMpROe7oGDdG27PUIAxBbW9M9aIX020F9YeI6iRuRj3BDnzwTQSH463KUyDy-Ssl9-GCyVtaX58LrBSZfmyl3MRPYO26fuZU1c4RK5Taw%3D%3D)
---

God Bless,
Royce White

[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=9221ca0159404ce0a3ea699a3b444f7c&_e=vpe0UNqQg6rKpLZ9jyDkE4uX6oRkicyw6P_FTZMLdJEPjQxCTfrwhYEeqli4i7WEjp2F_-Knr5SwOM243vnQ0JzAAh6xd3Gh8g9tyzrEdMPaI6O_yNgLNa5uOTlhEgdNdmeZJgvJbD3WBMzeingkp1AKf1YGGVUE1057z6YVwkzuDb8NQuhZhHjY0OHz5HpNVG_JIbkgIebiht60-FxC0yJC5bGrc8tzIsU5UBok9Le6AlYLbV8qdQ1Gnd6iPu0uQaWOh3v_8jVK-6wlbXGXqbihuJ3MSwvh2gchcjzW3NnU1BhxouD0Ik_iXCEjjEv9cA15RTm-JZC2QFSpFTOliA%3D%3D)

Meet Royce White:

**Born and raised in the Twin Cities, Royce White was the son of a single mother and started playing sports at the age of 5 years old. Living in various neighborhoods growing up, much of his family remained in the Rondo community, where he spent much of his time and received schooling. White excelled at basketball and recieved a scholarship to play basketball at the University of Minnesota, and later transferred to Iowa State. He would go on to make Dean's List while receiving All Big-12 first-team honors and many other basketball awards.

_After being selected 16th overall by The Houston Rockets in the NBA draft, White began to voice concerns about the NBA 's collective bargaining agreement (CBA), specifically regarding mental health policy, which at the time did not exist. Eventually, his concerns became a public dispute between White and the NBA. This resulted in White demanding that the NBA, as a representative of the global corporate community, take up the responsibility of spearheading the mental health conversation - not just posturing through press statements, but through policy._

Royce then went on to win two championships in Canada before moving over to play Big 3 Basketball. White appeared at a game in a t-shirt that read "Free The Uyghurs." After a game-winning basket, White did a post-game interview on CBS, where he called for 2 Million Uyghurs to be freed and released from concentration camps. As the season went on, White would touch on taboo topics such as Gain of Function Research, The Federal Reserve, Julian Assange, Edward Snowden, Larry Hoover, Jeff Fort, Muammar Gaddafi, The Great Reset, Ivermectin, Me Too, etc.

Now, Royce White is running for Senate in Minnesota to take down the Radical Left. Republicans have not seen recent success in Minnesota, but Royce's campaign is different: a grassroots movement that's sick of the Radical Agenda pushed by Far Left Democrats Tina Smith and Ilhan Omar. Royce needs your help to pull off a fourth quarter comeback victory and FLIP Minnesota Red for Republicans.

** [**PASS ROYCE AN ASSIST**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=9221ca0159404ce0a3ea699a3b444f7c&_e=vpe0UNqQg6rKpLZ9jyDkE4uX6oRkicyw6P_FTZMLdJEPjQxCTfrwhYEeqli4i7WEjp2F_-Knr5SwOM243vnQ0JzAAh6xd3Gh8g9tyzrEdMPaI6O_yNgLNa5uOTlhEgdNdmeZJgvJbD3WBMzeingkp1AKf1YGGVUE1057z6YVwkzuDb8NQuhZhHjY0OHz5HpNf-rQr6r_n-kVLHs3SB7OsjvO9AIrjKF75-lKXo4IQF4-2X0ajQwzvKI__6p6-VO4HQIM3JyFsOOIO-21TCcmLsmD7g_fTNBVX1d8LPENAeghgW4ko6jik2x7_MMK7VSTvG8EcpRagakFvQtUjrYJ-Q%3D%3D)

---

PAID FOR BY ROYCE WHITE FOR SENATE
P.O. Box 5473 Hopkins, MN 55343

---

You are receiving this email because you are interested in updates from Royce White, Senate Candidate in Minnesota.

This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Don't want to receive our emails anymore? [ ](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=9221ca0159404ce0a3ea699a3b444f7c&_e=vpe0UNqQg6rKpLZ9jyDkExePL1LMkjLAxX781nj3hryFUsxOanVR5-TLnpOT9I1FsnYyCMAiUZzrdtYrd1ETovpcLu-auffyPw1EWnsVbdlDqMFRzoYTvL3yuJnMNe5fbZG7YHxpCQZaQJpXFQ9rYc_N8jDxTHywfuHL7miHCVSmqniwm7v3zjmv6s5NVL-h7hyItDUbVDiAzyAbAsqrhfqeJYrcuWpu4dddOw0iqVXO0vAu6t5XRmboRjkUZF5w)

body:
It's your last chance to reserve your spot - 7:15 start time!

| | [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=JgyyvCfQwldlSeD7KJl_Ih7269o_4hwqOhPs1_PHvgI&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=eoy_event_final_send&n=1)
---
Wednesday, December 18, 2024 | Peter -- Don't miss out! Our end of year event, _Looking Backward, Moving Forward,_ is **tonight at 7:15**! This is your last chance to reserve your spot. It's going to be one big celebration as we look back at our fantastic 2024 and aim for an even bigger 2025\. We'll hear from our board chair and founders about the successes this year, and we'll even hear from **Senator-Elect John Curtis and Representative Don Davis** , the first members of the U.S. Congress to officially affiliate with the Forward Party. | [](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=fTauy-itwlWmXjZxdHIXXdxRao4VlYAUdDO7auT7XRvSUqy8PVTLRow1ubiqmiaAUi4qCMLxPcF0vsswiCG98U9L7fC3eKHzQyOuii4SF2-Egm1e43O6UsXvC8Auio1h&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=eoy_event_final_send&n=2 "Register Now!") [Register Now!](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=fTauy-itwlWmXjZxdHIXXdxRao4VlYAUdDO7auT7XRvSUqy8PVTLRow1ubiqmiaAUi4qCMLxPcF0vsswiCG98U9L7fC3eKHzQyOuii4SF2-Egm1e43O6UsXvC8Auio1h&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=eoy_event_final_send&n=2)
---
**The Silent(ish) Auction!**
We're holding a _silent(ish)* auction_ for **a lunch with either Forward Party Co-Founders Andrew Yang or Governor Christine Todd Whitman!** (Both are up for auction)**
[](https://home.forwardparty.com/yang_silent_auction?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=eoy_event_final_send&n=3 "Bid On Lunch With Andrew Yang Now!") [Bid On Lunch With Andrew Yang Now!](https://home.forwardparty.com/yang_silent_auction?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=eoy_event_final_send&n=3)
---
[](https://home.forwardparty.com/ctw_silent_auction?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=eoy_event_final_send&n=4 "Bid On Lunch With Governor Whitman Now!") [Bid On Lunch With Governor Whitman Now!](https://home.forwardparty.com/ctw_silent_auction?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=eoy_event_final_send&n=4)
---
Participation is easy! [Just go to this page to bid on lunch with Andrew Yang](https://home.forwardparty.com/yang_silent_auction?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=eoy_event_final_send&n=5) and [this page to bid on lunch with Governor Whitman](https://home.forwardparty.com/ctw_silent_auction?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=eoy_event_final_send&n=6) and make a pledge. Whoever makes the highest pledge before 12/19 at 5 pm will win the chance for lunch! If you aren't the winning pledge, you won't have to donate the amount you pledged (but we would appreciate anything you can chip in, anyway!).
**Support us into the next year!**
To help build momentum into 2025, we've launched a big fundraising push! Two donors have committed to a **$20,000 match in December!***** That means every dollar you donate will count double (until we hit $20,000 raised)!
[](https://home.forwardparty.com/donate_2024_eoy?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=eoy_event_final_send&n=7 "Chip In $25 Today!") [Chip In $25 Today!](https://home.forwardparty.com/donate_2024_eoy?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=eoy_event_final_send&n=7)
---
Thank you for everything you’ve done to make this year such a success. We’re excited to see what we can accomplish together in 2025—and we hope to celebrate with you on December 18th!
With Thanks,
The Forward Party
[](https://home.forwardparty.com/?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=eoy_event_final_send&n=8)[](https://home.forwardparty.com/?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=eoy_event_final_send&n=9)[](https://home.forwardparty.com/?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=eoy_event_final_send&n=10)[](https://home.forwardparty.com/?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=eoy_event_final_send&n=11)[https://home.forwardparty.com/](https://home.forwardparty.com/?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=eoy_event_final_send&n=12)
> _*The names of people pledging will not be publicized unless you choose to allow them to be. The highest current pledge amount will be publicized periodically throughout the auction._
> _**[Terms and conditions apply](https://home.forwardparty.com/auction_rules?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=eoy_event_final_send&n=13). The lunch with Andrew Yang would take place in New York City. The lunch with Governor Whitman would take place in Arizona. The Forward Party and its affiliates are not responsible for your travel costs. _
> _***This fundraiser is a joint fundraising effort between Forward Party Hard PAC and Forward Party Super PAC. All donations made through this website will be allocated to the Hard PAC, with matches going to the Super PAC, up to the allotted match amount. All costs will be borne based on the ratio of money raised._

name: Harry Dunn
subject: I'm going to level with you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Harry Dunn for Congress
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98922202/518258425/604658357?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2024.12.18_EOQ-Approaching_B1_F1_S1_C1_U1_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTAzODYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODMzZDY5Y2MtOTNiZC1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAwZDNhOWQ1ODQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=5mZDecIbIboCvHZOQcYaAhbv27PL9ea7GbNHyaFuk0s=#)
---
Look, I'm going to level with you, friend.

It's hard to feel optimistic about the future of our country with Donald Trump just days away from retaking office.

But the reality is, our new job of holding him and every other MAGA-extremist accountable has just begun. They will cast aside law and order, and overturn the Constitution to have unchecked power. I know this danger first hand, and I’ve committed the rest of my life to holding Donald Trump and his loyalists accountable. But I can’t do that without your help and support.

[**At the end of the month, we face our first FEC deadline since the election. And at our current rate, we're going to fall short._That's why we're asking you to step up today and chip in just a few dollars to help us defend democracy and hold Donald Trump accountable. clean_body: | =# Look, I'm going to level with you, friend. It's hard to feel optimistic about the future of our country with Donald Trump just days away from retaking office. But the reality is, our new job of holding him and every other MAGA-extremist accountable has just begun. They will cast aside law and order, and overturn the Constitution to have unchecked power. I know this danger first hand, and I’ve committed the rest of my life to holding Donald Trump and his loyalists accountable. But I can’t do that without your help and support. = | = = | = ---|--- = | = = | = I wouldn't ask if it wasn't important, Harry Dunn = Harry Dunn for Congress PO Box 1449 Columbia, MD 21044 United States | Paid for by Harry Dunn for Congress

name: Liz Urban
subject: Baby’s first Christmas… because of you

As we celebrate the miracle of Christ’s birth, we’re reminded that unexpected pregnancies can bring about love and joy beyond anything we can imagine.
