#
Friend of Life,

As we celebrate the miracle of Christ's birth, we're reminded that unexpected pregnancies can bring about love and joy beyond anything we can imagine. Yet, thousands of preborn children are at risk every day. Many women facing unplanned pregnancies feel alone and fearful, but your support can offer them hope.

This Christmas, you can help spread the truth that **children are blessings, not burdens.** We're looking for caring, pro-life people like you to step forward and donate $100 or more to give preborn children at risk of abortion their very first Christmas.

What better gift can you give this Christmas than the gift of life itself?

And, when you give a gift of $100 or more today, we'll send you a beautiful etched glass Christmas mug for free as our heartfelt thanks for your support. Each time you hold this mug, you will be reminded of the children who will experience their first Christmas because of you. [ ](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/u/click?_t=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_m=1a7950eec77041b0bdc07ae5494c94ed&_e=GBz1wDAuPajlOpSx3z3ZHKeA_2av9_YTRbQp90-5HpAZO0J4wsShiMlmdOo__H3a121iNpGjmndmIMVZb4EDEsz26vaaC0Mv4iLXisNPnSeC5w-OiG5f1zfsjSYQDjccaABUv5y3bryTCrLWpJJnlWWQ54I_gXwZAzk3Ry2RuBZHwUEQ30SZMRbZ_eE0YdKMMiDcaF7afXdeqz7v5bFuxU-CJdSf3WEH5DBxrF8lrYNKdQcOnTTykW8BYOxGFD8orf5sQnWP40ACT7yHuC_umf2qd62nGY3uVurlXHatdDSrS4usmiP9zK5RzuzUYyEggrVQgoaxiqu8eyL4dX7KPxTv6tTbDCEdkaFLYLF0_5Q%3D)
Please stand with us for life this Christmas. Every donation helps reach those who need to hear that life is precious. Your generosity will help change hearts and save lives currently at risk this Christmas season.

Click below to make your gift and secure your exclusive mug in time for Christmas. **[https://give.liveaction.org/give-hope-this-christmas/](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/u/click?_t=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_m=1a7950eec77041b0bdc07ae5494c94ed&_e=GBz1wDAuPajlOpSx3z3ZHKeA_2av9_YTRbQp90-5HpAZO0J4wsShiMlmdOo__H3a121iNpGjmndmIMVZb4EDEsz26vaaC0Mv4iLXisNPnSeC5w-OiG5f1zfsjSYQDjccaABUv5y3bryTCrLWpJJnlWWQ54I_gXwZAzk3Ry2RuBZHwUEQ30SZMRbZ_eE0YdKMMiDcaF7afXdeqz7v5bFuxebuHDWRPJNXJ9lNRqJF5OMEzFy8EeFIAXrnR5MDW2-XfXEysTL0bscXPMDSMZISHxLgnMuBELvhWG4G26HYWeefXmqqRAHPd3Yt0RQtB3ke5lQD6fGME4pMLVmQq3Pv-XajSp-sU9ATWIW90ep4Eoo%3D)**

For Life,

Liz Urban
**Donor Service Manager**

name: Josh Hawley on The Mysterious Drones
subject: 'GETTING WEIRDER': Sen. Hawley says officials need to level with Americans about drone sightings
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee
body:
Watch the Jesse Watters Primetime Interview| | | [](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=d6704a4f706a446d8202dc657b26d088&_e=93bqyXNpbaar2WLJo-ydp50MnKTipkTPSiU015cIxSb61Tf8D4w8LDZTkW24Vh2zTMRhptqkCUoWGiYVtpvHfB315h5NEV6OYrm103H3M0_M6oAxkarRcNLLRUv8HdTQ91QHl-O5GrYemhlI4zJjBPcxUILlZ-_VOOaYxKCzkjH59CbIZ6PGHmhms9y3t9sbGd2iVph38YBpgXNunqQXLbaBecpc9hM013S5lu10vXfQmQXcGoFlo3eWAVvu4cOdw1o2u_ycmjSdwmlDN9GvNxzDKDAdTeksplMSAuYO9XD45m26mwIvmO7yrRBgmJK0fp0nHsuDz2C2JFOoasClyU1aN9GFOKuBwui7VRAeXuIY_RoRE4llrbGDgcuqrDFc_6jyRHNw-l35Umv08YWWNg%3D%3D)
---
Peter,
---
We, as taxpayers, fork over _trillions_ of dollars to the federal government every year, yet all that money can't tell us what the massive, mysterious drones flying over the American homeland are. And the people with the answers are stonewalling us and hiding the truth. Biden's corrupt administration canceled public meetings and is trying to send low-level bureaucrats to _closed-door_ meetings. We need the truth and we need it now! Josh joined Jesse Watters Primetime to tell Jesse what he knows and what all still needs to be answered! _**WATCH THE JESSE WATTERS PRIMETIME INTERVIEW****⬇⬇⬇**_
---
[](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=d6704a4f706a446d8202dc657b26d088&_e=93bqyXNpbaar2WLJo-ydp50MnKTipkTPSiU015cIxSb61Tf8D4w8LDZTkW24Vh2zTMRhptqkCUoWGiYVtpvHfB315h5NEV6OYrm103H3M0_M6oAxkarRcNLLRUv8HdTQ91QHl-O5GrYemhlI4zJjBPcxUILlZ-_VOOaYxKCzkjH59CbIZ6PGHmhms9y3t9sbGd2iVph38YBpgXNunqQXLbaBecpc9hM013S5lu10vXfQmQXcGoFlo3eWAVvu4cOdJxcCLsOi7760RZ6y_UAQHgZbz3FFsitQ0v-ro057zfrEUSmX6SZgzSxAXGUXLKjPtBo-FCxgnpbuDcznloNj694gxvMLkI-5ozIcigg7OBiZISX8Po2F24gPyzwmv4Um5dmvrDub0jIYjtkKGqPUmw%3D%3D)
---
Here's a great exchange from the interview: **Jesse** : "Your colleagues in the House, they just got briefed and we haven't had any leaks. When they got briefed on Russia, we got leaks about one minute after the session was over. Why aren't they telling us anything?" **Josh** : "I suspect it's because they are getting the total run around. They are probably getting told what we've been told in the Senate – that well actually, they aren't really drones, well maybe they are drones, and maybe some of them are military drones, but probably most of them are hobbyists, just don't worry. But here's the deal Jesse, when we are shutting down air force bases, Patterson Air Force base gets shut down for a while, when commercial airlines are interfered with, they can't do their flight patterns, that is weird. You can't tell me the government doesn't know what's going on here."
---
In Liberty,
---
Team Hawley
---
[**SUPPORT JOSH'S FIGHT FOR TRUTH >>>**](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=d6704a4f706a446d8202dc657b26d088&_e=93bqyXNpbaar2WLJo-ydp50MnKTipkTPSiU015cIxSb61Tf8D4w8LDZTkW24Vh2zTMRhptqkCUoWGiYVtpvHfB315h5NEV6OYrm103H3M0_M6oAxkarRcNLLRUv8HdTQ91QHl-O5GrYemhlI4zJjBPcxUILlZ-_VOOaYxKCzkjH59CbIZ6PGHmhms9y3t9sbGd2iVph38YBpgXNunqQXLbaBecpc9hM013S5lu10vXfQmQXcGoFlo3eWAVvu4cOduTxZvr_ARTsdVNjI-j4H0oFwbTf7yyl-7tnEVhXKi6fS8T5r9swSoYISKRqF1b40HsQmYBbg5Tm2jgWfZW4MIt0ev4il0P4dNhrr1bxlTUntHAJy88TvgXp-6ihrVy5LIGDN7F2G_GMUcuL2hJ2nHw%3D%3D)
---

name: Mazie Hirono
subject: Happy holidays!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mazie Hirono For Hawaii**
body:
|
#
---
Aloha Peter, As the holidays approach, I find myself thinking about the things that bring us joy. One way I find joy is through food — making it, sharing it, and yes, eating it. From the creativity involved with testing new recipes, to the community created by sharing a dish, food makes things better. One of my favorite recipes this year is a beef stew that calls for two glasses of red wine (I’ll let you guess why I enjoy it so much). **[Here’s a link to the recipe](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98922742/518259813/-990341073?srsltid=AfmBOooRHK71KDoTWGfngUajoy0S0ywA_VkhOLXCbVLfgnWRQlGJojWq&refcode=AU_MKH_CL_GEN_NOA_AC_20241218_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OWJmMTk0OC05N2JkLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bhXj8rBXETrQkDwb-ca5Yj0wm9INTQTtrR-2zeeSi1E=&emci=6e38d2e6-56bd-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=59bf1948-97bd-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=23190490)** in case you want to try it this holiday season. If you have a favorite recipe, this is the year to share it. Share it with me, I’d love to give it a try! But no matter what’s on your plate, I hope you and your loved ones have a safe and happy holiday season filled with joy, peace, and lots of yummy food. — Mazie
Friends of Mazie Hirono
335 Merchant Street
#677
Honolulu, HI 96809
United States **[info@mazieforhawaii.com](mailto:info@mazieforhawaii.com)** | **Paid for by Mazie Hirono For Hawaii**
---
**This email was sent to**dpwillis67@gmail.com**. If you wish to no longer receive these messages, please [unsubscribe.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/IXX1bOq_HUCaPNAPmQIyCg2?unsubscribedata=vW8rpvrX%2FI6ZAi6dKUj8XTfbXT52Xnutc4olZt1Ch4Wm%2FP1uVAVjzfQHrX6Y%2FGrn2mq%2F9K5dLkWKoURKOqUA0jzvjYKvuIztrBVwds1wwi5GXaLjHapQMmcD2AfpvkucFy04K%2FpO58s3CKo1%2FosL14gPkY%2B9ynhh1XPl7%2BDVaLTR2QA6Yj%2FeynZR0lFMJdXZkqKbEdqBTyXL34%2FCsVGItdrCJTL48eGKW2T9JE6qy8ay7YNx99MfQEE%2Bbsh531IOIjXXTgk8pqs2AdRYkVuniRFKTZ3M08wdMkh9393uDLMRMVR5ZrU%2BFaBtf3rlWf5%2B7BuYsgfW1NQj1PirukCWgmrUEYvSSRelV8V%2F936QRZDKpm2ABUQ1TWDSA3SKqffQhXYx43Pm%2Fj%2BXoR8mhNXWT5vzBVtXBv5onm3Rk7afM3jEeDI6df5pVoyR5jbinaEU)**

name: Jim Jordan
subject: A mere “toss-up” majority?
body:
I refuse to let all of our hard work be for nothing.
| Peter – since I last emailed you, this situation has become far more serious.
---
With numerous special elections just around the corner in the new year, our _new_ majority was _already_ going to be facing a razor-thin margin of just 1 seat.
---
But now, with reports indicating that yet another special election will soon be announced, the majority we fought tirelessly for all year long could now be a mere **TOSS-UP!**
---
Trust me, I know just how much time, effort, and resources from hardworking Americans like YOU went into securing such a big victory this November.
---
_That’s why I pulled**$2.5 MILLION** from my own 2024 campaign funds to help defend our majority from Kamala and the Democrats' warchest._
---
And now, with everything on the line, I REFUSE to let all of our hard work be for _nothing_.
---
So, before we officially close the books on 2024, I’m looking for **2.5 million PATRIOTS** to match my 2024 commitment with a contribution of truly ANY amount to help defend our new majority.
---
[**Please make a grassroots contribution of any size to match my commitment to DEFEND our new House majority that could soon be a mere TOSS-UP.**](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=e41e2e7cf38342ddabfe3b8d54cd130e&_e=KFbF_EfX3tujzTYolV0VrUqcoeiKITme9h2Fy45a46Y7d4_DKUwpFvHqM_3mDZyW0PlCrk60t7lB7E6HyrImXBujxS3Am-BLc8CVEYdiqN3gHPF4JyF3ZTVJUmCg4iWc8A93amYNsAYPXGJV5wIciYbaKBLvrFehEZwb3ep2d7lwDeQbRC4mG_w90BKgPkQP9RUbObz3CJ4o7KNTkiZ4gLdSh-85H5Yp5gtTUC7sQXEyWj6texUSRRUyViyj-AukgCxCvvVB--Ca31-VgbS0q4V-dXkzC6mgngvR4-plI0om3ItZxnTw9Xn0CMD6Huu4tarQ3UL3V1BiwEYb5EEjUdySDII4oGAYHmxQyb3zpcW7TbIH8XctGBbIC3CYab-p7XGUFvqF_NQWjA0leKysdfj49HeepEdFakDamzpm5rU%3D)

\- - - - Forwarded Message - - - -

**From:** **Jim Jordan**
**Date:** Fri, December 6, 2024
**Subject:** Just 1 SEAT?!
**To:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
---
[](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=e41e2e7cf38342ddabfe3b8d54cd130e&_e=KFbF_EfX3tujzTYolV0VrUqcoeiKITme9h2Fy45a46Y7d4_DKUwpFvHqM_3mDZyW0PlCrk60t7lB7E6HyrImXBujxS3Am-BLc8CVEYdiqN3gHPF4JyF3ZTVJUmCg4iWc8A93amYNsAYPXGJV5wIciYbaKBLvrFehEZwb3ep2d7lwDeQbRC4mG_w90BKgPkQP9RUbObz3CJ4o7KNTkiZ4gLdSh-85H5Yp5gtTUC7sQXEyWj6texUSRRUyViyj-AukgCxCvvVB--Ca31-VgbS0q1RdYEkCDrNpckr79l_NNg35f23vG0iT18NSgP41un5ikRNig263EIU6UN2QXpHFyzlQoXTioidBZhg4glpg9kHoCvuLMYqbQSd6__b8SYCCjJxtDcVGfDvBq9WfbTrj-mRUJ57aKL1XeyVQMGVxcxM%3D)
---
Peter,
---
Please don’t misunderstand...
---
I don’t want this email to come across as a message of doom and gloom.
---
_After all, no one can deny the sweeping mandate that President Trump and Republicans were just given by voters like YOU, sweeping the White House _AND_ both chambers of Congress. _
---
But we also must face a glaring reality:
---
**Very soon – with a number of special elections already on the books for 2025 – our new majority will be narrowed to just 1 SEAT.**
---
Yes, you read that right. _1 seat._
---
I know how hard you fought for this new majority, Peter. I’m right there with you...
---
**Over the course of the election, I transferred _$2.5 million_ from my own campaign to help counter Kamala’s plot to buy our House majority.**
---
And now that our new majority could be hanging on by a thread next year, I refuse to let those efforts go to waste.
---
That’s why I have no choice but to reach out before year’s end.
---
I’m asking **_2.5 million patriots_** to match my 2024 commitment with a contribution of ANY amount to help defend our NEW majority that will soon be cut down to just 1 SEAT.
---
[**Please make a grassroots contribution of any size to match my commitment to DEFEND our House majority and SAVE AMERICA.**](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=e41e2e7cf38342ddabfe3b8d54cd130e&_e=KFbF_EfX3tujzTYolV0VrUqcoeiKITme9h2Fy45a46Y7d4_DKUwpFvHqM_3mDZyW0PlCrk60t7lB7E6HyrImXBujxS3Am-BLc8CVEYdiqN3gHPF4JyF3ZTVJUmCg4iWc8A93amYNsAYPXGJV5wIciYbaKBLvrFehEZwb3ep2d7lwDeQbRC4mG_w90BKgPkQP9RUbObz3CJ4o7KNTkiZ4gLdSh-85H5Yp5gtTUC7sQXEyWj6texUSRRUyViyj-AukgCxCvvVB--Ca31-VgbS0q4ePcskS7AcB73Mdo9teI-SUh09mLMWfqC86g_a5JA0kKU4eNRqiRw-fF6zHAgv_6uGFMsUI3-0guVGEd5tvb-aIY4fKxC4r9AuD-VcWLKVw4ZeGFQZ9j_96Mdlh4jN2GOFgb2Udl5XYgJ_bptLVWhE%3D)

clean_body: I refuse to let all of our hard work be for nothing. | Peter – since I last emailed you, this situation has become far more serious. With numerous special elections just around the corner in the new year, our new majority was already going to be facing a razor-thin margin of just 1 seat. But now, with reports indicating that yet another special election will soon be announced, the majority we fought tirelessly for all year long could now be a mere TOSS-UP! Trust me, I know just how much time, effort, and resources from hardworking Americans like YOU went into securing such a big victory this November. That’s why I pulled$2.5 MILLION from my own 2024 campaign funds to help defend our majority from Kamala and the Democrats' warchest. And now, with everything on the line, I REFUSE to let all of our hard work be for nothing. So, before we officially close the books on 2024, I’m looking for 2.5 million PATRIOTS to match my 2024 commitment with a contribution of truly ANY amount to help defend our new majority. Thank you, Jim Jordan \- - - - Forwarded Message - - - - From: Jim Jordan Date: Fri, December 6, 2024 Subject: Just 1 SEAT?! To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Peter, Please don’t misunderstand... I don’t want this email to come across as a message of doom and gloom. After all, no one can deny the sweeping mandate that President Trump and Republicans were just given by voters like YOU, sweeping the White House AND both chambers of Congress. But we also must face a glaring reality: Very soon – with a number of special elections already on the books for 2025 – our new majority will be narrowed to just 1 SEAT. Yes, you read that right. 1 seat. I know how hard you fought for this new majority, Peter. I’m right there with you... Over the course of the election, I transferred $2.5 million from my own campaign to help counter Kamala’s plot to buy our House majority. And now that our new majority could be hanging on by a thread next year, I refuse to let those efforts go to waste. That’s why I have no choice but to reach out before year’s end. I’m asking 2.5 million patriots to match my 2024 commitment with a contribution of ANY amount to help defend our NEW majority that will soon be cut down to just 1 SEAT. Thank you, Jim Jordan Paid for by Team Jordan a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed between Jim Jordan for Congress, Buckeye Liberty Fund, and American Liberty Foundation PAC. PO Box 909, Marysville, OH 43040 |
